| | Peter,

Patriot, it’s Kellyanne Conway – former Senior Counselor to President Trump.

I know you’re extremely busy, so I won’t be long. I’ve been told by my Republican friends in the U.S. Senate to specifically reach out to you to get your opinion on the most important issues facing the American people today.

That is why I need you to take the critical [**NRSC Nationwide Census**.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fe2c8b5a5e534c65b2417c1b78a5ae77&_e=JrXHehDEPD1V7vXtCUOhDLPDsbzlaFSFl0lheSFh0xZWAptT_5eBDIReyWpBn9x3srk-5s5i27103KGIr8KW8TzcDDUiHvfL5Yi6yEXATtxN-fMG5-rYN9LdJRDfX2Vf4dvXOtVXX576XWBX5b5Cr54CsIAqjIjc7EfGymkcz2fN5ZoaIx_OSq05F1oyntM06lh2ZK124JrEyvbsnCeaJn0XTLCH9roEJ9tzF47UgtFmN3bxAvQwpfjitze9odtez8yNc6JBXN1C7Gt4uA7paVGwfSKZxiEtgrntsnvQxTR2d7k6k0a4oPeXrKrPDwO35VfOTIzcrRBY8nNjGPLqyeggH3ncGuMmn7kohaKTNineqAJsIT2yWPt7uKHDUwSSgK3rJxvXPR5dD-oaspGpyDkl6kXyqYSxa_rkXiJwWcSUfeU88XE6cooCV4Ickj22hXnZSsTyTv8fXTtinC0hHQ%3D%3D) In fact, we trust you SO much that your response will be the representation of **YOUR AREA** and forwarded to my team.

name: 2024 GOP Primary Poll (via DLCC.org)
subject: [POLL INSIDE] for you
body:
| | |
---
| | **FIRST:** Trump announced his 2024 presidential campaign. **THEN:** Nikki Haley joined the GOP primary race, announcing her bid earlier this week **AND:** Political experts are saying Ron DeSantis could make a 2024 run official any day now... While Ron DeSantis has been Governor of Florida, the state’s GOP trifecta has passed incredibly damaging, heinous bills from anti-trans legislation to expanding access to firearms. If he runs for president, his platform will include more of the same – this time, on a national scale. [_**We’re worried, so we’re polling local Democrats to see if you are too. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our

Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to share with you another reason why it’s so important that we remain ever vigilant and ALWAYS stay in the fight to defend our great country from dangerous and destructive policies.

Just a few days ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a measure making sure that non-citizens are not allowed vote in Washington DC elections.

Sounds like a no-brainer, right? I mean, who the heck would support a crazy idea like non-citizens voting in American elections?

I’ll tell you who would support it: the vast majority of House Democrats would! **And they did! By a 4-to-1 margin!**

Despite their incessant anti-Trump tropes being laden with claims of “foreign influence in elections”, they call it “controversial” for conservatives to say that only American citizens should vote in American elections. I’m not making this up!

We all know that liberals want to fundamentally change our great country, and this latest move fits their playbook to a tee. They want weaker border security, they don’t support law enforcement, and now they have shown they want to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections.

They weren’t successful this time, but when considering that Biden’s border policy is allowing record levels of illegal immigration, and Democrats are raising record levels of money for their campaigns, we should all be scared for the future of our country if the left makes gains in the next election.

I know you receive a lot of fundraising emails, but if you’ve read this far, I know you share my concern. **[If that’s true, I’m asking you to step up and take action to let me know you join with other patriots like yourself to support the fundamental principles that make America great!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0e285e0bb06c4b2c955538b5509c2d23&_e=SNrdt9WO_oA88LwHPkR_7HAd8hQeaTEZqT1yfRAPuthfy--po8hn8QCWJ8JqnXP1loR8fnjC7wZl5izO5JxgWL4S7r60NWJzOaczf7VNhHnpz13OWx0JcGwELILhYefh0wMncql6kL6xyrcWzz1u-Oa-unDOD13dmpNh7mmgrfvQru6iO-UtEtAql8_WnvxvTnVimJkBSL_nsBi4i2-nHutO6AN1UfZo9gdqwm_UFZfgo7QAxDTzHC6g6Hbl_e4-twtqTdpzXq_bcUV0D-WdTyJF6krQndTHxTtaunddahQDPhv8aQapFk2OgmG19pYfT-rXKTrnVMBQmo-c6swe1R8OYBIul0etMoXKPxgOEOEreD-uDZqRuGjc0Tdu04sZRGF-BfkgosEnW5A9-YblSx5j7i7-79JglmvCaV9Tq_NRTvT2_-tS8WccQTd1_ZY5TOPer1byCM4mG2LPg9LiMA%3D%3D)**

In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

name: American Briefing
subject: Biden's Digital Dollar Gives Government Total Control
body:
The end of personal freedom has begun in America

The end of personal freedom has begun in America.

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.**

On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the 'digital dollar'. They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo.

**And you should be scared!**

The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government.

**Privacy is gone.** They will know exactly how much money you have. Where it is kept. What you are spending it on.

And if they don't approve, they can take it all away with a click of a button.

Don't support their candidates? Gone.

**The framework is now in place for total control.**

There is a way to preserve your freedom and protect your wealth.

**_[A strategy used by wealthy elites is now available to you.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu2bmq8vae94cbhlfjajnsaed1q621b74d2c6h7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3ie0o72c5h2bs)_**

Thousands of Americans have already used this Legal **IRS-Proof loophole to move their retirement accounts (IRA,401k,TSP, etc.)** into certain real assets that protect against Biden's 'digital dollar'.

**_[It's tax free and penalty free.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9ch1m5omao22mq56q3sk7875btm3ai5v3dp4hr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3ie0o72c5h2bs)_**

****_[**We've prepared this exclusive guide,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeu0mgkjph8cel5diknkv2b9bsk8qcgc5u7o5h08_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3ie0o72c5h2bs)_ which details how you can use this IRS-loophole to protect your wealth and retirement savings.

**Accept your FREE copy of this wealth-protection guide ... at no-cost and no-obligation to you. **

But you must act before this digital nightmare completely takes over.

**_[Get your free copy of the Information Guide to learn more.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5jlorjm8pqfagreoe9j005rk9fbhk0osfak062g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3ie0o72c5h2bs)_**

**== > **_[Request Your**FREE, 25-PAGE WEALTH PROTECTION GUIDE -** It Reveals **A LEGAL IRS-PROOF LOOPHOLE**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z00p6134n4td4rv4o51qo0gj3mpmu363fn1lb000_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3ie0o72c5h2bs)_[ **( It's Also Tax & Penalty FREE)**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztj7j8j8grejsvhpr24pm4vhpk3v0nchj03u53d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3ie0o72c5h2bs)**.**

**P.S.** Experts warn present day digital currencies are extremely vulnerable to theft, scams and illegal trade. When money is turned into nothing more than a computer code, it becomes easy to steal. Protect your savings with a real investment. **_[Request your free, 25 - page guide now.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zet2cretj9sv1e312fpepaq7ila1vk8vcl1v6k1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3ie0o72c5h2bs)_**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Fwd: What do you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61517823:W9GK-vDCN:m:1:2365227053:F1C28B1DC182E36E295DB92DFDEE02A9:r)
| | | | I'm launching my America First Priority Survey -- and I need your feedback to let the new Republican majority know what we need to focus on to take down the Deep State.

**[Please take a moment to complete my one-question survey and share with me what is most important to you?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61517823:W9GK-vDCN:m:1:2365227053:F1C28B1DC182E36E295DB92DFDEE02A9:r) >>**
NAME: [**Peter**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61517823:W9GK-vDCN:m:1:2365227053:F1C28B1DC182E36E295DB92DFDEE02A9:r)
Survey Status: [PENDING >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61517823:W9GK-vDCN:m:1:2365227053:F1C28B1DC182E36E295DB92DFDEE02A9:r)
| [TAKE YOUR SURVEY >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61517823:W9GK-vDCN:m:1:2365227053:F1C28B1DC182E36E295DB92DFDEE02A9:r)
---

**Peter, what should Republicans be focusing on?**
• The politicization of government agencies. • The weaponization of the Justice Department and FBI. • The FBI's collusion with Russia. • Big Tech and the FBI conspiring to censor conservatives.
| [TAKE YOUR SURVEY >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61517823:W9GK-vDCN:m:1:2365227053:F1C28B1DC182E36E295DB92DFDEE02A9:r)
---

As you can see, Republicans have their work cut out for them in the fight to dismantle the Deep State.

**That's why I wanted to hear from YOU today and ask what you think Republicans should focus on.**

I need to know.

**[Will you take my one-question survey today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61517823:W9GK-vDCN:m:1:2365227053:F1C28B1DC182E36E295DB92DFDEE02A9:r)?**

With the new Republican majority in Congress, this could be our best chance to take down the Deep State and restore the power to the people.

And we need to know exactly what's on your mind as we fight to bring down the Deep State.

**[_Can I count on your response? >>_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61517823:W9GK-vDCN:m:1:2365227053:F1C28B1DC182E36E295DB92DFDEE02A9:r)**
[TAKE YOUR SURVEY >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61517823:W9GK-vDCN:m:1:2365227053:F1C28B1DC182E36E295DB92DFDEE02A9:r)
---
Thanks for standing strong,

_Sincerely,_

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Is Asbury An ACTUAL Revival? | From The Desk Of Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
Are We Seeing Revival In America? A buzz word in Christian circles right now is... REVIVAL. Currently, many Christian Universities such as Asbury, L
| | |
---
## Are We Seeing Revival In America?
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10689.1.9fccb7348be4280f16ebd17eaed2172a)
---
A **buzz word** in Christian circles right now is... **REVIVAL**.
Currently, many _Christian Universities_ such as **Asbury** , **Lee** , **Ohio Christian** and others are witnessing college aged students seek God continually for now over two weeks.
This has sparked a **TON** of questions and opinions on social media.
Some say what we are witnessing is not an actual revival.
Some say it is a revival.
This Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10690.1.806a24936e77a09479b2cd741fa61240) in Tulsa, OK, I preached on the topic of **[REVIVAL](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10691.1.2d2930cfc661f053f5f5b143d6dd2a13)**.
Addressing three basic questions:
1\. **What is revival?**
2\. **Who is revival for?**
3\. **How do we experience revival?**
You can watch the message here: [www.youtube.com/live/TKq0uxbUdl8?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10692.1.0475216f4a9860af10c85ba1041ba171)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10693.1.33ac97c329eacb9df42e80aad56dfbd3), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10694.1.42fb8196d88290394cd38f2ebd050942), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10695.1.71b4231480781a7c1834185602a34c83), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10696.1.4fc08f3ef38e57c9671269eb66fef750), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10697.1.decb1b642a29da99bb723b40339c4f7a), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10698.1.6beb0e10053a063faaef319c4a88a5aa)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10699.1.6fe7debc5ec26cd8c6613b8cbc732157)
| | [ Watch: Revival! ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10700.1.b9f4ce746f13806ad913b8759b7e8d0a)
---
---
## Sheridan.Church Is Coming To OKC!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10701.1.addbafedbb3c37226eb1656837ccf920)
---
**I am excited to announce** that [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10702.1.3a469f9d42f0a20fa970c40a30ff1f51) in Tulsa, OK is launching a **new campus in Oklahoma City!**
If you or someone you know lives in the OKC Metro and is searching for a Church Home, then I want to invite you to join me for a [Interest Meet & Greet](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10703.1.40d7d5ca5a5037ad4cb64f926bb992ed).
**Date** : Saturday, February 25, 2023
**Time** : 5:00 - 6:30 pm
**Location** : 2222 W. Hefner Rd. Oklahoma City, OK 73120
**RSVP** : [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/846320](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10704.1.fb8f7f10041c032dbeb69da3a3b4cf5a)
To learn more about [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10705.1.126451638fc37435807b6a8cf2339762) please visit: [www.sheridan.church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10706.1.79fd9ce4c6565c35b7fbcd81f147d96a)
| | [ Sheridan.Church OKC ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10707.1.21f683b2acccb60a4b96ddc201631260)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10708.1.c5af9ceb520e23d080060d2e19444f7c)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10709.1.2de0e29e758f6d895e7f37bb5e6637f1), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10710.1.9dd32281a5632e77bb98ba5d459f6b54).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10711.1.81b6206f7cea812c14d13b1ce0fbc83d) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10712.1.6d7d961d1902a4c40044f6b86f3cc5ae)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10713.1.190e8268497718c1bb058590dd37be7d) products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...
| | [ Save Up To 66% At MyPillow.com ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18320078.10714.1.5d24cf3534eb37bf8f88d37f2f0a2494)

subject: Senator Sam Thompson is a Traitor
body:
87 year old Sam Thompson has switched to be a Democrat after years of voting with them...
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lhDbVgPSBGzJLZTeiAcqR82F4scjU_Qnl2hL-0Lw6Z_XjrS774-c92DNiEJ6RzEOWwLexwaQLU4EdycQj4zTVkYkcgtyQUnglPwxyZHCnh5u0EZpIcJRGvoJyidyQzBV1hiGmSFJNZzU0lgrKI7_8pXKS6IV5uB4GXTD4RclagrITWU4IzAsiYVplMbHvJHGZuzoc7N0b3OIhWnAPKhdT1gB_5ZbUEaZkJ8UaU-jowZdvwazHOgtYCuGveKJkOg7GZXg2YVYQJncb72rcMlfD061ctMLaY-NbAE8g4p_Gm5Y0OsuIYzvr_J9J58U_OgR40Ig3Moe15ciekOOj5Vnp_u-VOZ_f-QSIWN9c0RWl4g=&c=kUMzLiRBDrI7e4HrUahFgqo0HVgbQmLqCEAFYjSEh5Wrw559l2F7Kg==&ch=S9oS2Vh75l3B1A-HwJZQd13g8zdSwPOR6aqRuKHPvSVfI7IQdROcsw==)

| Peter,
In a year where we finally have the chance to take back our State Senate and put Gov Murphy in check, Senator Sam Thompson, now known as Traitor Thompson, switched from being Republican to being a Democrat.
The 87 year old Senator isn't happy that the Republican party is moving on from him after he voted with Democrats for decades and helped destroy New Jersey
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lhDbVgPSBGzJLZTeiAcqR82F4scjU_Qnl2hL-0Lw6Z_XjrS774-c92DNiEJ6RzEO1duMYGwSfESc4khWItXTrkkPv9EFgd3RVuWj4u7pF-_NiGTBlvkekI-sahyDT2RgJbQbDjTJ5kLgwYmCrr_gdAL_L-mZa9exfE3ACSpB_fXGWGFwz5gdwG0W_2PuFp1qt43w88iERUaffxUDQn8R5dkgtmO9bnyH_nSdUkZeQ7VnzWhT19kk2_14w7BjNyur12_266JsAwJnIAJ14jgcDe5RBOWrDaam40qw44Tciu_kloDeOQVTTfhTtGVjV-5IcVc9B5pJ3g3i5osmccyhfQcUA2dDrp3yO1Lh9HqRC1I=&c=kUMzLiRBDrI7e4HrUahFgqo0HVgbQmLqCEAFYjSEh5Wrw559l2F7Kg==&ch=S9oS2Vh75l3B1A-HwJZQd13g8zdSwPOR6aqRuKHPvSVfI7IQdROcsw==)

The citizens of New Jersey have had enough of this type of political crap.
We're still trying to rebound from Covid lockdowns, our cost of living is still among the highest in the country, and our parents are still fighting for a say in their child's education and healthcare.
We need elected officials who will fight for us and what is best for us, not what is best for themselves.
Sam Thompson NEEDS to go and so does the Democratic majority here in New Jersey.
Help us by contributing today so we can take back the NJ State Senate and stop Phil Murphy and his radical agenda.

Dear Peter,

As you know, the future of our state is at stake. Arizona is facing serious questions about the integrity of our elections, and I am leading the charge to get to the bottom of what happened on Election Day.

As you may have heard, I recently held a rally in support of a thorough investigation into the election in Maricopa County. Your vote deserves to be counted, and I believe it's our duty to ensure that it was.

**[That's why I'm reaching out today to ask for your help in supporting the Save Arizona Fund. We need your help to raise the funds necessary to investigate the election and ensure that every vote was counted.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62341748:6oXAcWG7N:m:1:3331421248:C66D9B0C0ED6668BE507012FCDF8524F:r)

**[Every donation helps us take one step closer to the truth, and every dollar counts. So, I urge you to show your support for our cause by donating to the Save Arizona fund today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62341748:6oXAcWG7N:m:1:3331421248:C66D9B0C0ED6668BE507012FCDF8524F:r)

name: Blood Pressure Solution
subject: #1 Lie About Blood Pressure Meds
body:
If you (or someone you love) take blood pressure medication, I have some critical news for you...

**Urgent warning:** If you (or someone you love) take blood pressure medication, I have some critical news for you. A courageous doctor from Austin, TX, has uncovered an ugly and DEADLY truth about blood pressure meds that Big Pharma would do ANYTHING to keep you from knowing. Given the controversial nature of what you're about to see, this information may be taken down at ANY time, so [read it now](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11628/6374453/11a7b60f3fe564bfb77e91a7e254a574e63c857d/618c3e3f11787c47177c146d863fec24162ff328), before it's too late!

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tomorrow, we can shave a seat off of Kevin McCarthy's majority in the House. Can you help Jennifer McClellan’s campaign make sure voters remember to come to the polls tomorrow?
body:
Special election tomorrow
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54b5f23e-84e2-4daa-86e3-489e729a4a1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, we’ve made every effort to remind Democrats across the country to support this race. It’s easy to forget about special elections, meaning that campaigns have a steep hill to climb making sure voters remember and show up to the polls when there isn’t a big, national election happening. That’s why your support, today, is so important. _As we've written the past few weeks, we have a golden opportunity--really, a necessity--to shave a seat off of Kevin McCarthy's majority in the House tomorrow. _ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, for her to win this race on Tuesday,_** **_fight for all we hold dear in DC & strike another blow vs Kevin McCarthy, taking a seat from his already-thin majority?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10c6afc2-2202-4a83-bdcf-e6386a9fabfc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Tomorrow, there's a special election for an open seat in Virginia to determine if we send an incredibly talented & experienced Democrat, Jennifer McClellan, to Washington. Or a MAGA Republican who refused to accept President Biden's victory, or his own loss in his election!!**_ **But we must continue to support McClellan! As she just shared in an email:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8636a3c2-3c05-4772-bfc2-88741252cad6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cc2b7a1-cf95-46af-b727-0682c7940344/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Jennifer McClellan served in the VA state legislature for a decade and a half. Like she did there,_** **_in Congress she'll champion working families and women's rights, and she'll fight GOP white nationalism as the first Black woman elected to this seat. Ever._** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in rushing McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, for her to win this race on Tuesday,_** **_fight for all we hold dear in DC & strike another blow vs Kevin McCarthy, taking a seat from his already-thin majority?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f9546c5-90a7-431f-95fc-b5d039e24023/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you folks. Now's the time to finish strong!_ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T593339ee-ec76-417a-a89e-d742468e4e34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jennifermcclellan-vahouserace22-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15a61d92-8bea-4ac6-b1a2-51b81141187b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=04ebb8d2-199f-47ba-9383-9701e78685fc&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=04ebb8d2-199f-47ba-9383-9701e78685fc&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Sheet Metal Workers' Local No.19 Endored Dr. Nina Ahmad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
Sheet Metal Workers' Local No. 19 has endorsed **Dr. Nina Ahmad for Philadelphia City Council at-Large. **
I am delighted to receive this endorsement which continues the momentum of my critical labor backed campaign.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/d5Dink53fMhqG92_LGhs4Qwl3cO414_tLwvZ0qJ4jzA=/Ft9sCVr2phJuELNwFaqUcmlHXRITJHviBBj96gXyL8k=)

The support and partnership of Sheet Metal Workers' Local No. 19 which represents over 4000 highly skilled and well-trained individuals is critical for the future growth & prosperity of Philadelphia.
[Please donate $25 or more to keep our Momentum going to help Democrats continue protecting our fundamental rights, ensuring every eligible voter has their voice heard, and investing in critical programs.](https://act.myngp.com/el/d5Dink53fMhqG92_LGhs4Qwl3cO414_tLwvZ0qJ4jzA=/IyUfXOF-6aUr4312AYpnLUTMkzX7NWDhqosrTwjJi5Q=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/d5Dink53fMhqG92_LGhs4Qwl3cO414_tLwvZ0qJ4jzA=/gqihCRIrsLlBo-afMxEaFv63GsyeEckT8DsrPol9Ayk=)

Paid for by Nina for Philly
---

Nina for Philly
PO Box 27339
Philadelphia PA 19118 United States

In less than 24 hours from right now, voters will fill the last remaining vacancy in the U.S. House of Representatives.

# **Is Your Retirement At Risk?**
---
| | Rising interest rates. Skyrocketing inflation. Exploding debt. Global chaos. A looming recession. It's no wonder Americans are becoming more and more concerned about their savings and investments. That's why I wrote my newest report...
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57ac556d005b4486a68ad3f6834e5f4d&_e=5uLHsm120k8rhBniBuAgBYdS3uVzTGsKdkpJBaXPIEh_2Nqayfs17Bew6u2-cAH0wd9CqdP-t6fa2C7yOleGKVKiYt7kl-dWd0lLFOkT1mbaMy2Nac0E-Mi3uIUsjbVVTYOUpfO_4SipNls0SXKErs8zU8YGU6DNIHc5okLJ8vbXX-FpHL4zlB_NGdfn2zsOYoRpF1cKOfkePY-5fkqynqejRiK1ZdcTXc3Lb1R28TRvo1ORoqlD1ssl_06YF6OCPBC1Ut9OpcBrXw0KgVCYg5MjcXAvSvTqDkKfYdo6UFfn-RHPkeb95ujH7Y2SDLD0DX7Yp_SdnTlGKUSp2JktwsBOQhqG5-H15RHDxga2peb_caGe5OXPiWJj-2pfqZKiULqNAKjMdBStdb--iCA9QWBpOrt7TH6nA5K0qO_4qQVJaE4X-JLtr84sO1Y5gw4BX5vEHItbAZCrFrC2NawkuwufCOHgy3Ql4vWiTRW3dvM%3D)

| **Protecting Your Retirement From Recessions & Depressions**
---
|
---
**_Lessons From My Father and The Great Depression_**
---
| | This [**FREE REPORT**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57ac556d005b4486a68ad3f6834e5f4d&_e=5uLHsm120k8rhBniBuAgBYdS3uVzTGsKdkpJBaXPIEh_2Nqayfs17Bew6u2-cAH0wd9CqdP-t6fa2C7yOleGKVKiYt7kl-dWd0lLFOkT1mbaMy2Nac0E-Mi3uIUsjbVVTYOUpfO_4SipNls0SXKErs8zU8YGU6DNIHc5okLJ8vbXX-FpHL4zlB_NGdfn2zsOYoRpF1cKOfkePY-5fkqynqejRiK1ZdcTXc3Lb1R28TRvo1ORoqlD1ssl_06YF6OCPBC1Ut9OpcBrXw0KgVCYg5MjcXAvSvTqDkKfYdo6UFfn-RHPkeb95ujH7Y2SDLD0DX7Yp_SdnTlGKUSp2Jktwp-gIO-k0CO0T5_UH2LnS7WtQXiJlbuwKzEsFkBGZQ7G23uZhQ9v8bR-OPHdO6S9XkqpLNtoM9zCus2pb7ukvxaOqrLGtb6o7qO6pbgwxM6gYDgJkFB-48GBWJr-6cQusFiQ58RLIYBhSoZTVsYKlu4%3D) shows YOU how you could protect your retirement savings before it's too late.

It reveals...
---
* Two critical lessons from my late father and economist, Herbert Stein.
* How everyday Americans are ruining their retirements (and how they could stop the bleeding).
* The time-tested strategies my father and I have have both used to battle recessions and depressions.
* Plus, so much more!

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: An OpEd (and site) you should read
body:
| | | |
---
---
|
---
---
| This last Tuesday, Campfire Colorado published an "OpEd" piece written by Erik Aadland, presenting his vision of how to win elections in Colorado again. The transcription is below.
Campfire Colorado is a news and opinion place on The Web where you can find a free exchange if ideas germane to Colorado and our country. If you're not familiar with this great source of information, we urge you to visit their site and find out why they are the premiere place for relevant News and Opinion on the issues that affect Coloradans.
---
| | [Read Erik's Article on Campfire Colorado here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013aXMEET7gXz6Zq0Kyt_P_QBhu752tI8nsdowIAyoIxj2ssEHoLqIK8eghRIQh4YJNbu2kBMQsmC42aQ5X_mp9Nz3f2eHvkta1_xtwBwP9ADdTRJAYpugxkHgB_CclFw9QetBOL7KQK3izoz4P7CaQnz-MBbsxWL3xVTO8gF33_h9wKmZZ1t9AEFblNf1p2L-Zoz31FMSODKOwvenM9co3SMfhs03-m9G&c=7hv3zZyO7rdInxUDcuNZcCDv0hjvg94LxpjaNpuWX24NaPkPt3xF7w==&ch=MgVFhdI-xMJVVg8OFPBBJSAhdbVsuVZIpN9keGeV-xqyAV61U62Ihg==)
---
| |
---
| Unite to Win: A Strategy for All Republicans
---
| I am running for Colorado GOP Chairman with the singular focus of getting Republicans elected in Colorado. To win elections, we must do the following, which will be my priorities as Chairman:

* Chase and harvest ballots. To compete with Democrats, we must build an enterprise to chase and harvest ballots. We will make this a major focus of the Colorado GOP going forward, partnering in this effort with other states, the RNC and private organizations working towards this end.

* Close the primary. Accomplish this through a lawsuit. See my argument for closing the primary in my Campfire Colorado article (February 1, 2023). Though according to the Federal Election Commission (FEC), the official party cannot fund this internally, I will champion this as Chairman and use my considerable fundraising skills to assist others with raising the money. Additionally, I will leverage my extensive network to help orchestrate the necessary private parties toward accomplishing this end.

* Make the caucuses great again. The State GOP organization must assist counties with running their caucuses efficiently and successfully, by providing the necessary resources (time, money, and people), training and guidance. I will partner with county party leaders to help them be successful. We must:
* Attract participation to the caucuses.
* Educate Republicans on the purpose, value, and importance of the caucus system.
* Train county leaders, district captains, precinct committee people and volunteers on how to execute a well-run caucus.
* Fund the caucus process in every county.

* Unify the party. We must come together against a common foe: a radical Left propagating and legislating socialism, which is destroying freedom, opportunity, and our future. We will work together to develop a vision that most freedom-loving and opportunity-desiring Coloradans can rally behind.

---
* Register more Republicans. We must grow our ranks through active voter registration programs, especially engaging young conservative-minded people.

* Inspire voters to turn out and vote Republican. We must restore trust with our constituents by demonstrating our care, concern, and solutions to the issues most concerning to Coloradans, without compromising our values. We will accomplish this with effective messaging, combined with an extensive outreach program, especially to Hispanic voters, and a significant marketing program to unaffiliated voters.

* Restore trust in our elections. We must restore trust in our elections so people vote with confidence knowing their ballot will be counted, and no fraudulent votes will be accepted. I will address this with actions, not words, championing ballot initiatives to: a) strengthen voter ID laws; b) clean the voter rolls; c) ensure a trustworthy audit process; and d) replace current voting machines with trustworthy systems. Furthermore, we will increase Republican presence at the ballot boxes and polling stations by training an army of volunteers to be poll watchers and adjudicators.

---
### To win elections, we must also do the fundamentals well:

* Raise money. We must raise significant funds to train and resource candidates, to facilitate our party processes such as the caucuses and state assemblies, to advertise to voters, to increase voter registration and to develop the data required to understand the constituency. I have proven my fundraising ability by raising $1.4 million in my recent congressional race, with thousands of small dollar contributions. I will continue this track record as Chairman, putting it towards getting Republicans elected.

* Train candidates. I will personally assist candidates by instructing them in how to develop a campaign strategy, build a campaign team, fundraise and how to execute a campaign tailored to their specific race. In my run for Congress, I built a campaign team of ten professional staff members, forty area coordinators and two hundred volunteers. I gained national prominence when I was selected to the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) Young Guns program, as well as receiving endorsements from five members of President Trump's cabinet, two-former governors, fourteen current or former members of Congress, a host of statewide elected officials, and numerous prominent businesspeople and media personalities, as well as several pro-conservative and veteran organizations. I will help candidates replicate this model.

* Increase the fidelity of our voter data. In my campaign for Congress, it became clear to me that I was fighting a war blindly, attempting to court independent voters without fully understanding their priorities, as well as not having a clear idea of who are the persuadable independents. Thus, we spent enormous resources (money, volunteer hours, etc.) campaigning to an audience we did not understand. As a party, we must build out our dataset to a much higher fidelity so we can target voters more effectively. I will judiciously use State GOP resources to build this dataset, then arm candidates with the information so they can engage voters meaningfully and efficiently.

As Chairman, this is how I will move us forward toward the goal of winning elections, executing a long-term strategy to revitalize the Republican Party of Colorado. Together, we will rebuild our political infrastructure in a way that best serves candidates, giving them the greatest chance of winning. We will also restore trust within our party, reducing internal discord and divisiveness, while inspiring Coloradans to vote Republican again. I hope you will join me in this noble effort and help build a brighter future together!
---

## About Erik
---

| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.

clean_body: | | | | | | This last Tuesday, Campfire Colorado published an "OpEd" piece written by Erik Aadland, presenting his vision of how to win elections in Colorado again. The transcription is below. Campfire Colorado is a news and opinion place on The Web where you can find a free exchange if ideas germane to Colorado and our country. If you're not familiar with this great source of information, we urge you to visit their site and find out why they are the premiere place for relevant News and Opinion on the issues that affect Coloradans. | | == | | | Unite to Win: A Strategy for All Republicans | I am running for Colorado GOP Chairman with the singular focus of getting Republicans elected in Colorado. To win elections, we must do the following, which will be my priorities as Chairman: Chase and harvest ballots. To compete with Democrats, we must build an enterprise to chase and harvest ballots. We will make this a major focus of the Colorado GOP going forward, partnering in this effort with other states, the RNC and private organizations working towards this end. Close the primary. Accomplish this through a lawsuit. See my argument for closing the primary in my Campfire Colorado article (February 1, 2023). Though according to the Federal Election Commission (FEC), the official party cannot fund this internally, I will champion this as Chairman and use my considerable fundraising skills to assist others with raising the money. Additionally, I will leverage my extensive network to help orchestrate the necessary private parties toward accomplishing this end. Make the caucuses great again. The State GOP organization must assist counties with running their caucuses efficiently and successfully, by providing the necessary resources (time, money, and people), training and guidance. I will partner with county party leaders to help them be successful. We must: Attract participation to the caucuses. Educate Republicans on the purpose, value, and importance of the caucus system. Train county leaders, district captains, precinct committee people and volunteers on how to execute a well-run caucus. Fund the caucus process in every county. Unify the party. We must come together against a common foe: a radical Left propagating and legislating socialism, which is destroying freedom, opportunity, and our future. We will work together to develop a vision that most freedom-loving and opportunity-desiring Coloradans can rally behind. Register more Republicans. We must grow our ranks through active voter registration programs, especially engaging young conservative-minded people. Inspire voters to turn out and vote Republican. We must restore trust with our constituents by demonstrating our care, concern, and solutions to the issues most concerning to Coloradans, without compromising our values. We will accomplish this with effective messaging, combined with an extensive outreach program, especially to Hispanic voters, and a significant marketing program to unaffiliated voters. Restore trust in our elections. We must restore trust in our elections so people vote with confidence knowing their ballot will be counted, and no fraudulent votes will be accepted. I will address this with actions, not words, championing ballot initiatives to: a) strengthen voter ID laws; b) clean the voter rolls; c) ensure a trustworthy audit process; and d) replace current voting machines with trustworthy systems. Furthermore, we will increase Republican presence at the ballot boxes and polling stations by training an army of volunteers to be poll watchers and adjudicators. To win elections, we must also do the fundamentals well: Raise money. We must raise significant funds to train and resource candidates, to facilitate our party processes such as the caucuses and state assemblies, to advertise to voters, to increase voter registration and to develop the data required to understand the constituency. I have proven my fundraising ability by raising $1.4 million in my recent congressional race, with thousands of small dollar contributions. I will continue this track record as Chairman, putting it towards getting Republicans elected. Train candidates. I will personally assist candidates by instructing them in how to develop a campaign strategy, build a campaign team, fundraise and how to execute a campaign tailored to their specific race. In my run for Congress, I built a campaign team of ten professional staff members, forty area coordinators and two hundred volunteers. I gained national prominence when I was selected to the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) Young Guns program, as well as receiving endorsements from five members of President Trump's cabinet, two-former governors, fourteen current or former members of Congress, a host of statewide elected officials, and numerous prominent businesspeople and media personalities, as well as several pro-conservative and veteran organizations. I will help candidates replicate this model. Increase the fidelity of our voter data. In my campaign for Congress, it became clear to me that I was fighting a war blindly, attempting to court independent voters without fully understanding their priorities, as well as not having a clear idea of who are the persuadable independents. Thus, we spent enormous resources (money, volunteer hours, etc.) campaigning to an audience we did not understand. As a party, we must build out our dataset to a much higher fidelity so we can target voters more effectively. I will judiciously use State GOP resources to build this dataset, then arm candidates with the information so they can engage voters meaningfully and efficiently. As Chairman, this is how I will move us forward toward the goal of winning elections, executing a long-term strategy to revitalize the Republican Party of Colorado. Together, we will rebuild our political infrastructure in a way that best serves candidates, giving them the greatest chance of winning. We will also restore trust within our party, reducing internal discord and divisiveness, while inspiring Coloradans to vote Republican again. I hope you will join me in this noble effort and help build a brighter future together! | | | | | == | | | About Erik | | | Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. Congress begins its first public hearings on President Joe Biden's family, including Hunter and his ties to foreign companies.

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We need to talk about my border visit in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
You don’t need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster

| |
---
| | | Friend, it's Kevin McCarthy.

I just visited the southern border with Rep. Juan Ciscomani, Rep. Derrick Van Orden, Rep. Jen Kiggans, and Rep. Lori Chavez-Deremer.

You don't need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster - a self-inflicted disaster unleashed upon the American people by the Biden Administration's open border policies.
* Over 5 million illegals have been ushered in by the Biden Administration.
* Hundreds of thousands of pounds of fentanyl and other dangerous narcotics are unleashed onto our streets to poison our youth.
* Criminals and terrorists are sneaking in undetected.
* And the countless handouts & benefits the Biden Administration is giving these illegal aliens is all funded by _**YOU.**_

Now that we are in the majority, we can finally DO something about the unmitigated humanitarian and national security catastrophe Joe Biden is trying to sweep under the rug.

We are going to begin congressional hearings AT the southern border, so we can hold Democrats accountable for the crisis they have caused and END this disaster once and for all.

_**But I can 't do this without you.**_

**I'm setting an emergency goal of $20,000 by the end of today to help House GOP's efforts to secure the southern border.**

body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z63hotfoi51auju067uiitb7h39j32m34i0f6vho_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cji6apr4s1h2bs)

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjqm9g3s4fouclapobtk39vomu9jfovfgkd2pp7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cji6apr4s1h2bs)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just one dollar!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztf2tbnkk64b8hlkuiu7d5or68jr4c6b76118778_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cji6apr4s1h2bs)
---
[Get your book now](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm5kctfhf8c0d5a8u2lkd9mol551231dmomhjg60_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cji6apr4s1h2bs)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Recusal, Rebuttal, and Other Truths from the Front Line
body:
Events of the week and a look back at how we got here | | | | | |
---
| | **Recusal, Rebuttal, and Other Truths from the Front Line.**
Lots of new news here at True the Vote. Before we dive in, I want to say thank you to all of you who stand with us, support us, and help spread the word.
_“The world offers you comfort. But you were not made for comfort. You were made for greatness”_ _― Pope Benedict XVI_
We are on full court defense in five critical lawsuits, researching, writing, making videos, event planning, developing new tech and training programs, and working side by side with sheriffs across the country - all part of a national plan for fair and honest elections. Every day is a fight. But we are here for such a time.
Never quit.
Ever onward -
---
[**PS If you can, please donate to support our work. We need you**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a54a935c15&e=ad8cba7e98)**r help.**
|
---
**Recusal | Federal Judge Recuses in Konnech v. True the Vote**
True the Vote issued this statement on the recusal of Judge Kenneth Hoyt from ongoing litigation with Konnech, an international election software provider, over alleged ties to China:
_"True the Vote filed a motion seeking the recusal of Judge Kenneth Hoyt in Konnech's litigation against us. That motion was GRANTED today. Recusals in federal court are rare, and this decision reflects the gravity of this matter. Judge Hoyt sought unbridled discovery in this case before the most basic elements were litigated and sent Catherine Engelbrecht and Gregg Phillips to prison without bond, all in a civil matter._
_He was reversed and admonished by the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals._
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=366f67f37c&e=ad8cba7e98)
_Konnech has sought to deflect attention from their wrongdoing through litigation, and Judge Hoyt's removal from this matter is a big step forward in unwinding the truth of Konnech's role in U.S. elections and elections around the world._
_As has become clear in recent weeks, Chinese incursions into all elements of American society is growing, and our elections are no exception._
_True the Vote looks forward to a full public conversation about the issues of election security raised in this important case.”_
|
---
**Rebuttal | Liberty is not well served by ballot harvesting**
We’ll keep this short for now. Advocating for ballot harvesting isn’t a winning strategy. For that reason, this WSJ article was very difficult to read - [“Donald Trump Changes Tune on Mail-in Voting, Ballot Collection” ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=003466d39c&e=ad8cba7e98)
We’ll talk about this at length on Monday night’s Locals ( 2/20, 7p et). Please join us if you can - [truethevote.locals.com](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=dcab834a4c&e=ad8cba7e98)
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=af569638f3&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2dd42494e0&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
| | Digging through the True the Vote archives, I found an article I wrote in 2012 titled [“](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ab725af826&e=ad8cba7e98) _[Welcome to Your Wake Up Call**”**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=5b980fbfcc&e=ad8cba7e98)_**.** I can assure you that I didn’t have a crystal ball or a time machine that transported me to 2022 and back. This piece only demonstrates that the election integrity issues we are dealing with today began well before 2020. Fixing these problems has taken on an even greater urgency.

---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f9b61c99bb&e=ad8cba7e98)
Excerpts from a time no-so-different as this....**** “Congratulations, you’ve been chosen. Freedom is under attack, our future is uncertain. You have been chosen to be here, in this country, right now, because you are capable of bearing this historic load, of standing up for America and our fundamental beliefs in life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. It’s in you..it’s why you’re here...it’s why you’re reading this...and it’s why I’m writing it. Like it or lump it, you’ve been chosen.
It was in early 2008 when I had my “you’re chosen” moment. At no time prior to 2008 was being a “political activist operative” ever, ever, on my radar. I was (and still am, by the way) a mother, a founding member of our church, a board member on our children’s school PTO, a city volunteer, and a small business owner.
I believed that government was best left to the politicians; they could be relied upon to work on behalf of the American people using the Constitution as a guide. We would pay our taxes, and me and mine would be left alone. But somewhere in the political harum-scarum leading up to the November elections, things changed. I watched as our government made decisions that stood in stark contrast to what I believed were nonnegotiable American ideals. For the first time in my life, I scared of what government had become and I saw myself as an unwitting accomplice. So, I looked at my children, my aging parents, my business, my church, my country, and decided I would do something to help protect them, even if I didn’t know what that something was....
Our little group decided to start small, so we looked for a simple project. There was a need for people to work at the polls. There weren’t enough volunteers. And so we thought, this is perfect. It will be a one-day gig. But what happened that day at the polls was much more than we’d ever bargained for. We saw chronic confusion over proper polling place procedures. We saw blatant disregard for inconvenient details in the election code, but most troubling of all, we saw outright, undeniable election fraud.
We watched as people were allowed to vote without showing any identification; they were just passed down the line of election workers and over to the voting booth without question. Or voters who came in with multiple registration cards and when told that one registration number was shown as having voted during early election period, was quick to pull out a second registration card, to which the election worker would respond “Oh, ok, that one works.”
But the most common sightings were those voters who would plainly state “I don’t remember who I’m supposed to vote for.” The election worker would hop up and say, “I can help you with that”, then off to the voting booth they would go, whereupon the election worker would proceed to instruct the voter who to vote for.
So was born True the Vote and before you can say “free and fair,” what was supposed to be a simple exercise in civic duty, became a full-time avocation.
A few amazing things happened on the way to upholding election integrity in our hometown...
**Amazing Thing #1** : We learned that not everyone was thrilled with the work we were doing. We’d honestly believed that True the Vote would transcend politics and be seen as an effort of value to all voters. In fact, we’d stumbled into one of the most controversial, emotionally charged subjects there is. Citizens, working within the system, upholding the law, was apparently more than some could bear.
I was sued, threatened, and harassed. Pictures of my home and details about the finances of our family business were posted online. The leader of the New Black Panther Party made public, televised, statements about his intent to have poll workers affiliated with True the Vote thrown out of the polls. All because we’d dared to get involved.
**Amazing Thing #2** : Even though our work only revealed the tip of the iceberg, people still seemed to grasp the idea that there was an iceberg. Masses of willing volunteers began signing up to help True the Vote. It was as if a dirty little secret had finally been said loudly enough for everyone to hear - election fraud exists, and something must be done about it. People responded, not by passing the buck, but by rolling up their sleeves and helping research the voter rolls and work at the polls.
**Amazing Thing #3** : Turns out, there were people across the country who’d seen what we’d seen, had many of the same concerns about their own elections, and wanted to work with us to bring True the Vote to their state. Overnight we became a leader in a new national movement towards election integrity.
If you’ve read this far you know that protecting the integrity of our elections is something I believe in passionately. I hope you will be moved to get involved, to volunteer in your community to make your elections a shining example of democracy in action. Our country needs millions, literally millions, more poll workers. Talk with anyone who works in elections, and they will be quick to tell you, good volunteers are hard to come by. And when you’re there, working at the polls, you will be engaged in one of the most meaningful ways you can possibly be involved in your government.
What future do we want for our country? Who among the candidates can be entrusted to carry your convictions and make the kinds of decisions you would make for your family? Our vote is where the rubber meets the road.
But somewhere along the way we started taking a hands-off approach to our elections, becoming spectators in a process that works best only when citizens stay actively engaged. Now we are faced with inaccurate voter registries, polling places without volunteers, and little political will to prosecute perpetrators of election fraud. That is reality. And there is no resolution to the problem without citizens showing back up to work at the polls. If not us, then who?
Friends, we stand at a precipice. We can participate in returning our country to its roots of liberty or we can stand silently and watch as tyranny takes hold. Those are the only two choices we have.
But there is still the choice!
These problems can be resolved. And, if we can shore up our elections, the most fundamental process of government, then there is nothing we can’t accomplish together. Make no mistake, what I’m doing, what I’m asking you to do, is not convenient, it’s not easy, it’s not always fun. It would be so much easier if I hadn’t gotten the wake-up call. But I did, and I think you did, too.”.....
Definitely a back to the future moment. [You can read the full piece here.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=173df9580f&e=ad8cba7e98)****
Better days are ahead, but we must be willing to answer the call, toughen up, and fire walk for a while. We can do this. Stay strong, friends. [**Hope you’ll join us Monday night at 7p et. **](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=512f72b011&e=ad8cba7e98)
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2447afd234&e=ad8cba7e98)
| | |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=aa99891b68) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=aa99891b68).
|
---

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
ACI - Giving Tuesday 2022
Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what’s best for our country, to help him take a stand against “cancel culture.”

|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06humrdr37t88bpsrmbej7fjv5sjic5sn72ug30_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cji69or6chh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what’s best for our country, to help him take a stand against “cancel culture.” It’s tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by “canceling” Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It’s really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

“Cancel culture” tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn’t listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_“What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?”_

And that’s exactly what we’re doing. It’s why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what’s best for our country.

And we’ve created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9b9oa2gbna4ev4iari7lou07i3icsof1rn9pdno_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cji69or6chh2bs)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you’re just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he’s broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... “Enough is enough! I’m fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what’s best for the country.”

If that’s a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI’s **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here’s the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsk1g40bes89trpn69qbuu1qtp6u2pngulqjgung_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cji69or6chh2bs)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you’ll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute
---

---

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Dan Crenshaw and I are ready
body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s time to go after the cartels.

For too long, we’ve been treating the cartels as just another group of street thugs.

_But here’s the truth: these aren’t just average neighborhood gangs._

From heavy armory to billions of dollars in profits, the cartels are full-on paramilitary groups - and it’s time to treat them like the enemies of the state that they are.

**That’s why I’m teaming up with Dan Crenshaw to STOP the cartels once and for all by unleashing the FULL resources of the U.S. military on these violent paramilitary groups.**

[**If you’re ready to STOP the cartels once and for all, stand with me today and DEFEND our border against these criminals.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=75fa99e79f1e4e48b65080833b4bbdbe&_e=YH2w4rIIi1pkgXMtfc-mWbYQMqoBxMjp6HmfGIH-GCnydbUGr8QWctflcnb6IkBQAkCQN9x-88eXO5i10sad-EjnKq1jRH0ftBGnnMPIYKr6Ya-7E4LzVN4SRXgvic_IsJobwZR5auuyW7_buAdaGxFt7HUT-2qm8uVgEKba0CDSTC3dqqk95_xeBJD1oK-LaGx8cW9Orkx2PCL8ydhvQpv0NCAKDZYgcEpCJjyFL2jaHO19z6AoJBjV9dH_IwX2BMTwGSDyx8XA8t_hrg2d48zJsoMnK5TFMr9DguM3yd-lju7AXHkKKQOT4jo6QnemQpAQfAkiOChj5lMAgJuqVAoJJ6PSPTry3gF4wSPxZ_M%3D)

Peter, the cartels pose a danger to families across our country.

The cartels are in complete control of the border, and they can get anything and anyone they want into America.

I don’t have to explain to you just how dangerous this is, Peter.

Their drugs, guns, and criminals are spreading across America.

It’s a dangerous epidemic, and it’s going to take the excellence of the American military to stop them.

[**Stand with Dan Crenshaw and me NOW and STOP the cartels with American military power! **](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=75fa99e79f1e4e48b65080833b4bbdbe&_e=YH2w4rIIi1pkgXMtfc-mWbYQMqoBxMjp6HmfGIH-GCk-sv7Z8kpZpIr2JWnci5WFZK-IvRqiWhdCF8NURq9-tMTGYOqhgcev5F5CxVKK7r8E9PM5c7eqir_DR8A2_DXhmiwJCOeXYoEJFBoKZ8XMmuumV-cwPqsKDgT8PzlwAghvAWqIAOfQ5GPBBY5KZIFBPpIWN4ok751f01o07NexUYHYoUMBqomamW-qobjTqpwtVfxBxv9gb1eqzTc3xUBG60vSA2iuj4ABdzn9ws4licqhWma1-ZUPbUaaLExxmGznpKdBPkjE4j2zbIzaZR5CS9iJ2WLZ8tTgM9wYuCLj0Q%3D%3D)[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=75fa99e79f1e4e48b65080833b4bbdbe&_e=YH2w4rIIi1pkgXMtfc-mWbYQMqoBxMjp6HmfGIH-GCk-sv7Z8kpZpIr2JWnci5WF3Uj1vu2zom6rB11qulS3SgTrBBEGET9IJ_7yf_zkFQsceEVao4KOMqdzMRlxIJwzkNpodykeppbX4jsSuMPCKyischgrAHB1q7ktkdKP56zLmsevLwc8kY718JGFzrtDgceQ2iw48CnYMco7o23ClVxCVfKlHURy7B6z1Tuk8Kp4SSOEiFklWd9J9tCbWyx9OhsVG-iqYqCgJ8hAu39w9ywC7Tmtg-_SPQ-yGp9QrVPf2gJGfXGd19BBoqsmmSYfuH_OiTI8pBNvdUdCEhZY6A%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s time to go after the cartels. For too long, we’ve been treating the cartels as just another group of street thugs. But here’s the truth: these aren’t just average neighborhood gangs. From heavy armory to billions of dollars in profits, the cartels are full-on paramilitary groups - and it’s time to treat them like the enemies of the state that they are. That’s why I’m teaming up with Dan Crenshaw to STOP the cartels once and for all by unleashing the FULL resources of the U.S. military on these violent paramilitary groups. Peter, the cartels pose a danger to families across our country. The cartels are in complete control of the border, and they can get anything and anyone they want into America. I don’t have to explain to you just how dangerous this is, Peter. Their drugs, guns, and criminals are spreading across America. It’s a dangerous epidemic, and it’s going to take the excellence of the American military to stop them. | | De Oppresso Liber, Col. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging
Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Founding Donor
to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as
important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link to
split a donation between my campaign and Charles Booker:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18889?t=1001&akid=2995%2E346206%2EjhDgn_ ]secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-rg

CHIP IN →

Here is the truth:

The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s
the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those
who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum
wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs,
and more.

Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States
Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting
and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.

I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.

I am going to change that.

But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the
Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort.
From day one.

And that is why I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18889?t=1002&akid=2995%2E346206%2EjhDgn_ ]Can you please split a $20 contribution between my campaign and Charles
Booker to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It
all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this
race. Together.

Thank you,

Ruben Gallego

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230220-2995-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2995_346206_jhDgn_&akid=2995%2E346206%2EjhDgn_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2995%2E346206%2EjhDgn_

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We need to talk about my border visit in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
You don’t need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster

| |
---
| | | Friend, it's Kevin McCarthy.

I just visited the southern border with Rep. Juan Ciscomani, Rep. Derrick Van Orden, Rep. Jen Kiggans, and Rep. Lori Chavez-Deremer.

You don't need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster - a self-inflicted disaster unleashed upon the American people by the Biden Administration's open border policies.
* Over 5 million illegals have been ushered in by the Biden Administration.
* Hundreds of thousands of pounds of fentanyl and other dangerous narcotics are unleashed onto our streets to poison our youth.
* Criminals and terrorists are sneaking in undetected.
* And the countless handouts & benefits the Biden Administration is giving these illegal aliens is all funded by _**YOU.**_

Now that we are in the majority, we can finally DO something about the unmitigated humanitarian and national security catastrophe Joe Biden is trying to sweep under the rug.

We are going to begin congressional hearings AT the southern border, so we can hold Democrats accountable for the crisis they have caused and END this disaster once and for all.

_**But I can 't do this without you.**_

**I'm setting an emergency goal of $20,000 by the end of today to help House GOP's efforts to secure the southern border.**

**[Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1n52qsr6e5fja2010c6i3f5t0uh30vien7bcr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cji69pb3cjh2bs "Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?")**

---

Thank you,

Speaker McCarthy

subject: This Candy Soothes Creaky Joints
body:

**FREE SHIPPING ON ALL ORDERS SITEWIDE** ♦️ [FIREARMS & HUNTING](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11629/6374453/911824e5c387d0d4bc224b60fbbb88dde145385e/80c4c29c5cf7b2ea80d29a3bd173883029f0ad65) ♦️ [OPTICS](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11629/6374453/6ed0f6da505624f5e9cf32d39521a723250d4dfc/80c4c29c5cf7b2ea80d29a3bd173883029f0ad65) ♦️ [HOLSTERS](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11629/6374453/ef08b2c9b232516bb1c4e553c410a214fb941d0a/80c4c29c5cf7b2ea80d29a3bd173883029f0ad65) ♦️ [CLEARANCE](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11629/6374453/5d61fd339ca55241d80f4aff91e01b49823d63bc/80c4c29c5cf7b2ea80d29a3bd173883029f0ad65) ♦️
---
| | |
---
**Are you one of these people??** Are you like over 50 million Americans who have stiff, painful joints that hurt too much and make life hard to live comfortably?? If you are, you may not know that there’s an age-old candy recipe you can use to rebuild your bones and joints. When you do, you’ll discover you no longer have to worry about the possibility of experiencing that dreaded bone on bone experience. See...where your bones meet, they’re normally covered by cartilage. Even more, there’s fluid between your joints... This is the case so you can move easily. Pain-free. [=> So I wanted to share this recipe with you.](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11629/6374453/47ed1c7acabb2caac9a724e852c8d6d3cf47eaf9/80c4c29c5cf7b2ea80d29a3bd173883029f0ad65) It’s made by a medical doctor who has spent years learning how to make sure his patients live a long, healthy life. Look. Time isn’t fair to our joints. But it’s ok. You can turn back time on your aging joints. And you can do it with a delicious candy recipe that works. You’ll have less inflammation. Less pain. And a better range of motion so you can get back to enjoying life. **You can have FAST relief. Like less-than-a-week fast.** This unique recipe can help to restore range of motion, lessen muscle pain surrounding those achy joints, and destroy chronic inflammation. All of this so you _can_ feel good, again. So please... _don’t put this off_ ... Colder weather is coming again, and people are stocking up on needed supplies. If we go on lockdown again, they WILL run out. That’s certain. They did last time. [So get your joint pain candy, now by pressing your cursor down, right here.](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11629/6374453/47ed1c7acabb2caac9a724e852c8d6d3cf47eaf9/80c4c29c5cf7b2ea80d29a3bd173883029f0ad65)

(Or stay in pain.) <= I’d hate that for you when I know you just want to feel good in your body, again. P.S. I’m not playing around about them running out of joint pain candy. If you’re in pain and you want to be out of it, [check this out.](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11629/6374453/47ed1c7acabb2caac9a724e852c8d6d3cf47eaf9/80c4c29c5cf7b2ea80d29a3bd173883029f0ad65)

If you’re in pain and you want to be out of it, | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by admin@thetacticaldeals.com 514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US | | | | ---|---|---

name: Zilvinas Silenas
subject: What president created 2 financial disasters?
body:
Have you ever wondered who the worst president of America was?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7gg5ss96037am8v1p0f163embl428rg1jqaf6a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)

Hello Friend,

Have you ever wondered who the worst president of America was? There are enough to choose from, but it's not Biden, Trump, Obama, or Bush.

**No, the worst President in the history of the United States is Woodrow Wilson.**

Woodrow Wilson is responsible for two great financial disasters: the 16th Amendment, which established the Federal Income Tax, and the Federal Reserve Act.

Both of these laws allowed the Federal government to accumulate an unsustainable level of debt and a deficit spending cycle that has seen the national debt skyrocket to nearly $32 TRILLION.

Let me introduce myself to you. My name is Zilvinas Silenas, and I am President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE is an educational foundation trusted by parents and teachers since 1946 to captivate and inspire tomorrow's leaders with sound economic principles.

We've set a goal to reach 65,000 students in the classroom this year and millions more through our online content. We want to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the ideas of free markets and liberty.

To help meet our goal, I need to connect with 100 new supporters by the end of the week, Friend.

[_**Will you help undo the economic damage President Wilson created in 1913 by donating $19.13 or any amount today? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9f9jomd33cdvftokpdtv5r2i3u4oodd0nuuv2uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

This program uniquely challenges school students to think outside of the box to challenge the mainstream narrative.

Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

After the workshops, we provide them with take-home materials, including:

* _I, Pencil_ by Leonard E. Read, FEE's Founder
* _Economics in One Lesson_ by Henry Hazlitt
* _The Law_ by Frederick Bastiat
* And the US Constitution.

Fee in the Classroom makes the ideas of liberty more familiar, credible, and compelling to students. Your generous support allows us to reach more students.

[_**Donate $19.13 and inspire the next generation to choose economic freedom >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znuup0jhjqpvos7gufl1ujed19ggkn5ls44sfilo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)

Every day, thousands of Gen Z go to FEE's website and social media accounts to view our online content.

These additional resources allow students to continue their liberty journey and remain engaged with FEE on their preferred platform.

_We 've already reached a record amount of over 83 MILLION Gen Z online by_:
* Breaking the world record for the largest online economics lecture.
* Making 95 mainstream media appearances.
* Receiving over 11 MILLION views and over 1.8 MILLION shares on our videos.
* Reaching over 2 MILLION in just seven months on TikTok!

**We are teaching real economic history and showing students how awful economic policies are robbing these students of their future. **

Can you help me reach my goal of connecting with 100 new supporters? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z14qbteccit57hudapnk3s4babpf2ht9b4t45h5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $19.13 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8apr1irrckh320ejo22rqfiebv5o4h47cc51bt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z47a4jnkhd1ds50kuftf51l852dcb5fb92cnbmq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs3f7v3bmhhuf8d1ja9qt7e0ks2r85iqrhu033bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl42koam5d2pd3npqs66us55i7g677mjgn1q0860_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd1tkcvlnlasikh2it82g0fe2thso67l3p3uil58_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf8n9rvka3o380340j52n3nfj0967v3uf7629cvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgcclkvvrupbl8elfrikadj6vd45p2sfen3aq3v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9jqdt4n504kvhhp98813jpsgo894o9tspg4oap0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z13bsdoarajosc4kp5r2ijo0pruec386rg39fl98_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh60p32c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Zilvinas Silenas
President
Foundation for Economic Education

We were SHOCKED when Republicans voted for Donald Trump as Speaker of the House.
That's why we emailed you asking you to sign the petition to BAN Trump from office.
But we just checked and we're MISSING your signature!

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I am running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I’m going to change that.

| Peter -

I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link to split a donation between my campaign and UniteDemocracts:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q12023_spl-gallego](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58974796/392849973/706927117?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230220_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3ZTA0ZjNmLTJmYjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_ea1KaXZhzRQ0HWfLMzvvu7A9jDvUChr7M0alhBkMtw=) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58974799/392849984/706927117?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230220_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3ZTA0ZjNmLTJmYjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_ea1KaXZhzRQ0HWfLMzvvu7A9jDvUChr7M0alhBkMtw=)
---
Here is the truth:

The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more.

Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.

I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.

I am going to change that.

But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort. From day one.

And that is why I am asking:

[Can you please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and UniteDemocrats to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this race. Together. »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58974804/392849987/706927117?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230220_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3ZTA0ZjNmLTJmYjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_ea1KaXZhzRQ0HWfLMzvvu7A9jDvUChr7M0alhBkMtw=)

body:
Join the new conservative movement to take back America
