I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.

I'll take this message far and wide in the days ahead.
And I have a particular message for my fellow Republicans.

We've lost the popular vote in seven of the last eight presidential elections.

Our cause is right, but we have failed to win the confidence of a majority of Americans.

Well, that ends today."

_-- Nikki Haley _
Presidential Campaign Launch Address**

name: Shane Cory
subject: Pfizer and Project Veritas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Liberty Fund
body:
My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can't say it's surprising. During the height of the pandemic Pfizer, dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government. | | | | [ ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F9gIBGJBZ4cMw892N763Og19RWg%2Fdw8tml5W4M2PyturKe33OA/1/010001866f5c5ec5-5a38d08a-4b91-48e0-94ce-86dc78036cd1-000000/nQvTTntRx-2GRaRJT6wnKQMDLSs=309)
---
* * *

Please read the message below from our sponsor, American Liberty Fund.
We encourage you to [**visit their site today**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F9gIBGJBZ4cMw892N763Og19RWg%2Fdw8tml5W4M2PyturKe33OA/2/010001866f5c5ec5-5a38d08a-4b91-48e0-94ce-86dc78036cd1-000000/LfotWYclPm5NPdxCiA_rra-CBK8=309).

* * *
| [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F9gIBGJBZ4cMw892N763Og19RWg%2Fdw8tml5W4M2PyturKe33OA/3/010001866f5c5ec5-5a38d08a-4b91-48e0-94ce-86dc78036cd1-000000/hRu-mauVpwYoHNkDOORCfYjFohU=309)
[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F9gIBGJBZ4cMw892N763Og19RWg%2Fdw8tml5W4M2PyturKe33OA/4/010001866f5c5ec5-5a38d08a-4b91-48e0-94ce-86dc78036cd1-000000/vanGbLXLRKVacbLcQaowJWHTEoU=309) Dear Patriot,

I'm sure by now you've seen James O'Keefe's investigation that exposed Pfizer for working to create a deadlier variant of COVID19.

Within weeks of James releasing that report, his organization, Project Veritas, is in disarray and James' board of directors has placed him on paid leave.

**It 's no coincidence that this occurred right after they exposed one of the largest industries in the world. These people will CRUSH anyone who stands in their way.**

[**I 'm asking for your help to expose Pfizer's power in politics by funding a series of ads that . . . . TELLS . . . . THE . . .TRUTH.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F9gIBGJBZ4cMw892N763Og19RWg%2Fdw8tml5W4M2PyturKe33OA/5/010001866f5c5ec5-5a38d08a-4b91-48e0-94ce-86dc78036cd1-000000/V7RaIpPnNnDy8KmxvvEOnPs6ub4=309)

[**Please donate today.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F9gIBGJBZ4cMw892N763Og19RWg%2Fdw8tml5W4M2PyturKe33OA/6/010001866f5c5ec5-5a38d08a-4b91-48e0-94ce-86dc78036cd1-000000/0JRW-52F2RiUZXbWsM8g8K0fBl4=309)

I take this very personally. James is a friend and I'm one of the first executive directors of Project Veritas, helping James get the organization off the ground and thriving for seven years.

As a Marine Corps veteran, our motto "Semper Fidelis" - "Always Faithful" will always ring true in my heart when applied to the Corps, my family and my friends.

In politics, there is an infinitesimally small group of men and women who are true believers that fight for Liberty. We're not in it for the money, fame, power, etc. Most of us try and stay under the radar so we can support each other without the distractions of the media or attacks by the Left (they always still come every once in a while).

**We are a small group, and we are family - and always faithful to each other. **

Mess with one of us, **and you mess with all of us.**

Now, my SuperPAC, American Liberty Fund, is jumping into this fight with everything we have.

My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can't say it's surprising. During the height of the pandemic, Pfizer dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government.

From town mayors to U.S. Senators, checks were cut from Pfizer to buy their silence as they experimented with their plans that were exposed by James O'Keefe.

And let's not fail to mention Pfizer's hard lobbying to stop what they call "dangerous" drug price controls. What's more dangerous? Stopping a company from ripping off sick people, or charging $225k a year for the blockbuster heart drug Vyndaquel?

What kills more people? That answer is obvious.

[**And we 'll be exposing all of this and the links to our elections with your help.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F9gIBGJBZ4cMw892N763Og19RWg%2Fdw8tml5W4M2PyturKe33OA/7/010001866f5c5ec5-5a38d08a-4b91-48e0-94ce-86dc78036cd1-000000/3AIZB_W6sLD17WhXzA4TMAK7M4Y=309)

I've been in Washington for over 20 years, so not much shocks me these days, but it may surprise you who took Pfizer political cash as they were pushing out their COVID19 vaccines. And that list is one of the only lists in Washington that includes Pelosi, Schumer, Kevin McCarthy and even Rand Paul.

Your local mayor or state Attorney General may even be on the list.

Pfizer owns almost everyone is Washington.

But they don't own you, me, James and fighters like us.

[**Help me take a stand and support our work.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F9gIBGJBZ4cMw892N763Og19RWg%2Fdw8tml5W4M2PyturKe33OA/8/010001866f5c5ec5-5a38d08a-4b91-48e0-94ce-86dc78036cd1-000000/mPybm3pakmpDG6L4mmBZYmX2ucs=309) The sooner we can start, the more impact we can make, and we won't be stopping anytime soon!

With Respect and Gratitude,

Shane Cory
Founder and President
American Liberty Fund

P.S. Since 2016, American Liberty Fund has produced hundreds of ads seen by millions of Americans. We hit hard as we don't owe any industry or politicians any breaks. We help elect FIGHTERS who love Liberty and our nation **. . . and we expose everyone who works against you and your family.[Support us today!](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F9gIBGJBZ4cMw892N763Og19RWg%2Fdw8tml5W4M2PyturKe33OA/9/010001866f5c5ec5-5a38d08a-4b91-48e0-94ce-86dc78036cd1-000000/iM1cwtdbvqq154_KdmbZSxBzMm8=309)**

P.P.S. Again as a former executive director of Project Veritas, I was with James when it was just a me, him and a few volunteers in a room above a garage. I know James O'Keefe well, and I know his passion and heart. I stand with him. But we cannot support Project Veritas until he is brought back on board and the board members who are attempting to oust him **resign in shame.**

Paid for by American Liberty Fund

name: Add your name (Left Action)
subject: Add your name: Send a "Thank You" message to President Carter
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | **[Thank you, President Carter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24be9655-a45e-4a8c-ab38-6ede0c5d25c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

---
| | | _**(UPDATE: Over 15,000 of you have already sent "Thank You" messages to President Carter, and there are some truly wonderful ones. If you've not yet added yours, [you can do it right here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9d909d9-405f-43e4-88e2-3b0351c2d0a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And you can read messages from others there as well) **_ The Carter Center [has announced](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57f87ca5-4ccb-466e-ad75-7a3da9812c5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that after multiple hospital stays, President Jimmy Carter has "decided to spend his remaining time at home with his family and receive hospice care instead of additional medical intervention."

**For nearly a century, Jimmy Carter has been a shining example of what it means to be a truly good and decent human being.** People across the nation and the globe love and respect him, and with good reason.

[**Please join us in thanking him for all he has done, and all he has been.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te18fec6d-13b6-4ff2-8489-0baf050f3c3d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: I’ll be honest with you

name: Joe Kent
subject: Is our military WOKE enough for you?
body:
Dear Peter,
Under Joe Biden, our military has gone woke.
I served for twenty years in our nation's special forces, and I understand the purpose of the military is to fight and win wars that keep America safe.
But Joe Biden and my opponent, far-left Congresswoman Marie Perez, have a different objective. Instead, they believe the US military is a social experiment to promote "Diversity, equity, and inclusion," or "DEI."
Just this past week, the Department of Defense hosted a summit on DEI, featuring "distinguished presenters and renowned experts in government, higher education, business, science, and technology," all at the expense of our military readiness.
**I cannot wait to get elected to Congress so I can introduce legislation OUTLAWING SPENDING ON ANY DEI PROGRAMS IN THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT.**
Will you help me accomplish that by donating to my campaign today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/4gAeeKcIanPjgQ6h1i8o892A/FD8uvNBsTtNFfnEI763bxQNA)?
My opponent in this race, Congresswoman Marie Perez, is fully behind all of this. At a recent town hall, she re-affirmed her commitment to the radical "trans" agenda that gives men the legal right to enter battered women shelters and boys the right to compete against girls in athletics.
This seat is Republican's best chance to defeat a Democrat in the next elections. Please help me flip this seat from blue to red:
[Donate $50](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/h4fShd7xhXf6z8w892xc9mKw/FD8uvNBsTtNFfnEI763bxQNA)
[Donate $250](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/9sn41HnAzQnChdFeFVJ5rQ/FD8uvNBsTtNFfnEI763bxQNA)
[Donate $500](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/9sn41HnAzQnChdFeFVJ5rQ/FD8uvNBsTtNFfnEI763bxQNA)
[Donate $1,000](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/9sn41HnAzQnChdFeFVJ5rQ/FD8uvNBsTtNFfnEI763bxQNA)
[Donate $3,300](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/9sn41HnAzQnChdFeFVJ5rQ/FD8uvNBsTtNFfnEI763bxQNA)
Please make a contribution today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/h4fShd7xhXf6z8w892xc9mKw/FD8uvNBsTtNFfnEI763bxQNA).
Our country can't afford to put our national security at risk to worship at the woke alter of the DEI agenda. And with your help, I will OUTLAW DEI programs in the federal government.
Respectfully,

Joe Kent
PS: The woke agenda is now in full control of our nation's military. Help me put an end to it by donating at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/h4fShd7xhXf6z8w892xc9mKw/FD8uvNBsTtNFfnEI763bxQNA).

Unsubscribe: https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/FD8uvNBsTtNFfnEI763bxQNA

name: Troy E. Nehls
subject: Who Embodies Your Vision for America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Let's honor our Presidents and celebrate the leaders of this great nation.
| | | Friend, Happy Presidents' Day!
As we reflect on the leaders of our nation, I want to take a moment to ask you an important question:
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/f7f6d5971169ab3b/447e6ffd09f51749c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

I know there have been many different administrations over the years, and each had its approach. Whether it was President Kennedy's infectious enthusiasm or President Reagan's commitment to national defense and small government, I’m sure you have had a President who most closely embodied your vision for America.
So, this Presidents' Day, let’s honor the commitment and dedication of those who served our nation before us and take a moment to reflect on what we want for our future.
Thank you for all you do to Make America Great Again!
-Troy E. Nehls

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz is a traitor who worked with Trump's coup plotters to overthrow our republic. Can you help us work to convince a top-tier Democratic candidate to run against him in 2024?
body:
A very dangerous Senator
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35583144-a4c2-4221-8450-fdc548dfed2d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Ted Cruz is one of the most despicable, heartless people to ever serve in the Senate. Of this, I have no doubt.** _When his constituents' kids were murdered while in school at Uvalde, he ignored guns and, in a slap in the face to victims and survivors, said we must strengthen "doors." When his constituents were freezing to death because of corrupt Republican deals, he responded by going to a luxury resort in Cancun. _ From the NY Times: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te08e833f-1f56-48a7-aed9-4edcf649e8e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the TX-Senate Democratic Nominee Fund, to convince a top-tier Dem to challenge Cruz and have a large campaign fund waiting for them when they do?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8205ea4d-b327-45e0-acf5-0ffe60dfaf6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Worst of all, Cruz is a traitor who worked with Trump's coup plotters to overthrow our republic. He voted to reject Biden's victory for no reason but to demagogue, even after the deadly attack on our Capitol Jan. 6th, which he helped instigate with a lie-filled diatribe that morning._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T361e4ac2-2e5e-41aa-91f5-978cd260ba95/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_In 2018, Cruz came the closest of any Republican to losing a Senate race in Texas since the 1990s, only holding off Beto O'Rourke by 2.5%. He's so hated, he inspires Democrats to vote against him, repels Independents & convinces Republicans to be Democrats for a day._** **_We absolutely can beat him in '24, and with so many Democratic races on the ballot, to hold the Senate, WE MUST._** [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the TX-Senate Democratic Nominee Fund, to convince a top-tier Dem to challenge Cruz and have a large campaign fund waiting for them when they do?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted615af8-a227-49f1-bf56-dbeee5895a75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for taking on one of the most dangerous elected officials in America._ Cliff
---

---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3320347-3c35-4fab-9e2a-1e432531d742/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80dd59ce-c1a3-4d49-a1d6-d9cb9de8f47d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Team Maggie
subject: note on the debt in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
With the GOP in control of the House and pundits already saying 2024 will be tough for Dems, we need to put this to bed ASAP.
| | |
---
Hi – the 2022 elections may feel like they’re in the rear view mirror but in order to win, our campaign took on a bit of debt.
Polls were _incredibly_ tight and taking on debt was the right thing to do. But now our fundraising has slowed waaaaay down relative to what we saw around the election, and we’ve still got some pretty big bills to pay off.
With the GOP in control of the House and pundits already saying 2024 will be tough for Dems, we need to put this to bed ASAP. You’re a top supporter, so we felt like we could ask you:
**[Will you please donate $3 or more to help us pay off this debt? We’ve got to raise about $3k today to keep up with our payment schedule and your contribution would be a huge help in getting us there.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58978538/392862838/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2209-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTZiY2U4My0zNWIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrlki8b8-Jgt4XCGEK2JNmAdxEwsC2UzWTmsV4WYvBI=)**

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Happy Presidents Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]Friends –
Today is Presidents Day, where we celebrate the life and legacy of George Washington, Abraham Lincoln, and the American presidents that have come after them.
As we observe this day, I want to express my gratitude for the opportunity to work alongside President Biden and contribute to our shared vision for the country's future. I also want to take a moment to acknowledge another president who has influenced my own path - Barack Obama.
Working as an Obama staffer, I saw firsthand the dedication and tireless work that goes into shaping policy and making progress for the American people. It was an honor to be a part of that team, and the experience continues to inspire my work today.
So on this Presidents Day, I encourage you to take a moment to reflect on the leadership and legacy of all the presidents who have served our country. And let us continue to work together to build a better future for all Americans.
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Be well, and Happy Presidents Day!
Wiley Nickel

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m up for re-election and need your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
I’m up for re-election in 2024, friend, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(__There's already a Republican vying for the GOP nomination.)_
NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than last year’s Senate race in Ohio – and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.
**[Frankly, it’s going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and American Bridge PAC as we begin the new year?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58979944/392868018/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2268-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMTc1NjUyLTM4YjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=slKdp0DcbwHwq6lRa_k3NOJVK27mq9W4f2WQPIPBgXE=)**
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.
I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.
Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.
That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about, friend. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do – whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips – your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.
[**I need you in this fight, too friend. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in $15 – or whatever amount makes the most sense for you – to my campaign and American Bridge PAC.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58979945/392868019/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2268-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMTc1NjUyLTM4YjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=slKdp0DcbwHwq6lRa_k3NOJVK27mq9W4f2WQPIPBgXE=)

clean_body: | | | I’m up for re-election in 2024, friend, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. (There's already a Republican vying for the GOP nomination.) NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than last year’s Senate race in Ohio – and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent. = I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families. I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do. Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by. That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about, friend. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do – whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips – your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. subject: What president created 2 financial disasters?
body:
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gRKHGDjk0IfaU6Vedu8hMUtUSFAIqujXN6CqkmXL49HMmBTHFnvOGDalVQ1oPprSKWAgGADjyBGg7nqNWjYI0hC2zVA0jBbt5nqMRGly_ouizftRm7CUk8KBAUkUFqjTWauTZhC9HDgzpAXoclZTSutWiKcC3nJtZPZItfZkQzpFMjaG3VudXPDVGGJFJviwOFOR3c0Fn5xky6js-u3m2W3Y5mCPK9iZQy_r7MZDFe1zATA5u-VxWcKexF3fbh_xqH4-Y_Uu7_A4j_CSezpW-mf-idTXvyfavv4COudfAA)

Hello Friend,

Have you ever wondered who the worst president of America was? There are enough to choose from, but it's not Biden, Trump, Obama, or Bush.

**No, the worst President in the history of the United States is Woodrow Wilson.**

Woodrow Wilson is responsible for two great financial disasters: the 16th Amendment, which established the Federal Income Tax, and the Federal Reserve Act.

Both of these laws allowed the Federal government to accumulate an unsustainable level of debt and a deficit spending cycle that has seen the national debt skyrocket to nearly $32 TRILLION.

Let me introduce myself to you. My name is Zilvinas Silenas, and I am President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE is an educational foundation trusted by parents and teachers since 1946 to captivate and inspire tomorrow's leaders with sound economic principles.

We've set a goal to reach 65,000 students in the classroom this year and millions more through our online content. We want to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the ideas of free markets and liberty.

To help meet our goal, I need to connect with 100 new supporters by the end of the week, Friend.

[_**Will you help undo the economic damage President Wilson created in 1913 by donating $19.13 or any amount today? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9kEFrxCAQhX-NuUV0NCY5eGi7bE-FXnbvro4baRKDMZT019eEUhhmmDePx8eg5qpVPWdMycppCYZ7WwUNDAQDYFxxBUC73ijTSAWNRdXKB5EMJxNG6hNiHsL8hcmVfac2TtWgeS-47blsHtI9TAud4mg8gELpvehkNeoh52Ul4oXAtdSKdktIzYwu5iOkaD5uszM5xLn2MdVo4xynYGt0mz3lw5MdEVczFWsm4sJ7ykWVtFu-wziGVbWF9HmSHmBmWsbgd03aVwIwBLeWcTLAlsXd3G4faa9_PlP93tzheRzhrfS8L_jv_Auh5wMOtb38AnnLY7M)

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

This program uniquely challenges school students to think outside of the box to challenge the mainstream narrative.

Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

After the workshops, we provide them with take-home materials, including:

* _I, Pencil_ by Leonard E. Read, FEE's Founder
* _Economics in One Lesson_ by Henry Hazlitt
* _The Law_ by Frederick Bastiat
* And the US Constitution.

Fee in the Classroom makes the ideas of liberty more familiar, credible, and compelling to students. Your generous support allows us to reach more students.

[_**Donate $19.13 and inspire the next generation to choose economic freedom >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9kEFrxCAQhX-NuUV0NCY5eGi7bE-FXnbvro4baRKDMZT019eEUhhmmDePx8eg5qpVPWdMycppCYZ7WwUNDAQDYFxxBUC73ijTSAWNRdXKB5EMJxNG6hNiHsL8hcmVfac2TtWgeS-47blsHtI9TAud4mg8gELpvehkNeoh52Ul4oXAtdSKdktIzYwu5iOkaD5uszM5xLn2MdVo4xynYGt0mz3lw5MdEVczFWsm4sJ7ykWVtFu-wziGVbWF9HmSHmBmWsbgd03aVwIwBLeWcTLAlsXd3G4faa9_PlP93tzheRzhrfS8L_jv_Auh5wMOtb38AnnLY7M)

Every day, thousands of Gen Z go to FEE's website and social media accounts to view our online content.

These additional resources allow students to continue their liberty journey and remain engaged with FEE on their preferred platform.

_We 've already reached a record amount of over 83 MILLION Gen Z online by_:
* Breaking the world record for the largest online economics lecture.
* Making 95 mainstream media appearances.
* Receiving over 11 MILLION views and over 1.8 MILLION shares on our videos.
* Reaching over 2 MILLION in just seven months on TikTok!

**We are teaching real economic history and showing students how awful economic policies are robbing these students of their future. **

Can you help me reach my goal of connecting with 100 new supporters? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9j0FrhDAQhX9NvCnJJMb1kEPbZXsq9LJ7H5NxDVUjMVLsr2-UUhhmmDePxzdkhG50KzjXqnBGAYreFt4AB8kBuNBCA1SXFjXWSkNtSTeqY4rThH6s-kiUBj9_UXR53ysbpmIwGhoUnap1Bw5RgwTUyjreXci2VqpiNENKy8rkC4NbrpXsFqnCmVxIR0jW-rDNDpMPc9mHWJINc5i8Lclt9pQPT3JM3nDK1sTkVfAiGrd8-3H0q24y5vPEPKhwWkbf74Y1rwxg8G7N4wSALckH3u8fcS9_PmP5Xj_geRzhLfe0L_Tv_Aupzu8Ptbn-ArRtY2U)

clean_body: Hello Friend, Have you ever wondered who the worst president of America was? There are enough to choose from, but it's not Biden, Trump, Obama, or Bush. No, the worst President in the history of the United States is Woodrow Wilson. Woodrow Wilson is responsible for two great financial disasters: the 16th Amendment, which established the Federal Income Tax, and the Federal Reserve Act. Both of these laws allowed the Federal government to accumulate an unsustainable level of debt and a deficit spending cycle that has seen the national debt skyrocket to nearly $32 TRILLION. Let me introduce myself to you. My name is Zilvinas Silenas, and I am President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE is an educational foundation trusted by parents and teachers since 1946 to captivate and inspire tomorrow's leaders with sound economic principles. We've set a goal to reach 65,000 students in the classroom this year and millions more through our online content. We want to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the ideas of free markets and liberty. To help meet our goal, I need to connect with 100 new supporters by the end of the week, Friend. FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. This program uniquely challenges school students to think outside of the box to challenge the mainstream narrative. Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation. After the workshops, we provide them with take-home materials, including: I, Pencil by Leonard E. Read, FEE's Founder Economics in One Lesson by Henry Hazlitt The Law by Frederick Bastiat And the US Constitution. Fee in the Classroom makes the ideas of liberty more familiar, credible, and compelling to students. Your generous support allows us to reach more students. Every day, thousands of Gen Z go to FEE's website and social media accounts to view our online content. These additional resources allow students to continue their liberty journey and remain engaged with FEE on their preferred platform. We 've already reached a record amount of over 83 MILLION Gen Z online by: Breaking the world record for the largest online economics lecture. Making 95 mainstream media appearances. Receiving over 11 MILLION views and over 1.8 MILLION shares on our videos. Reaching over 2 MILLION in just seven months on TikTok! We are teaching real economic history and showing students how awful economic policies are robbing these students of their future. Can you help me reach my goal of connecting with 100 new supporters? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Zilvinas Silenas President Foundation for Economic Education FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law.

_***Original message below***_
* * *
**We should not have to fear weapons of war being used in schools, shopping centers, dance studios, theaters, churches, or other public spaces.**

But for years, too many gutless politicians have carried water for the gun lobby. And the American people have suffered from mass shooting after mass shooting.

In the early weeks of 2023, we've already seen a sharp rise in mass shootings — many of which involved assault weapons. **This has to stop.**

At last week's State of the Union address, President Biden renewed his call for an assault weapons ban. **Jennifer stands with him — and she wants to show pro-NRA members in Congress that opposing an assault weapons ban is a completely unpopular and untenable position.**

[**Please add your name now to help us ban assault weapons. We need at least 7,500 signatures by the end of this weekend.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58980729/392870309/-195178123?ms=EM_PET_230219AWB_N_UP_FULL_12_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230219AWB_N_UP_FULL_12_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjlmMjRkYi0zOWIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ikGi_ZulZsTOPNFUEIYsa9odFKbknpg5GLwbUQ5GaTU=&emci=3cd3880e-88b0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=bf9f24db-39b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)
[Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58980730/392870310/-195178123?ms=EM_PET_230219AWB_N_UP_FULL_12_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230219AWB_N_UP_FULL_12_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjlmMjRkYi0zOWIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ikGi_ZulZsTOPNFUEIYsa9odFKbknpg5GLwbUQ5GaTU=&emci=3cd3880e-88b0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=bf9f24db-39b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)
**We're long past the point of taking "no" for an answer from pro-NRA politicians. Every day we fail to act, more lives are at stake.**

Jennifer's successfully taken on the gun lobby in each one of her elections — in a district that neighbors the NRA's headquarters. She co-sponsored an assault weapons ban in her first weeks as a Congresswoman, and she's fully committed to making President Biden's latest call to action become a reality in the form of signed legislation.

Jennifer won't back down in this fight, but she needs all of our voices behind her. That's why we need as many signatures as possible on our petition.

[**It's time we stopped the bloodshed. Please add your name today to support an assault weapons ban →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58980731/392870311/-195178123?ms=EM_PET_230219AWB_N_UP_FULL_12_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230219AWB_N_UP_FULL_12_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjlmMjRkYi0zOWIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ikGi_ZulZsTOPNFUEIYsa9odFKbknpg5GLwbUQ5GaTU=&emci=3cd3880e-88b0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=bf9f24db-39b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Peter, I can’t believe it’s been over two years since my 100-day election legal battle where corrupt Democrat lawyers tried to hand the 2020 election to my opponent. That was an eye-opening experience for me – **it highlighted just how vulnerable the integrity and security of our elections are**. It’s the reason why I launched the Election Integrity Caucus to defend the sanctity of elections and prevent that same shadiness from happening again.
---

| The Gold Dome Download Monday, February 20, 2023
Happy Presidents' Day! This week marks the halfway point of the 2023 Georgia Legislative Session. Although the legislature is out today, they'll be back tomorrow for Legislative Day 21. Crossover Day - the day a bill must be passed out of at least one chamber - is two weeks from today, on March 6th.
As the clock continues ticking down, we're tracking legislation and giving you the rundown on all the news under the Gold Dome.
---
| |
---
| LATEST LEGISLATION
---
| Below you will find summaries of the top bills introduced in the legislature last week. Read the full bills by clicking the links below.
SENATE BILL 88 About: Education, relating to regulating conversations about sex and gender in schools Sponsors: Senators Summers, Moore, Beach, and others. To read the bill, [CLICK HERE.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_zbzeZEef-QuYlTY2CAxP0Ti663hplD829rdYaBnhnlDGHmho6lPcfR5SrT01Ok5uxjUW6mt8Djk_ezhxS3ukoc2aexGrW3mZgvrYGRzjCcQhufNevTdbYsNGsNuBmHGoIHYFgLRjOxU4gyVsJQsOspTMGy4km1LFxPZ9X4RNJZgve3n5zIN_r3guUTvZCl4a3t5w5vsAbV0PnjFmda17Q==&c=H94F7CHRvc01A9BFrQegRqQ_TXExOAF-BbQ9igT9t3oKxkqjq-_fyg==&ch=eSFQqghInq0yloc7cL5IWhXPLn5Jqe_dqnhaiWCbsDGdrw72CdLVLA==)
SENATE BILL 180 About: Religious liberty, relating to enhancing protections Sponsors: Senators Setzler, Brass, Anavitarte, and others. ### President Pro Tempore
### Sen. John F. Kennedy

Senator John F. Kennedy is the President Pro Tempore. His role as Pro Tempore is to preside over the Senate when the Lieutenant Governor is not present. Senator Kennedy has served the people of Crawford, Monroe, Peach, Upson, Bibb, and Houston counties since he was elected to the Senate in 2014.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_zbzeZEef-QuYlTY2CAxP0Ti663hplD829rdYaBnhnlDGHmho6lPcfR5SrT01Ok5g7EHF8oDWSSkWVkSxDF9QpaKNIfyLiwsOqkw5H1eWK25uUE61yw2sIFEwel1ytUch-nDHIdc0yz5fbUGJ60_l75ELOdeiNLP&c=H94F7CHRvc01A9BFrQegRqQ_TXExOAF-BbQ9igT9t3oKxkqjq-_fyg==&ch=eSFQqghInq0yloc7cL5IWhXPLn5Jqe_dqnhaiWCbsDGdrw72CdLVLA==) to visit the Senate website.

### Speaker Pro- Tempore
### Rep. Jan Jones

Representative Jan Jones serves as Speaker Pro-Tempore, the second highest-ranking member in the Georgia House of Representatives. In the absence of the Speaker, Representative Jones presides over the House. Rep. Jones has been a member since 2002 and Speaker Pro-Tempore since 2010. Following the death of Speaker Ralston, Rep. Jones briefly filled the position of Speaker of the House, making her the first woman to hold that position in the State of Georgia. In the 2023 legislative session, her colleagues re-elected her to the role of Speaker Pro-Tempore. Rep. Jones represents areas in parts of Fulton and Cherokee counties.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_zbzeZEef-QuYlTY2CAxP0Ti663hplD829rdYaBnhnlDGHmho6lPcfR5SrT01Ok5BOwOlxvVXzHy-SbF4Y-boEe02f9X_JxJ7J7o7YOeH34xdDvZme1e6EBG6XIzY86mSfWpxekl-VwjaXDHs5L5hQ==&c=H94F7CHRvc01A9BFrQegRqQ_TXExOAF-BbQ9igT9t3oKxkqjq-_fyg==&ch=eSFQqghInq0yloc7cL5IWhXPLn5Jqe_dqnhaiWCbsDGdrw72CdLVLA==) to visit the House website.

FIGHTING ZUCKERBUCKS: Greater Georgia has been hard at work continuing our efforts to defend election integrity. This month, we called for an investigation into the DeKalb County Board of Elections for accepting $2 million from the U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence, a group backed by the Center for Civic and Tech Life (CTCL). In 2020, Mark Zuckerberg funneled $45 million into Georgia though CTCL - funding local election boards in predominantly blue counties. These so-called "Zuckerbucks" became illegal in Georgia with the passage of SB 202 in 2021.
The bottom line is that local boards of election should not be funded by outside money or special interests. It's why we're working to hold DeKalb County accountable - and to ensure that no county in Georgia is influenced by partisan slush funds. [CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_zbzeZEef-QuYlTY2CAxP0Ti663hplD829rdYaBnhnlDGHmho6lPcfR5SrT01Ok5qk0iKQXlIiZpoFmSI95sZmb4sEO75hQGIIY-SYQjDiMVMBXsWqCPh4GtMBpaRfuXNi20mKpdZplIfSroDQNeXbHQuT_Z1HVA_tHv9E7GV0Yn5OBSQ4eH2cO9W1-sFtwq3SDdxUH7gPzM6awY41LfIw-FGikGk79nQ3k9FeHCXIXoLcNOYWknxn29bMIx-m5rDckrYlq-iLA=&c=H94F7CHRvc01A9BFrQegRqQ_TXExOAF-BbQ9igT9t3oKxkqjq-_fyg==&ch=eSFQqghInq0yloc7cL5IWhXPLn5Jqe_dqnhaiWCbsDGdrw72CdLVLA==) to learn more and read our full press release.

| WASHINGTON WOES Earlier this month, a train carrying vinyl chloride and butyl acrylate - two extremely toxic chemicals - derailed and crashed in East Palestine, Ohio. Residents who were exposed could experience long-term effects. As of today, United States Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg has yet to visit Ohio.
Our thoughts and prayers are with Ohio, now and in the future, as they navigate this tragedy that will forever change this community.

clean_body: | | | | == | | | The Gold Dome Download Monday, February 20, 2023 Happy Presidents' Day! This week marks the halfway point of the 2023 Georgia Legislative Session. Although the legislature is out today, they'll be back tomorrow for Legislative Day 21. Crossover Day - the day a bill must be passed out of at least one chamber - is two weeks from today, on March 6th. As the clock continues ticking down, we're tracking legislation and giving you the rundown on all the news under the Gold Dome. | | | LATEST LEGISLATION | Below you will find summaries of the top bills introduced in the legislature last week. Read the full bills by clicking the links below. SENATE BILL 88 About: Education, relating to regulating conversations about sex and gender in schools Sponsors: Senators Summers, Moore, Beach, and others. To read the bill, == SENATE BILL 180 About: Religious liberty, relating to enhancing protections Sponsors: Senators Setzler, Brass, Anavitarte, and others. To read the bill, ==. SENATE BILL 189 About: Election integrity, relating to eliminating ballot barcodes Sponsors: Senators Burns, Dolezal, Brass, and others. To read the bill, ==. HOUSE BILL 380 About: Sports betting, relating to legalization Sponsors: Representatives Wiedower, Martin, Evans, and others. To read the bill, ==. OTHER BILLS TO WATCH Below you will find summaries of other bills to watch as they progress through the legislative process. Read the full bills by clicking the links below. SENATE BILL 44 About: Public safety, relating to prosecution of gang-related activities Sponsors: Senators Hatchett, Kennedy, Gooch, and others. To read the bill, == SENATE BILL 69 About: State property, relating to building a statue of Justice Clarence Thomas Sponsors: Senators Watson, Anavitarte, Kennedy, and others. To read the bill, == SENATE BILL 92 About: Technology, relating to banning foreign-owned technology on state devices Sponsors: Senators Anavitarte, Kennedy, Gooch, and others. To read the bill, == SENATE BILL 141 About: Health care, relating to regulating minors receiving gender-altering procedures Sponsors: Senators Dixon, Gooch, Harbin, and others. To read the bill, == HOUSE BILL 17 About: Elections, relating to ballot custody Sponsors: Representatives Powell, Leverett, DeLoach, and others. To read the bill, == HOUSE BILL 54 About: Education, relating to increasing the income tax credit for school choice Sponsors: Representatives Carson, Hilton, Reeves, and others. To read the bill, == HOUSE BILL 162 About: Economy, relating to distributing refunds to Georgia taxpayers Sponsors: Representatives McDonald, Blackmon, Gilliard, and others. To read the bill, == HOUSE BILL 200 About: Elections, related to instant runoffs Sponsors: Representatives Gullett, Evans, Pirkle, and others. To read the bill, == HOUSE BILLS 229 AND 231 About: Public safety, relating to holding DAs accountable Sponsors: Representatives Gaines and Gullett. To read the bills, CLICK == | | | KNOW YOUR STATE SENATE & HOUSE LEADERS | | | | President Pro Tempore Sen. John F. Kennedy Senator John F. Kennedy is the President Pro Tempore. His role as Pro Tempore is to preside over the Senate when the Lieutenant Governor is not present. Senator Kennedy has served the people of Crawford, Monroe, Peach, Upson, Bibb, and Houston counties since he was elected to the Senate in 2014. Click == to visit the Senate website. | | | | Speaker Pro- Tempore Rep. Jan Jones Representative Jan Jones serves as Speaker Pro-Tempore, the second highest-ranking member in the Georgia House of Representatives. In the absence of the Speaker, Representative Jones presides over the House. Rep. Jones has been a member since 2002 and Speaker Pro-Tempore since 2010. Following the death of Speaker Ralston, Rep. Jones briefly filled the position of Speaker of the House, making her the first woman to hold that position in the State of Georgia. In the 2023 legislative session, her colleagues re-elected her to the role of Speaker Pro-Tempore. Rep. Jones represents areas in parts of Fulton and Cherokee counties. Click == to visit the House website. | | | LATEST FROM GREATER GEORGIA SENATE RESOLUTION 65: A few weeks ago, the Georgia State Senate recognized the work of Greater Georgia and our Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler through ==. Click == or the video below to hear Chairwoman Loeffler's speech! | == FIGHTING ZUCKERBUCKS: Greater Georgia has been hard at work continuing our efforts to defend election integrity. This month, we called for an investigation into the DeKalb County Board of Elections for accepting $2 million from the U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence, a group backed by the Center for Civic and Tech Life (CTCL). In 2020, Mark Zuckerberg funneled $45 million into Georgia though CTCL - funding local election boards in predominantly blue counties. These so-called "Zuckerbucks" became illegal in Georgia with the passage of SB 202 in 2021. The bottom line is that local boards of election should not be funded by outside money or special interests. It's why we're working to hold DeKalb County accountable - and to ensure that no county in Georgia is influenced by partisan slush funds. == to learn more and read our full press release. | == | | | WASHINGTON WOES Earlier this month, a train carrying vinyl chloride and butyl acrylate - two extremely toxic chemicals - derailed and crashed in East Palestine, Ohio. Residents who were exposed could experience long-term effects. As of today, United States Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg has yet to visit Ohio. Our thoughts and prayers are with Ohio, now and in the future, as they navigate this tragedy that will forever change this community. To read more about the train derailment, click ==. To read about the people of Ohio's pleas to DC and Sec. Buttigieg, click ==. | | | FOLLOW THE PROCESS Stay up to date on all things under the Gold Dome including committee hearings, track legislation, and more by visiting, ==. You can also follow == and == on Twitter to get legislative updates in real time. Finally, you can search for and contact your state legislators by clicking ==. | | | WHAT WE'RE READING | == - Lt. governor blasts media coverage of Georgia's election law after poll says 99% midterm voters had no issues == - Biden Eleventh Circuit Pick Advances Out of Senate Judiciary (1) == - College Board admits to 'mistakes' in rollout of AP African American Studies == - United States Urges Citizens To Leave Russia Immediately == - Skills Beat Degrees for Government Jobs == - Harris on China balloon episode: I don't think it impacts our relations == - DeKalb County attorney defends elections grant after Kelly Loeffler calls for investigation == - Georgia sets international trade record for second straight year | | GET INVOLVED Greater Georgia's work is critical to defending conservative values, and it is only possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. name: Victor Riches
subject: "School employee secretly encouraged my daughter to change her gender and hide it from me."
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343453:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343453:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)

Peter,

Last December, Maine mom Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter's room when she found a chest binder -- an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Amber was alarmed and immediately began to investigate. She was shocked to discover that a school social worker, who had been seeing Amber's daughter since October, gave the child the chest binder and secretly advised her about gender transitioning.

**The social worker told Amber 's daughter the school wouldn't inform her parents about any of it and that she shouldn't do so either.**

**This was all in violation of the Constitution and Amber 's parental rights. **

Now the Goldwater Institute is stepping in to hold the school accountable.

My name is Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's leading liberty organization. We provide pro-bono legal support for parents like Amber Lavigne.

I've set a goal to connect with 500 new donors to fund our American Freedom Network, which provides pro-bono legal support to protect parental rights and stop schools from indoctrinating children.

[_**Will you help us protect the rights of parents by sending a gift today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343453:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343453:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)

Amber contacted school officials, only to have the administrators defend the counselor's actions. She also found out that school personnel had already been referring to Amber's daughter with a different name and different pronouns.

_**" This is unacceptable: a school employee secretly encouraged my daughter to change her gender and hide it from me. The school never stopped trying to keep me in the dark at every turn, repeatedly stonewalling me when I tried to find out what was going on. My parental rights aren't up for debate: I deserve to know what's happening to my child in school."**_
-- Amber Lavigne

Now, we're demanding the school board investigate the counselor's actions and forcing them to accept parental rights as defined by law. The school's actions toward Amber and her daughter aren't just wrong -- _they 're unconstitutional_.

Parents have a fundamental right to control and direct their children's education, upbringing, and healthcare decisions. The Goldwater Institute is leading the effort to protect parental rights in courts and force schools to stop this radical trend in gender ideology.

[_**You can help the Goldwater Institute support the rights of parents today with a gift. Please help me recruit 500 new donors to the Goldwater Institute this month. Select any amount below to rush your support.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343453:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)

[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343454:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343455:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343456:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343457:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343458:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343459:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343453:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)

**No other organization has done more to defend parental rights than the Goldwater Institute:**
* We helped concerned parents get the answers they deserved after school districts charged them thousands of dollars just to find out what was being taught in their kids' schools.

* We're actively dismantling the power of teacher unions by leading the nation in passing school choice legislation so that kids can receive the education that best fits their needs.

* We're defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and woke nonsense in the classroom.

* We created the blueprint for conservatives to tie education funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to radical administrators and school boards.

* We've transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country and brought school choice legislation to 22 other states.

As schools try to ramp up woke indoctrination like CRT and gender ideology, _the rights of parents are more important than ever_.

[_**Your generous support makes a huge difference in our fight for parents ' rights. Please consider donating today. >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343453:JxVrzWGND:m:1:3331421248:E2F6F25CF2F840BC365EC448280DF29B:r)

Thank you,

Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

I was just going over our monthly budget numbers with Greg, and I had to give him bad news: With just a few days left in the month, we’re behind where we should be. With February being a short month, the timing could not be worse.= | = The money we raise now will lay the foundation for our 2024 campaign. body:

| |

| | | ** SPECIAL ELECTION TOMORROW

Briefing Materials for _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvmeb67p88ev20c80dboj3vpvtmbnoqh8288bff0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69pb4chh2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_**

---
|
Hello -

In less than 24 hours from right now, voters will fill the last remaining vacancy in the U.S. House of Representatives.

That means Democrats will either chip away at our narrow House Majority, or Republicans will win a race no DC pundit thinks we can. The odds are stacked against us and the pressure is on!

_BUT...we 're not throwing in the towel. Are you? _

_**[Everyone is watching the results of this FIRST Special Election so we need a strong showing right here and right now. BEFORE POLLS CLOSE TOMORROW: we urgently need 10,000 Patriots to dig deep and help elect Republicans up and down the ballot in key races like this one.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9c2oatjep174hd8vbnf2dtb0esbkgfss5mi5uc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69pb4chh2bs "Everyone is watching the results of this FIRST Special Election so we need a strong showing right here and right now. body:
This offer ends today

|
---
| | |

---

**YOUR REPUBLICAN MEMBERSHIP HAS BEEN SUSPENDED**

---

Friend,

name: Chairman Kyle Hupfer and the Indiana Republican Party
subject: Saluting our nation’s presidents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Let us pay tribute to their courage, devotion, and service.
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/7efb49b7682d3b9b/943c92556e6e8c7ac3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Happy Presidents Day, Hoosier Republican!

Today, we recognize and pay tribute to the courage, devotion, and service of the great men that have led our country through its storied history. These patriots helped build our nation, guided it through tragedy and triumph, and showcased the principles that continue to motivate us to this day. [Have a favorite president? Let us know who >>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/7efb49b7682d3b9b/2d1a4e9f467a5868c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
[**Who is your favorite president?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/7efb49b7682d3b9b/487b7179493abbd6c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
We’re proud of the work every day to carry on the legacy of Republican leaders at every level of government, including Republican presidents like Lincoln, Eisenhower, Reagan, and so many more, as we advance our strong conservative agenda.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/7efb49b7682d3b9b/46bd105dd1c12ffec3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
So please, show your support for the Indiana Republican Party and our work and help us lead the charge for our Hoosier future by [making a contribution today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/7efb49b7682d3b9b/1cac1ac7135b53aac3d6b838967d376c/40313). We’re grateful to have you on board! — Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Indiana Republican Party

**P.S.** Did you know Indiana has numerous direct ties to the White House, the building and those who have occupied it? Presidents William Henry Harrison and Benjamin Harrison — and Abraham Lincoln too.
---

name: The Gun People
subject: [4600%] Better Than Turmeric
body:
What makes turmeric so effective isn't really a mystery, of course...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11630/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/c3da0f02ad94de0289dcdfb8ff088808999a5260). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11630/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/c3da0f02ad94de0289dcdfb8ff088808999a5260?message_id=IjllN2U4MzAwLTkzOTctMDEzYi0yMjMyLTQyMDEwYTgwMDAwOUB0aGVndW5wZW9wbGUuY29tIg==).
---
| |
---
---
|
---
_Please see the message below from our friends at BioTrust Nutrition. They have very important information to share with you today._
_______ Hi, Dr. Matthew Roberson, M.D., BioTrust Chief Medical Advisor at BioTRUST Nutrition with some very exciting news! You likely already know that many health experts now agree that supplementing with turmeric is as crucial as it gets to providing revitalizing support for how you look and feel. [After all, ancient cultures such as India and China long revered its long list of anti-aging, health and longevity benefits.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11630/6374453/00c43a50923a4bed1c4f7a354cb19a26f2e19e0d/c3da0f02ad94de0289dcdfb8ff088808999a5260) And here in modern times, over **3,000 peer-reviewed scientific articles** have confirmed just how effective turmeric really is! What makes turmeric so effective isn't really a mystery, of course... It's the rare golden-colored compound found in the turmeric root called “curcumin,” which provides double-edged antioxidant support and helps promote a healthy inflammatory response, in turn providing very powerful support for... **Young-looking skin
**Peak energy
**Healthy, flexible joints
**A clear and focused brain
**Healthy stress management **Healthy mood
**Healthy mood **Healthy eyes
**A healthy immune system **Here's the BIG PROBLEM though...** So many of the turmeric/curcumin supplements in stores and online potentially provide _very_ little benefit to your body, if any at all. Yes, this is even true of the so-called “gold standard” turmeric + black pepper preparations. Because the big issue research has revealed is that the curcumin found in most supplements today has _extremely_ poor “absorbability” in your body. According to research published in the _Nutrition Journal_ , "The potential health benefits of curcumin are limited by its poor solubility, low absorption from the gut, rapid metabolism and rapid systemic elimination." In fact, **it could take FORTY 250mg capsules** of today's standard curcumin to powerfully support the health and anti-aging benefits I note above! Furthermore, independent research has also revealed that many turmeric/curcumin preparations contain the solvent called EDC found in modern manufacturing processes that can be **highly toxic**! [**However, there's actually REALLY good news** ...](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11630/6374453/00c43a50923a4bed1c4f7a354cb19a26f2e19e0d/c3da0f02ad94de0289dcdfb8ff088808999a5260) Research shows that you can increase the body’s absorption of curcumin by up to 46 TIMES. That means in terms of your skin, energy, moods, joints, and immune system you really can provide revitalizing support for the way you look and feel and enjoy the FULL benefits of curcumin! **HOWEVER -- and this is crucial -- this is only valid IF you consume**** _the right type_****of turmeric/curcumin...** So, what is that right type? Well, there’s a recently-discovered natural enhancement technology that has been shown to:
1. Dramatically enhance curcumin absorption in the body
2. Keep levels of curcumin elevated in the body longer

It’s called the “UltraSOL Nutrient Delivery System,” and YES, this turmeric supercharger can lead to **far better absorption AND longer-lasting curcumin action**.
This is a patented technology that combines a pristine turmeric extract with natural antioxidants in a water-soluble carrier. You see, powders like turmeric extracts typically “clump” when they’re combined with liquids, especially water. (And as you likely know, your body is 60% water.) This “clumping” reduces functionality and reduces your ability to tap into all the amazing benefits of turmeric. UltraSOL was specifically geared to address this problem -- and more importantly, the difficult absorption with curcumin -- by actually increasing the dispersability of curcuminoids (which also tend to form aggregates when dried) allowing for enhanced bioavailability. **So, what does this mean in clear terms?** The UltraSOL curcumin enhancement system helps address the big absorption problem by GREATLY increasing solubility – which, therefore, preserves curcumin’s actions in the body. And that means FAR greater absorption than many other curcumin formulations... and that in turn means an open door to better results! Considering the dramatic difference that the UltraSOL Nutrient Delivery System makes in bioavailability, it’s only fitting that the breakthrough formulation featuring this system is called “CurcuWIN®.” **So, how****much of a difference in absorption with CurcuWIN****®****featuring the****UltraSOL Nutrient Delivery System****are we talking about here?** In a breakthrough study published in the _Nutrition Journal_ , an esteemed group of researchers found that curcumin with the UltraSOL Nutrient Delivery System blew other types of turmeric/curcumin out of the water! It resulted in **46 TIMES** greater absorption compared to standard curcumin... **35 TIMES** greater absorption than micronized curcuminoids combined with the essential oils of turmeric... And **6 TIMES** greater absorption than curcumin with phytosome technology. And what about curcumin + black pepper**,** often touted as the ideal combo to absorb this ancient herb? Well, another recent study showed that CurcuWIN is **6.8 TIMES****better absorbed than the curcumin/black pepper combo**. This same study noted above also revealed that CurcuWIN outshines liquid liposomal curcumin with 36% greater absorption in healthy human volunteers! In other words, **CurcuWIN****®****is winning the bioavailability battle** , and what that means to you is FAR better, longer lasting curcumin action. BUT WAIT... What about trying to get all the curcumin you need from food sources, such as the turmeric you find on spice shelves in stores or even fresh turmeric?
Well, first of all, you’d have to eat a LOT of it, like every single day. How much? Consider that dry turmeric powder is only about 3% curcumin by weight. That means to get a typical dose of 500mg of curcumin, you’d have to consume over 16 GRAMS of turmeric powder, which equates to about 4 teaspoons... I’m not sure if you’ve ever tried adding turmeric powder to recipes, but a little bit goes a LONG way.
And even then, these food sources of turmeric can have the SAME poor absorbability issues as the turmeric/curcumin in most supplements!

If you’re seeking a turmeric that allows your body optimal access curcumin’s powerful benefits, **the bottom line** is to make certain it lists CurcuWIN® on the label. So, before I get to the exciting news, let’s briefly review the **4 reasons so many turmeric/curcumin supplements today don’t cut it...**

1. **Poor solubility** : This means, in its typical state, turmeric does not mix well with fluids such as those inside the body.

name: Zilvinas Silenas
subject: What president created 2 financial disasters?
body:
Have you ever wondered who the worst president of America was?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjilqff8oo7eu9h8jl6ps5kjbvd6d2jtmrvtnqlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)

Hello Friend,

Have you ever wondered who the worst president of America was? There are enough to choose from, but it's not Biden, Trump, Obama, or Bush.

**No, the worst President in the history of the United States is Woodrow Wilson.**

Woodrow Wilson is responsible for two great financial disasters: the 16th Amendment, which established the Federal Income Tax, and the Federal Reserve Act.

Both of these laws allowed the Federal government to accumulate an unsustainable level of debt and a deficit spending cycle that has seen the national debt skyrocket to nearly $32 TRILLION.

Let me introduce myself to you. My name is Zilvinas Silenas, and I am President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE is an educational foundation trusted by parents and teachers since 1946 to captivate and inspire tomorrow's leaders with sound economic principles.

We've set a goal to reach 65,000 students in the classroom this year and millions more through our online content. We want to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the ideas of free markets and liberty.

To help meet our goal, I need to connect with 100 new supporters by the end of the week, Friend.

[_**Will you help undo the economic damage President Wilson created in 1913 by donating $19.13 or any amount today? Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0ut09l2l5s5ts9nsjo1qto678bu7spr3cmf2flg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

This program uniquely challenges school students to think outside of the box to challenge the mainstream narrative.

Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

After the workshops, we provide them with take-home materials, including:

* _I, Pencil_ by Leonard E. Read, FEE's Founder
* _Economics in One Lesson_ by Henry Hazlitt
* _The Law_ by Frederick Bastiat
* And the US Constitution.

Fee in the Classroom makes the ideas of liberty more familiar, credible, and compelling to students. Your generous support allows us to reach more students.

[_**Donate $19.13 and inspire the next generation to choose economic freedom >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4buuiub67d72nc1qo2rm610vdr56q51qiog5hd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)

Every day, thousands of Gen Z go to FEE's website and social media accounts to view our online content.

These additional resources allow students to continue their liberty journey and remain engaged with FEE on their preferred platform.

_We 've already reached a record amount of over 83 MILLION Gen Z online by_:
* Breaking the world record for the largest online economics lecture.
* Making 95 mainstream media appearances.
* Receiving over 11 MILLION views and over 1.8 MILLION shares on our videos.
* Reaching over 2 MILLION in just seven months on TikTok!

**We are teaching real economic history and showing students how awful economic policies are robbing these students of their future. **

Can you help me reach my goal of connecting with 100 new supporters? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1vl2bhnht9ggas1frf8vrgaj7pdn7qligl6rv30_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb9duhovlrd91cku0osad6tlpd45d2mpbnvjnub8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za7ennfbklm9b20ikfc55ilfsdt42jqbnbh8dtfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaptrit3ot2tltj96sk0okn7841pk22mf9urk5n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za32guhlc06pat7h4qebl5i4ldmektq553ieko1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z114fqmcikcbvtkk5jfb1t88eijbl7hdgif2oaao_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeboqcu6quupqaaej1edf95l0naaacq7tc3triro_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr0cpljbkb1tss8gvk09c4278gqglp6lmklc7a5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo1rcsk98m7t528kqdg1njdmlv1kihf25mou9evg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjh69oj6cph2bs)

Zilvinas Silenas

Rep. Jaypal [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8369?t=1018&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]set out a path under a divided Congress, including pushing
President Biden to use the power of the pen on housing, higher wages for
care workers, and more. He can also crack down on Big Pharma, the energy
sector, and employers withholding overtime pay, she said.

And, Jayapal believes we may be able to get bipartisan legislation on
issues like antitrust — key in the battle against corporate power.

Finally, she said it’s time to prepare for the next big takeover of
Congress in 2024, when we can grow our power at every level of government.

What races are you eyeing in 2024? We’ve already started a fund to
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8291?t=1019&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]defeat Sen. Kyrsten Sinema!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1020&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

Our Revolution members identified 5 top priorities for Biden to use the
power of the pen: climate action, economic/tax fairness, lower healthcare
costs, worker power/wages, and equal justice under the law.

These will be the focus as our Federal Action Team members organize with
partner groups and elected allies. There’s a path, so let’s get to work!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1021&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

Be part of the action and help our coalition push Congress and the White
House to deliver for all of us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8220?t=1022&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]JOIN THE FEDERAL ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1023&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

CHAIRMAN BERNIE & FEDERAL FIGHTS

Bernie Sanders is on a roll as the new Chairman of the Senate HELP
Committee. He’s taking on [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8370?t=1024&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]Big Pharma, calling out Moderna for raising
prices, and he’s calling Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz to testify on
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8371?t=1025&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]union-busting.

Bernie has a plan to expand Social Security against right wing pushes for
cuts, and he’s introducing legislation for $60k minimum pay for
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8372?t=1026&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]teachers!

On the House side, Rep. Pramila Jayapal is leading an [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8373?t=1027&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]opposition to
Medicare Advantage — an historic step in the fight against Medicare
privatization.

And, Rep. Ro Khanna is working to pass a Windfall Profits Tax on Big Oil —
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/ro_khanna_petition/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230217_PT_RoKhanna_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_RoKhanna&t=8&t=1028&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]SIGN PETITION HERE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1029&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]Become a monthly donor to support Our Revolution and our
inside-outside work with progressive partners in Congress!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1030&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

On Valentine’s Day, our coalition rallied to show love to servers and
organize for higher wages in NYC, Baltimore, Chicago and cities across the
country.

We're partnering with One Fair Wage and putting bills on the table to end
the subminimum wage in states around the country. Now, it’s time to
pressure elected officials to pass them, and we’re taking on the
restaurant lobby to do it.

Call your State Reps and tell them to end subminimum wages if you live in
the following states:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8374?t=1031&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]NEW YORK | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8375?t=1032&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]MARYLAND | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8376?t=1033&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]ILLINOIS

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1034&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

If you’re anywhere in the country, we can use your help to raise the wage
and end the subminimum wages in states across the country, and we’re
lobbying state lawmakers to pass them.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1035&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]JOIN THE TEAM
