[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1036&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

SENATORS JOIN OUR FIGHT vs. ‘OTHER NRA’

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8377?t=1037&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]Rolling Stone broke the news that Senators Bernie, Warren, Merkley,
and others joined our stand against the ‘Other NRA’ for taking $25M of
workers’ money to keep wages low.

“You owe workers an answer as to why you are secretly using their funds to
lobby against their interests,” the Senators wrote.

Thanks to NRA lobbying, the federal minimum wage has been stuck at
$7.25/hr for 14 years, and the federal tipped wage has remained $2.13/hr
since 1991!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8378?t=1038&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]WATCH BERNIE’S VIDEO ON OUR CAMPAIGN!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1039&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

Call your Reps and demand they reject dirty money from ‘Other NRA’. US
Reps. Ro Khanna and Greg Casar, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, and others have
already signed on!

When we told new House Speaker Hakeem Jeffries where the money came from,
he returned it, and we’re urging more elected officials to do the same.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1040&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]CALL YOUR REP!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8379?t=1041&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

NEXT LABOR SECRETARY?

Between Sean Patrick Maloney and California Labor Secretary Julie Su for
Secretary of Labor, OR Exec Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8379?t=1042&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]The Hill:

“Fighting for workers is in her DNA, and she has a track record of doing
it,” Joseph said of Su, adding that “Maloney is no friend of labor” and is
“aligned with the corporate wing of the Democratic Party.”

He also suggested former Rep. Andy Levin for the role. Levin was
reportedly considered before Marty Walsh was named in 2021.

“To me, the most significant data point is that union density is at an
all-time low,” Joseph said. “President Biden talks about support for
workers on strike, but at the end of the day, he as president hasn’t used
his power to add more workers to the ranks.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1043&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]These are the decisions that have reverberating impacts for workers
and our families. Join Our Revolution to grow our progressive voice and
stand with labor.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8380?t=1044&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

BUILDING LOCAL POWER IN ST. LOUIS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1045&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

St. Louis is an exciting place for progressive organizing right now — from
electing US Rep. Cori Bush in 2020 to Mayor Tishuara Jones and a
progressive majority on the Board of Aldermen in 2021.

Since new Board President Megan Green completed the progressive trifecta
in November, the city has passed a Basic Income trial, pushed for tenant’s
rights and much more!

Now, the whole St. Louis Board is up for grabs again in redrawn districts,
and Our Revolution has an amazing slate on the ballot to hold the
progressive majority — from re-electing Megan Green to candidates in 10
ward races.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8364?t=1046&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]PHONEBANK FOR OUR ST. LOUIS SLATE!

★ ★ ★

MEET ALISHA SONNIER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1047&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

One of those candidates progressive powerhouse Alilsha Sonnier who we are
proud to back for St. Louis Alderwoman in Ward 7!

Alisha's [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8381?t=1048&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]activism began with the murder of Michael Brown, and she's
worked with the Fight for $15, Pro Choice Missouri, as political director
for Megan Green’s campaign, and now on the St. Louis Board of Education.

“This story starts with the death of a black young man left in the street
for 4.5 hours less than a decade ago — to now some of the city’s highest
seats being held by the people aligned with a people-centered agenda,”
Alisha [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8367?t=1049&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]said Monday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1050&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

Alisha spoke on housing, healthcare, education, and ending cash bail: “The
thing that stands between people and their freedom should not be whether
or not they can afford it.”

“I want to see accountability for the people with the power and the
money,” Alisha said. “I’m not asking for anything extreme, I just want to
see them pay their fair share.”

“When we’re building this political movement, we’ve got to advocate for
our people and our city like it’s do or die because it is,” she said. “We
can show a national model of what progressive leadership can look like.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8364?t=1051&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]MAKE CALLS FOR ALISHA

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1052&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1053&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

OR Board Chair and Nebraska Party Chair Jane Kleeb joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8367?t=1054&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]National
Organizing Call to talk progressive party-building — from the grassroots
to the DNC.

“There are changes happening even though we sometimes get setbacks like
with banning dark money,” Jane said. The resolutions committee refused to
allow a vote, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8382?t=1055&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]Common Dreams reported.

Our progressive bloc is growing, and Jane called on us to plan now for
upcoming delegate elections to get more say over election rules, party
platforms and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1056&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

Join our Party Transformation Team to help make a party that is supportive
of progressive ideas and more responsive to the grassroots.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8227?t=1057&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]JOIN THE TEAM

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1058&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

NEW GROUP! The San Francisco Education Alliance, powered by Our
Revolution, just launched!

“Pushing back against recalls and privatization, a group of local
progressives affiliated with Our Revolution, has launched SF Education
Alliance...‘proudly left-leaning, anti-racist, anti-fascist,
anti-carceral, pro-union,’” the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8383?t=1060&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]San Francisco Standard reported.

Organizers Jess Nguyen and Allyson Eddy Bravvman [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8384?t=1061&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]laid out the vision
to protect public schools, advance progressive policies, mobilize the
community, and hold elected officials accountable.

“Our public schools are at an inflection point, but when I think of Our
Revolution, I think of grassroots activism and people power,” said SF
Education Board Commissioner Alida Fisher. “That’s what drives me every
day.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8385?t=1062&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]JOIN THE SF EDUCATION ALLIANCE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8383?t=1063&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

Our Brooklyn chapter, Brooklyn Progressive Action Network, just
re-launched!

There was food and fun, and we organized for the single-payer NY Health
Act, the Good Cause Eviction Bill, exposing dark money PAC donors, and
more.

Brooklyn members were joined by Public Advocate and founding BPAN member
Jumaane Williams, Comptroller Brad Lander, Assemblyman Brian Cunningham,
and other elected officials.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1067&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]RSVP

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1068&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

As the country's largest grassroots-funded progressive political
organization, we are carrying out Bernie’s vision through our 4-POINT PLAN
TO WIN:

Organize the Grassroots
Elect Progressive Champions
Transform the Dem Party
Fight for Progressive Issues

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1069&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1070&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

Medical Debt is a uniquely American problem among the so-called “developed
world" — and a big one that has been largely neglected by politicians and
the media.

We’re compiling stories to bring pressure to bear on this great healthcare
injustice. If you’re one of the many who owe money to a hospital, please
speak out.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1071&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1072&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

We need to hear from you! If you’ve ever worked in the food service
industry and experienced low wages, we encourage you to speak out — we’ll
have your back!

Our Revolution-NYPAN’s Jenny Almanzar told us she relies on tips to make
ends meet. “It’s terrible. I’ve come out of a shift with $20 in tips,” she
said.

Leaders like Bernie Sanders and Ro Khanna are bringing these issues to the
forefront, and we can help bring change by sharing our horror stories in
the industry.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/tipped_wage_sv/?t=1073&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]SHARE YOUR STORY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1074&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

Power is up for grabs in major cities across the country, and we’ll be
working to elect progressives in St. Louis, NYC, Philly, Nashville,
Dallas, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1075&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8387?t=1076&akid=4035%2E5885482%2EbUcNn- ][IMG]

Progressive US Rep. Ruben Gallego is running to replace Senator Kyrsten
Sinema in 2024! She’s blocked higher wages, voting rights, lower drug
costs, and more — and she’s getting lots of billionaire campaign money as
a reward.

It’s going to take a historic grassroots effort but we can beat her.
Donate now to our Stop Sinema Fund to jumpstart this work!

Andy Levin for the role. Levin was reportedly considered before Marty Walsh was named in 2021. “To me, the most significant data point is that union density is at an all-time low,” Joseph said. “President Biden talks about support for workers on strike, but at the end of the day, he as president hasn’t used his power to add more workers to the ranks.” [ - ]These are the decisions that have reverberating impacts for workers and our families. Join Our Revolution to grow our progressive voice and stand with labor. ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ BUILDING LOCAL POWER IN ST. LOUIS [ - ][IMG] St. Louis is an exciting place for progressive organizing right now — from electing US Rep. Cori Bush in 2020 to Mayor Tishuara Jones and a progressive majority on the Board of Aldermen in 2021. Since new Board President Megan Green completed the progressive trifecta in November, the city has passed a Basic Income trial, pushed for tenant’s rights and much more! Now, the whole St. Louis Board is up for grabs again in redrawn districts, and Our Revolution has an amazing slate on the ballot to hold the progressive majority — from re-electing Megan Green to candidates in 10 ward races. [ - ]PHONEBANK FOR OUR ST. LOUIS SLATE! ★ ★ ★ MEET ALISHA SONNIER [ - ][IMG] One of those candidates progressive powerhouse Alilsha Sonnier who we are proud to back for St. Louis Alderwoman in Ward 7! Alisha's [ - ]activism began with the murder of Michael Brown, and she's worked with the Fight for $15, Pro Choice Missouri, as political director for Megan Green’s campaign, and now on the St. Louis Board of Education. “This story starts with the death of a black young man left in the street for 4.5 hours less than a decade ago — to now some of the city’s highest seats being held by the people aligned with a people-centered agenda,” Alisha [ - ]said Monday. [ - ][IMG] Alisha spoke on housing, healthcare, education, and ending cash bail: “The thing that stands between people and their freedom should not be whether or not they can afford it.” “I want to see accountability for the people with the power and the money,” Alisha said. “I’m not asking for anything extreme, I just want to see them pay their fair share.” “When we’re building this political movement, we’ve got to advocate for our people and our city like it’s do or die because it is,” she said. “We can show a national model of what progressive leadership can look like.” [ - ]MAKE CALLS FOR ALISHA ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] OR Board Chair and Nebraska Party Chair Jane Kleeb joined our [ - ]National Organizing Call to talk progressive party-building — from the grassroots to the DNC. “There are changes happening even though we sometimes get setbacks like with banning dark money,” Jane said. The resolutions committee refused to allow a vote, [ - ]Common Dreams reported. Our progressive bloc is growing, and Jane called on us to plan now for upcoming delegate elections to get more say over election rules, party platforms and more. ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Progressives now hold leadership positions in 20 state parties, and we cannot cede this ground to the corporate wing. We’ll be fighting for progressive leaders in Nevada, Florida, Oregon, and other states soon! Join our Party Transformation Team to help make a party that is supportive of progressive ideas and more responsive to the grassroots. [ - ]JOIN THE TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] NEW GROUP! The San Francisco Education Alliance, powered by Our Revolution, just launched! “Pushing back against recalls and privatization, a group of local progressives affiliated with Our Revolution, has launched SF Education Alliance...‘proudly left-leaning, anti-racist, anti-fascist, anti-carceral, pro-union,’” the [ - ]San Francisco Standard reported. Organizers Jess Nguyen and Allyson Eddy Bravvman [ - ]laid out the vision to protect public schools, advance progressive policies, mobilize the community, and hold elected officials accountable. “Our public schools are at an inflection point, but when I think of Our Revolution, I think of grassroots activism and people power,” said SF Education Board Commissioner Alida Fisher. “That’s what drives me every day.” [ - ]JOIN THE SF EDUCATION ALLIANCE ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Our Brooklyn chapter, Brooklyn Progressive Action Network, just re-launched! There was food and fun, and we organized for the single-payer NY Health Act, the Good Cause Eviction Bill, exposing dark money PAC donors, and more. Brooklyn members were joined by Public Advocate and founding BPAN member Jumaane Williams, Comptroller Brad Lander, Assemblyman Brian Cunningham, and other elected officials. [ - ]JOIN OUR BROOKLYN CHAPTER! ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Sign up now for our next LIVE Organize-to-Win Call next Monday when we’ll sit down and organize with more great guests and progressive leaders! [ - ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] As the country's largest grassroots-funded progressive political organization, we are carrying out Bernie’s vision through our 4-POINT PLAN TO WIN: Organize the Grassroots Elect Progressive Champions Transform the Dem Party Fight for Progressive Issues [ - ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Medical Debt is a uniquely American problem among the so-called “developed world" — and a big one that has been largely neglected by politicians and the media. We’re compiling stories to bring pressure to bear on this great healthcare injustice. If you’re one of the many who owe money to a hospital, please speak out. [ - ]SHARE YOUR STORY ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] We need to hear from you! If you’ve ever worked in the food service industry and experienced low wages, we encourage you to speak out — we’ll have your back! Our Revolution-NYPAN’s Jenny Almanzar told us she relies on tips to make ends meet. “It’s terrible. I’ve come out of a shift with $20 in tips,” she said. Leaders like Bernie Sanders and Ro Khanna are bringing these issues to the forefront, and we can help bring change by sharing our horror stories in the industry. [ - ]SHARE YOUR STORY ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Power is up for grabs in major cities across the country, and we’ll be working to elect progressives in St. Louis, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. [ - ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Progressive US Rep. Ruben Gallego is running to replace Senator Kyrsten Sinema in 2024! She’s blocked higher wages, voting rights, lower drug costs, and more — and she’s getting lots of billionaire campaign money as a reward. It’s going to take a historic grassroots effort but we can beat her. Donate now to our Stop Sinema Fund to jumpstart this work! [ - ]DEFEAT SINEMA ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] [ - ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ - ]Facebook | [ - ]Twitter | [ - ]Instagram | [ - ]Youtube | [ - ]Website | [ - ]Sign Up [ - ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ - ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

Donald J. Trump February 20th, 2023
**Mar-a-Lago, FL** —A [new Harvard CAPS/Harris poll](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMFugzAMhp8m3IrAgQQOHNqythpa1fWy3VBIQskaIIOwqm-_gNikyI4_O85vyywklKQh0IR6IouhDgNPZRAADgCCkAYQEZ-RGkuWhlElCOVpgqJAyPHe16LvmBZfdpha4_O-9ZoMg0xiqIjAHMdMBhxHUMciSmJaJYxxT2eNtWZEeIvg4E7Dhh82COcGNZpe67mR4w-z4X1nZWddMBndMzG62yzNuQCcOZ0u5UFWMyoL-bzKcdJ29I2oET5Mti1bKdTUIpzLlimNgMxw7KeBSwe5KtnKOGsNU7fO0b_Z_zKrBpwnkMyw7LQSLtym1d6ae3M8L7BRTh7Or5f34ynffSfekAnzUFqrkVC3sNusYNmR-0qr-pkhukMAyzuAZR1QRLvPMyk-inzz-kLeNjmJo8echb2z9mnkf-naxV8nA0TzXyzrjQU) conducted February 15-16 shows President Donald J. Trump as the clear frontrunner for the 2024 GOP presidential primary election.

According to the survey, President Trump’s support is **double** his nearest competitor with his nearest opponent losing support in recent weeks.

**If the Republican presidential primary for the 2024 election was held today, who would you vote for? (GOP voters)**
** **
**46%** Donald J. Trump
**23%** Ron DeSantis
**7%** Mike Pence
**6%** Nikki Haley
**3%** Mike Pompeo
**9%** Undecided

Markedly, the poll indicates that President Trump will win the 2024 GOP primary regardless of the number of GOP candidates in the field. In a head-to-head matchup with just one opponent, President Trump would still win with a commanding 11-point lead.

**If the Republican party primary is down to two choices, Ron DeSantis and Donald Trump, who would you choose to run as president in 2024 among the two? (GOP Voters)**

**56%** Donald J. Trump
**44%** Ron DeSantis

According to the polling memo, President Trump would beat Joe Biden by 5 points in the general election. Conversely, the survey shows that President Trump’s nearest opponent and Joe Biden are virtually tied in a hypothetical general election.

**If the 2024 election for President were held today and it was between Donald Trump, the Republican and Joe Biden, the Democrat, who would you vote for?**
**_ _ **
**46%** Donald J. Trump
**41%** Joe Biden

Donald J. Trump February 19th, 2023
ICYMI: “There Is No ‘Trumpism’ Without Trump”
Thank you Gavin Wax very much, the problem is, many of the people that get elected to office know what to do (that’s the easy part), but they have no idea how to pull it off. name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We need to talk about my border visit in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
You don’t need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster

| |
---
| | | Friend, it's Kevin McCarthy.

I just visited the southern border with Rep. Juan Ciscomani, Rep. Derrick Van Orden, Rep. Jen Kiggans, and Rep. Lori Chavez-Deremer.

You don't need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster - a self-inflicted disaster unleashed upon the American people by the Biden Administration's open border policies.
* Over 5 million illegals have been ushered in by the Biden Administration.
* Hundreds of thousands of pounds of fentanyl and other dangerous narcotics are unleashed onto our streets to poison our youth.
* Criminals and terrorists are sneaking in undetected.
* And the countless handouts & benefits the Biden Administration is giving these illegal aliens is all funded by _**YOU.**_

Now that we are in the majority, we can finally DO something about the unmitigated humanitarian and national security catastrophe Joe Biden is trying to sweep under the rug.

We are going to begin congressional hearings AT the southern border, so we can hold Democrats accountable for the crisis they have caused and END this disaster once and for all.

_**But I can 't do this without you.**_

**I'm setting an emergency goal of $20,000 by the end of today to help House GOP's efforts to secure the southern border.**

**[Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq8id2k5je54q5s5pq28e45ed9k8r4sfv8m36fg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj60ob4cdh2bs "Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?")**

name: Victor Riches
subject: What’s in your kid's backpack— homework, pencils, or chest binders?!
body:
Last December, Maine mom Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter’s room when she found a chest binder — an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2r6114pbt7dih5eb766e74kfnp92pd4qdaohb1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj60o74chh2bs)

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh68e4lm960f0l0h23qihlrae8bc44kubs8hrdog_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj60o74chh2bs)

Friend,

Last December, Maine mom Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter's room when she found a chest binder -- an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Amber was alarmed and immediately began to investigate. She was shocked to discover that a school social worker, who had been seeing Amber's daughter since October, gave the child the chest binder and secretly advised her about gender transitioning.

**The social worker told Amber 's daughter the school wouldn't inform her parents about any of it and that she shouldn't do so either.**

**This was all in violation of the Constitution and Amber 's parental rights. **

Now the Goldwater Institute is stepping in to hold the school accountable.

My name is Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's leading liberty organization. We provide pro-bono legal support for parents like Amber Lavigne.

I've set a goal to connect with 500 new donors to fund our American Freedom Network, which provides pro-bono legal support to protect parental rights and stop schools from indoctrinating children.

[_**Friend, will you help us protect the rights of parents by sending a gift of $10, $35, $100, or any amount today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsf4dt44prk21r8cdiq1uqv1tju9g98b7ktepie8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj60o74chh2bs)

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6u9lml6n4cf5fq8srjfvia9istud03o9mias4o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj60o74chh2bs)

Amber contacted school officials, only to have the administrators defend the counselor's actions. She also found out that school personnel had already been referring to Amber's daughter with a different name and different pronouns.

_**" This is unacceptable: a school employee secretly encouraged my daughter to change her gender and hide it from me. The school never stopped trying to keep me in the dark at every turn, repeatedly stonewalling me when I tried to find out what was going on. My parental rights aren't up for debate: I deserve to know what's happening to my child in school."**_
-- Amber Lavigne

Now, we're demanding the school board investigate the counselor's actions and forcing them to accept parental rights as defined by law. The school's actions toward Amber and her daughter aren't just wrong -- _they 're unconstitutional_.

Parents have a fundamental right to control and direct their children's education, upbringing, and healthcare decisions. The Goldwater Institute is leading the effort to protect parental rights in courts and force schools to stop this radical trend in gender ideology.

[_**You can help the Goldwater Institute support the rights of parents today with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or even $100. Please help me recruit 500 new donors to the Goldwater Institute this month. Select any amount below to rush your support.**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvfnvepkbe2m84t5lvn726b3c9h2ta585cg74hq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj60o74chh2bs)

Friend, Last December, Maine mom Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter's room when she found a chest binder -- an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Amber was alarmed and immediately began to investigate. She was shocked to discover that a school social worker, who had been seeing Amber's daughter since October, gave the child the chest binder and secretly advised her about gender transitioning. The social worker told Amber 's daughter the school wouldn't inform her parents about any of it and that she shouldn't do so either. This was all in violation of the Constitution and Amber 's parental rights. Now the Goldwater Institute is stepping in to hold the school accountable. My name is Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's leading liberty organization. We provide pro-bono legal support for parents like Amber Lavigne. I've set a goal to connect with 500 new donors to fund our American Freedom Network, which provides pro-bono legal support to protect parental rights and stop schools from indoctrinating children. Amber contacted school officials, only to have the administrators defend the counselor's actions. She also found out that school personnel had already been referring to Amber's daughter with a different name and different pronouns. " This is unacceptable: a school employee secretly encouraged my daughter to change her gender and hide it from me. The school never stopped trying to keep me in the dark at every turn, repeatedly stonewalling me when I tried to find out what was going on. My parental rights aren't up for debate: I deserve to know what's happening to my child in school." -- Amber Lavigne Now, we're demanding the school board investigate the counselor's actions and forcing them to accept parental rights as defined by law. The school's actions toward Amber and her daughter aren't just wrong -- they 're unconstitutional. name: Brent Bozell
subject: 10 BIG reveals about Hunter Biden the media refuses to cover
body:
Congress begins its first public hearings on President Joe Biden’s family, including Hunter and his ties to foreign companies.

Congress begins its first public hearings on President Joe Biden’s family, including Hunter and his ties to foreign companies.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu22tes3tf4q7q50qssnvksla77o931ah05eoj1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj60ob4cth2bs)
Friend,

Congress begins its first public hearings on President Joe Biden’s family, including Hunter and his ties to foreign companies.

But you won’t find anything about it in the mainstream media.

_**ABC, CBS, and NBC refuse to give these stories the attention they deserve. **_

It’s not just the salacious stories of drug use, illegal gun possession, hookers, and nude photos they ignore. Some cases show Joe Biden lied in 2019: _“I’ve never spoken to my son [Hunter] about his overseas business dealings!”_

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the ONLY conservative organization dedicated to exposing the liars on ABC, CBS, NBC, and the rest of the Fake News media.

In fact, our work has successfully gotten CNN staff FIRED from their jobs.

[_**You can help the Media Research Center defeat the Fake News media. I set an URGENT goal of raising $10,000 from Babylon Bee readers. Click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount today. >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2r31sga6p3rbf2sb5eeb4fpntgji0nsg7ag5820_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj60ob4cth2bs)

**Here are 10 breaking Hunter Biden stories and how long the left-wing media covered them.**

1. Hunter Admits Laptop Was His - **Total Coverage: 1 minute, 45 seconds**
2. Hunter Email on Ukraine Awfully Specific, Raises Questions About His Access to Classified Docs In Biden House- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
3. Hunter Email Offered to Sell Intel on Russian Oligarchs to Alcoa- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
4. Hunter Had a Home Office in Same Delaware House as Classified Documents- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
5. Joe Biden’s Niece Offered $85K Job from Major Biden Donor, She Called it “Below Minimum Wage”- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
6. Joe Biden Named In Email Found on Hunter Laptop In Seeking Multi-Million Dollar Natural Gas Deal with China- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
7. Hunter Allegedly Refused to Pay Female Assistant, Unless She Sent Him Nude Pics- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
8. Hunter Had Access to Joe’s Corvette That Was Garaged Next to Classified Docs- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
9. Former Intel Official Admits He Thought Hunter Laptop Story Was Real But Signed Letter Disavowing It Anyway- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
10. Hunter’s Art Dealer Stonewalls House GOP Investigation- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**

Any one of these stories would’ve been widely covered if it was a Republican President’s son, but the left-wing media has been almost completely silent.

I am counting on you to help us reach our $10,000 goal before March to expose the radical left-wing media. Your support empowers MRC to expose liars in the media, spread the truth, and ultimately save Free Speech.

[_**Click here to show your support and help us**_ _**DEFEAT the left-wing media**_ _** >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zafo0rnivl5e7h1e1i4p90qcs4ru4n1buolha0u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj60ob4cth2bs)

_If you and I allow the mainstream media to censor stories as important to America’s security as this, what else will they try to get away with?_

We cannot allow the left-wing media to destroy our Republic, determine our elections, enact socialism, or brainwash our children. That’s why I’m asking for your support.

When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America’s trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore.

| Peter,

Today, on Presidents' Day, we celebrate the legacy of our nation's leaders and their contributions to shaping the history of the United States.

As we reflect on the important role that leadership has played in our country's development, we are reminded of the great responsibility that comes with being a leader. The individuals who have served as presidents of the United States have left a lasting impact on our nation, and their contributions continue to inspire us today.

Happy Presidents' Day!

[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=b9d0e3bb36&e=c87c5d8d97)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05

clean_body: Years too late to have any real-time impact, it now appears that a reckoning has begun to arrive. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 20, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | The entire mad media Russia mess of the Trump presidency—the furious coverage of the salacious Steele Dossier, the Mueller special counsel probe, the presidential tweets and bombast, the FBI inquiries, Congressional inquiries, inspector general inquiries, the sinister suggestions of collusion and corruption, treason and betrayal, prostitutes and pay offs, the small fish hauled in and then tossed aside—Flynn, Page, Papadopoulos, Kilimnik, Manafort, Mifsud, Millian, Bannon, Stone—“which office do I go to, to get my reputation back,” former Labor Secretary Ray Donovan famously asked in an earlier scandal—the white-hot spectacle has faded from the news cycle. The circus has left town. ---|--- | | | | | In the absence of adequate federal enforcement a Texas border security initiative heavily criticized by Democrats and the media has apprehended hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants—including thousands of criminals—and seized millions of lethal doses of fentanyl. Known as Operation Lone Star, the project was launched by Governor Greg Abbott in March 2021 as the illegal immigration crisis gripped his border state. ---|--- | | | | | To address perceptions of white, Western bias in curricula public schools surrounding the nation’s capital are revamping social studies courses for all students with critical race theory (CRT), anti-Americanism, and a multitude of leftist propaganda. The new District of Columbia Public Schools (DCPS) Social Studies Standards include teaching kindergartners about gender identity, second graders about same-sex relationships and gender fluidity in civilizations, fifth graders about queer culture and sixth graders about harmful border policies and how racism, privilege and bias affect the distribution of resources. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 487 pages of records from the United States Secret Service (USSS) related to the investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware in October 2018. The records show agency officials discussing media reports of its alleged involvement with one finding it “odd” that the Secret Service was involved in the investigation when Joe and Hunter Biden were not receiving Secret Service protection at the time. Another official responds: “Maybe we were asked for a favor?” ---|--- | | | The Daily Mail The Secret Service has been accused of a ‘cover-up’ over its alleged involvement in a police investigation when Hunter Biden‘s lover dumped his gun in a trash can near a school in 2018. CNS News The government watchdog group Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) to obtain any communications made between the Surgeon General’s communications director and social media companies — Twitter, Facebook, etc. — regarding COVID-19 vaccines. CNS News Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Defense Department because it has failed to produce legally requested communications concerning President Joe Biden’s Sept. 1 campaign speech in Philadelphia, where he positioned two U.S. Marines to stand behind him as he lectured that “MAGA Republicans” are threatening the “very foundations of our Republic.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

name: Josh Harder
subject: I’m Kevin McCarthy’s #1 target
body:
I know it’s still early in the election, but here is why I need you to chip in as much as you can to help reach our $5,000 goal this weekend:

Peter,
[**I know it’s still early in the election, but here is why I need you to chip in as much as you can to help reach our $5,000 goal before midnight:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58995840/392913419/-116936538?refcode=E20345-20230220-TopTarget-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdjMTYyYWEtNmViMS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZEEHMe4DGZ4lkFfe7bm0MhLECkPspxj9Y8Q1NSFT2Y8=)
First, my district is one of the most competitive in the entire country. In fact, we were one of the _last races_ to be called in November because control of Congress _literally_ came down to this seat and a few others.
The GOP has had their sights set on my district for years because it was a miracle we flipped it blue in 2018. I represent some of the reddest parts of California - in what is otherwise a reliably blue state.
Thankfully, we won because of amazing grassroots supporters like you.
However, Republicans know they can only lose _five seats_ or else Democrats will take back the Speaker’s gavel from Kevin McCarthy. So they’re going _all-in_ on competitive districts like mine to defend their majority. I’m Kevin McCarthy’s #1 target.
**I know that GOP Super PACs are going to spend millions of dollars attacking me, just like they have in the past. Your support today will help me fight back and defend this seat so we can win back the majority next year.**
[**So, will you please rush in a generous donation right now to help me win one of the most competitive seats in the entire country? We can't reach this goal without you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58995841/392913420/-116936538?refcode=E20345-20230220-TopTarget-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdjMTYyYWEtNmViMS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZEEHMe4DGZ4lkFfe7bm0MhLECkPspxj9Y8Q1NSFT2Y8=)
Your support means everything,
Josh

10 N California St
Stockton, CA 95202
United States

body:
---
| | I need you to see this: The New York Times just revealed that 119 members of the “chaotic” Republican House Majority voted to OVERTURN the 2020 election. **[Nearly EVERY member of the Republican leadership team sided with Trump’s insurrectionists, too.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58985730/392884881/1694452237?refcode=20230220_em_fr_b1_npelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzU4N2EzMS00NGIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6aB53Q7ucefd3P2NLiTf8gGt3q3FAQ9fQM5po7yh3xI=)** **_[Let me be perfectly clear: I can’t stop these anti-Democracy extremists from holding the House for the next 2 years. But I CAN ensure it’s their last term in power for DECADES to come. That’s why I’m rallying our strongest Democrats to help us get out ahead so we can defeat every last election-denying Republican from Congress. Please, will you rush $15 or whatever you can before midnight? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58985731/392884882/1694452237?refcode=20230220_em_fr_b1_npelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzU4N2EzMS00NGIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6aB53Q7ucefd3P2NLiTf8gGt3q3FAQ9fQM5po7yh3xI=)_** I don’t know what else to say. – These 119 Republicans voted to overturn a free and fair election.
– They chose Donald Trump over the American people.
– They’re doing everything they can to put him back in power. I promised you that I’d do everything in my power to win back the House for Democrats in the next election. **_[But I need grassroots supporters like you on board to do it. name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I've had it, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
[_**Peter, I’ve had it with McCarthy and Republicans. They cannot be trusted to remain in power for a single second longer. That’s why I set an ambitious goal -- 1,502 gifts before midnight -- to outraise Republicans, prove my re-election campaign has what it takes to win back our Majority for Democrats, and stop these far-right extremists from EVER holding power again. Can I count on your $14 right away? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58986644/392887010/-1810142053?source=20230220_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTg2OTg2NC00OGIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hQOqgcc7MmRVaEef80W5R7tL6rXrcW7qONJ93WbryQU=) Peter, my re-election campaign isn’t just about politics. It’s deeply personal. [**I’m running for my family.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58986647/392887013/-1810142053?source=20230220_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTg2OTg2NC00OGIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hQOqgcc7MmRVaEef80W5R7tL6rXrcW7qONJ93WbryQU=) My parents came to the United States in the hopes of achieving the American Dream. They believed in their core that every person deserves a fighting chance to make it in America. Despite the economic hardship and cultural challenges that come with making a new life in a new country, my parents gave us a good life. I never dreamed that I could be a Congressman one day. But thanks to my parents’ determination, I took on the tough odds and can now make a difference for families like mine. [_**That’s why I’m done watching McCarthy’s Republicans fight against us every step of the way -- and why we need people in Washington who know what it’s like to face everyday struggles. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Until that promise is made real for all of us, it is not real for any of us.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58987778/392890419/409185284?refcode=EM_C_230220BHM_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhY2E2NDA1LTRhYjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IiYrOWazIVtowqic0qewZWi-V2Pu0utq_U-bI-IUrW4=)
| Fellow activist,

This Black History Month, we are so grateful to have you join our mission to expand the electorate in Pennsylvania, to include historically disenfranchised and often ignored Black, Indigenous, immigrants and other people of color, and the youth to achieve a more reflective and representative democracy. We honor Black history by remembering all those who fought for freedom, and those who continue to move the needle forward for prosperous Black futures. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58987779/392890420/409185284?refcode=EM_C_230220BHM_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_B_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhY2E2NDA1LTRhYjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IiYrOWazIVtowqic0qewZWi-V2Pu0utq_U-bI-IUrW4=) **On the ballot, our voices are equal, and we have the power to make them loud. Getting access to the ballot, however, is not so simple.**

The promise of American democracy is a government of the people, by the people, for the people. For centuries, people in power have suppressed the voices of Black, Indigenous, and other people of color. While we have come a long way, oppressive efforts continue to this day, and the promise of a true representative democracy is still a work in progress.

Until it is made real for all of us, it is not real for any of us.

As a voting rights organization, the New Pennsylvania Project, will continue to fight back against harmful and restrictive legislation that would errect barriers and make it harder to vote, all while advocating for legislation to make it easier for all Pennsylvanians to access the ballot and vote.

Thank you for all you do to help us succeed.

Team NPP [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58987780/392890421/409185284?refcode=EM_C_230220BHM_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_B_Signoff&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhY2E2NDA1LTRhYjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IiYrOWazIVtowqic0qewZWi-V2Pu0utq_U-bI-IUrW4=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58987781/392890422/409185284?refcode=EM_C_230220BHM_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_B_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhY2E2NDA1LTRhYjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IiYrOWazIVtowqic0qewZWi-V2Pu0utq_U-bI-IUrW4=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58987782/392890423/409185284?refcode=EM_C_230220BHM_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_B_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhY2E2NDA1LTRhYjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IiYrOWazIVtowqic0qewZWi-V2Pu0utq_U-bI-IUrW4=)**_

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmc1te18t38o3ni6h1i3sbrn36c1heia3ml84vpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj62o32cth2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs19radio049104pqj8afdci0rcttqqahf1sbh0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj62o32cth2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zghvr1ofbrucfulfl1sqn6494hv7klhltj1ltvkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj62o32cth2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zarc19pj4hdfeek2vgde5m7u2e87pr0b6colvs68_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjj62o32cth2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

## Olympia Watch
---
| One of the first major deadlines of this legislative session occurred this past Friday. The 17th was the last day to read in committee reports (pass bills out of committee and read them into the record on the floor) in house of origin, except House fiscal committees and Senate Ways & Means and Transportation committees. Bills that don't advance by this deadline are considered “dead” for the year.

The next legislative deadline will be this Friday, and it is the last day to read in committee reports from House fiscal committees and Senate Ways & Means and Transportation committees in house of origin.

**The House recently passed HB 1363, relating to law enforcements ability to conduct vehicular pursuits, out of the Community Safety, Justice & Reentry committee.** However, Democrats did manage to water down this bill by including amendments that only allow pursuits under certain circumstances. While the pursuit language is still too narrow, this bill does bring back the reasonable suspicion standard and puts our state in a better position to increase public safety. This vote at least ensures that HB 1363 remains alive after Friday's cutoff and can move forward in the 2023 session. This bill is scheduled for another committee hearing TODAY at 1:30PM. **Please take 5 minutes to register your PRO position by 12:30PM today through[this link.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=020d69d936&e=6a281f566d) When doing so, select the written testimony option and tell legislators in the Transportation committee to restore police pursuit AND to amend this bill to include pursuits of stolen vehicles. **

**Senate Democrats also passed SB 5082 and the bill is moving to the house**. This bill removes advisory votes from the ballot that were originally put there through citizen initiative. This is another great example of Washington Democrats going against the majority of voters in our state, and creating less transparency by our state government. It is apparent why they want it removed - advisory votes are essentially an official poll of Washington State voters on their approval or dissaproval of new tax increases - and the voters regularly reject new Democrat taxes by overwhelming numbers.

body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f0627176e314603b88ae49a33c91244&_e=4JyfLtv-gu37AyetlC7o3-IbD36oe0esZ9tcooXg8reuab46n0WT2XEAJ4L5G0jJxZQZW5ggUaBrs2qHfmdgnpNKdhpsgeAcIQnlij3Q0Y3Q_YYrRqgiizZWiHM9WiDdBZyNLIrtSksuYTpPDzLNPmeljuSyuPBU-TEiVS_eOrJ3-GqUhh5d2Qlnz9m-vjHcG-JV7B087A1wThwXGo-wV6wbg1iObJIVkkcHDeRCJwBVSItd6-f2uJ0aVbbFz6wdC-5svz7ZE1tMPpyFFujlDymj5wMHqG2xFbM7fVW0ir4%3D)

RECENTLY: Biden has spent TRILLIONS to expand the IRS to target everyday Americans, who fought to defund them? America-First Republicans.
See the trend here, Friend?

subject: My three favorite presidents, and why

body:
All humans are flawed and products of their time, but considering their character, integrity, and competence, in my view, these three presid
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/f7OPlzC96/c?w=cihES_0-hUUlwP6TnTPpKZp3DKCrbjzrlXNW6RhDfKw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby9mN09QbHpDOTY_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**

---
| | Why these three are my favorite US Presidents...
---
| | All humans are flawed and products of their time, but considering their character, integrity, and competence, in my view, these three presidents led America forward the best.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/f7OPlzC96/c?w=L-57EK5SbU_0R1LOuNHmbrxw-yR8K70yEVtesyV6gz8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjM1NTAxOWQ3LTMxOTEtNDFiYy1iYjJkLTdlZjY3NGRkODk0YyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
| | Just as many leaders before me, I am committed to bringing dignified leadership and civility back to Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. This President's Day, I need your help in that fight. Can you make a contribution to my rural fund today?
---
| | | [**GIVE TO DR. BOB'S RURAL FUND**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/f7OPlzC96/c?w=awKMHn1iEaNtxMn5R8RSgfEOoDQtx30VU-eH0d1HCbA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjY3N2Y1ZDdmLTM5Y2UtNDQyZS05YWI4LTdkZjcxNGJiZGVkMiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
| | Not being a presidential scholar, knowing the strengths and weaknesses of each, I would rank Presidents Abraham Lincoln, George Washington, and Franklin Roosevelt as the top three. Why? All humans are flawed and products of their time, but considering their character, integrity, and competence, they lead America forward with:
* A strong vision for the country's future, a sense of service, along with a positive active personality working to make life better for all.
* Effective communication skills rooted in honesty, truth, and transparency.
* A bold, articulate leader with a great deal of charisma.
* The fortitude to make unpopular decisions while respecting and trusting the American people.
* Crisis management skills and ability to deliver results on issues of vital importance
* An ability to work with Congress and make wise appointments.
* Moral principles – wisdom, kindness, justice, and courage.

I want to close my Presidents Day greeting by sharing how important this next election will be for our state, and our Nation. As I have crisscrossed our district, I am reminded how cherished and vulnerable our right to vote is. Democracy is built on inclusion, equal treatment, and participation. Democracy is in danger. It is something we need to fight for and defend against the false narratives. Misguided leaders are trying to make it harder to cast a ballot, and it’s paramount that we defend the right to vote to ensure all eligible voters participate in not only presidential elections, but every election. We can’t be complacent – we can’t rest, and we can’t lose ground. As a country, we will need to work together to look forward – to lift our eyes up above the horizon and decide who we want to be as a Nation. Make no mistake, there are bad actors who are actively working to gain back control of the government and return us to division politics. We can’t let it happen. I am a champion of Democratic policies, and I am practical about how we can achieve them. I value what Democrats have accomplished – traditionally with dignified political temperance. I am not naïve about how difficult the Washington, DC climate is, but as Northern Michiganders and Yoopers, we deserve someone who will do their job with principle. The beauty of our democracy is we can openly disagree with each other, including the President of the United States. This is an essential system of our government's checks and balances. However, in order for the debates to be constructive, everyone across the political spectrum – especially elected representatives – must operate from the fundamentals of truth. I'm disappointed members of Congress and career politician candidates can't do that. [I need your support advancing truth across America's heartland.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/f7OPlzC96/c?w=tT0UcI_fLjdKcc7k8JLH32kHMejkIRqE62T-zBvDzA0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL1J1cmFsRnVuZCIsInIiOiJkYTJmNmZmNS00MDMyLTQwM2YtYmUxYi1hZDA0ZDIyYWJkZmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ) [Can you contribute today](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/f7OPlzC96/c?w=Hb1EPaGFxEJs1lB4nK7U9og8QclyR7LWvAZB9Pohrag.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JpdC5seS9GdW5kRHJCb2IiLCJyIjoiZGEyZjZmZjUtNDAzMi00MDNmLWJlMWItYWQwNGQyMmFiZGZjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) to ensure the election of an honest and ethical Congressional candidate? You deserve a change. Happy Presidents Day, Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula.
---
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/f7OPlzC96/c?w=S7gRpFfgfiEwLfw5DwU6vcy6_d5EmRJbC4fcEyrOPWY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6Ijg4YWQ4NmM5LTM3MDktNDViNS04MjgyLTg2OWYzOTA1NWUxMyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)

name: Team DeSantis
subject: In case you missed it
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5460da3f2706949ebc0cb2d8091654b82221c0143974fa37175cf5c043aa660f658d839d1a9f1f536eb5eade40d48636d15cdbe7009524e589848cdf394e32b8f8a106da9a6ad9f022c9aa3d3c148545

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=666413860776a6dec928fe84155c97e7f65bfdba78776ec32124050f224ad75238fc5acc30d8727c231dbd224944910be79cfd5c47b963d2d42455d0d8a4a87b

Peter,
This morning, Governor Ron DeSantis appeared on Fox and Friends to speak about his visits with law enforcement officials today in New York City, Philadelphia, and Chicago. The Governor discussed Florida’s blueprint for keeping communities safe and the importance of supporting law enforcement.

In case you missed it, you can see highlights below... ⬇️

“I think the foundation of Florida’s success has been law and order and support of the people who wear the uniform... We’re now recruiting more and more people from other states...You have a home in Florida...” - Governor DeSantis

Law enforcement officers from NYC, Philadelphia and Chicago are fleeing to Florida to live in a state that prioritizes public safety and does not cater to the woke mob. Florida doesn’t defund police officers; we defend them – making our state the law-and-order blueprint for the nation.

“Those woke approaches to crime and law and order and being anti-police, those policies have failed. Florida’s policies have succeeded, so we need everyone around the country to support the people who wear the uniform, to support policies that keep communities safe, and to abandon this woke nonsense.” - Governor DeSantis

Florida’s Freedom Blueprint proves that Governor DeSantis will always do what’s right when it comes to protecting our freedom and our way of life. The Governor is not afraid to take on challenges if it means that he can cement Florida as the citadel for freedom across the nation, protecting us all.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=666413860776a6debc39c8776fac904e0f2006de5d03adee75050f2f68488ce43239b3799fd06e09aa8d2fe4cb18d23a4ac562d7889db8337f594a13dd809a63

“If you’re an office holder and you’re just sitting there twiddling your thumbs, and not getting anything done, no one ever says anything. You can kind of just fly under the radar. But when you’re out there leading, when you’re out there setting the agenda, not just for Florida, but really for the nation, which we’ve done over the last few years, people see that and the people that don’t necessarily like that are going to respond accordingly. I can just tell you, if people are not firing at me, then I must not be doing my job. I view it, really, as positive feedback.”

Florida will never cater to the hysterical demands of the woke mob. Governor DeSantis’ battle-tested leadership has produced tangible results for Floridians -- and he has no plans to stop now.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=666413860776a6de8ad3d90007f3c31392c6fdf6851b2df70dc6e52a3b4b9d3a8dac32dfee24324b72955de809eecb18ce308d315ad37bd91acbf9d7d9f645b3

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=666413860776a6dec928fe84155c97e7f65bfdba78776ec32124050f224ad75238fc5acc30d8727c231dbd224944910be79cfd5c47b963d2d42455d0d8a4a87b
If you stand with Governor DeSantis and his effective law-and-order policies, will you please add your name to this list of top supporters?

Thank you for your continued support.

In freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=666413860776a6dec928fe84155c97e7f65bfdba78776ec32124050f224ad75238fc5acc30d8727c231dbd224944910be79cfd5c47b963d2d42455d0d8a4a87b

body:

name: Response Requested (via DLCC)
subject: re: Postmaster Louis DeJoy
body:
Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, plans to cut fifty thousand jobs at the USPS over the next few years. | | |
---
| | **Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, plans to cut _fifty thousand_ jobs at the USPS over the next few years.** DeJoy has repeatedly sabotaged the USPS, and these cuts will lead to higher prices and slower delivery times – preventing Americans from receiving medicine and other necessities on time. **These cuts could also sabotage vote-by-mail efforts this year and next, in critical states like Virginia!** That’s why we’re gathering signatures from our most active supporters to sound the alarm on the damaging work Louis DeJoy continues to do at the USPS. name: Team WFP
subject: Tell Amazon to recognize the Amazon Labor Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter — We just wanted to make sure you saw this message from Chris Smalls, the President of the Amazon Labor Union. Read his message below, **[then sign the petition calling on Amazon to recognize the Amazon Labor Union and come to the bargaining table.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmF3qTFieE-7fo3brfdbOjr-6uVCFSGPbOtPJMtvmAviAazKvkcpnug8N97H_QCrlXquHVVZ6VE6dJoAMXY-8sGQVn43nEHiedcrjhTJRndg4Crbe2fOPYvo85qrSRb7x4Pj7y0OTXOXJkLaAXgngPcbwpbtlaITwq_zeDGjydQoX-wLyLmUUC1fXbWhb3BVCvYoGXtSSMaXtis_XcWoOn71F9JEwqy4-4nTwAC0F-_eorJSmAkeTLy8u_J8L-ZhNupXwafb1qy_mEKJ74WcGZPnKGyjDS4pysdSo35WMPRobPj-ImKQlYdJjwy-DRh5md13QRzTjmNQfw_QnsSCDJZZZTzXvlhq8pxDfj8vhrcFfaHJJBgE6ABT0o0vzkiZcHq7fJqYc8NZdvzh3ETFGtOAdg4tBT6gyO4g7YhSPAoWKxtReWxpHiM45MJj3bbgMxhxB7dURrAGY3pcmOluhG0_qiBg3RwMgZafPXlWr4esA/3tv/CDkPcK3eTvK81pEfHlgyJw/h0/DVfAvNFzUWGBCL37sJq2DfYGWWw6sB37LGlcBfpReps)** In solidarity, Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Chris Smalls, President Amazon Labor Union via Working Families Party**
Date: Friday, February 17, 2023
Subject: Sign our petition: Demand that Amazon recognize the Amazon Labor Union Peter, I’m Chris Smalls, President of the Amazon Labor Union. Last year, our union made history at the JFK8 fulfillment center on Staten Island, when we became the first American Amazon Warehouse to win a union election. We organized for over a year. Amazon spent that year spending more than a million dollars trying to fight our union. They had us arrested for organizing at a bus stop that warehouse workers take to work. We weren’t breaking any law, but the cops arrested us anyway. In truth, Amazon is the one who broke the law during this organizing campaign. We filed over 400 unfair labor practice complaints with the National Labor Relations Board. They did so knowingly, because they know that by the time they’re punished or fined, the organizing campaign is over and they assume that they will have won. We spent 11 months inside, outside the building, at the bus stop, earning the trust of these workers, building relationships, creating GoFundMes for people that were fired — people that were homeless, living in shelters, unable to pay their bills. **We fed people. We built community. And on Staten Island, we won.** That’s the stuff that the press covered. But when the cameras moved on, we’ve still been here. But instead of accepting that we won, Amazon moved on to Phase 2 of their union-busting campaign: Stalling. Instead of coming to the bargaining table, they filed 25 bogus objections with the NLRB, seeking to throw out our ballots or decertify the union election. **Amazon Labor Union has our own Phase 2: that’s where you come in.** **[Will you sign our petition, demanding that Amazon recognize the Amazon Labor Union and sit down and bargain for fair wages, safe working conditions, and benefits we can live on?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmF3qTFieE-7fo3brfdbOjr-6uVCFSGPbOtPJMtvmAviAazKvkcpnug8N97H_QCrlXquHVVZ6VE6dJoAMXY-8sGQVn43nEHiedcrjhTJRndg4Crbe2fOPYvo85qrSRb7x4Pj7y0OTXOXJkLaAXgngPcbwpbtlaITwq_zeDGjydQoX-wLyLmUUC1fXbWhb3BVCvYoGXtSSMaXtis_XcWoOn71F9JEwqy4-4nTwAC0F-_erv9UUgZwaupx0EZyTlj0wpNgCAry_jKDmEILz2IQRZJlti4yCDSxzJa1-WKXei8VEDCvv0zKbtTQj-ex7l231xkM9L7tnak2JmiQBwrQHbotvL-ADSOHYAOjoQ_dOllr-JT248P8WKibHWkC8Hgwyf9JsWp-h1jvEJJXtpCdK4vHwutIy5LgFm271E8lrN4HMXgIdEnJTNANh9EYOIvzqpHQbAfPavPzs-AgFsN7PYj5ld6hLmdT1yLuORVMo6HeA/3tv/CDkPcK3eTvK81pEfHlgyJw/h1/3lqG7qA42EpoAH5q1LqTf7LepV_574X1VRVEq9DwW6A)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmF3qTFieE-7fo3brfdbOjr-6uVCFSGPbOtPJMtvmAviAazKvkcpnug8N97H_QCrlXquHVVZ6VE6dJoAMXY-8sGQVn43nEHiedcrjhTJRndg4Crbe2fOPYvo85qrSRb7x4Pj7y0OTXOXJkLaAXgngPcbwpbtlaITwq_zeDGjydQoX-wLyLmUUC1fXbWhb3BVCvYoGXtSSMaXtis_XcWoOn71F9JEwqy4-4nTwAC0F-__-PKPanmJeP4FgEh41cnY)** Remember: Jeff Bezos isn’t the one who packs your packages. The workers do. This is not a left or right thing. It’s not Democrats and Republicans. It’s a workers thing. Solidarity forever, Chris Smalls
President
Amazon Labor Union [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0z7LbPfEzyUQoTxoFfOCLCVbR0YoP-dpRE5F5UEI-u5c5k0psSj-0WPJf06Q-CsJVNnQQQWrhgo9w-k2a-uSizDQY0cVFpN8yaupIDjn4LySCvsCWUGIWHUNIYf9oloUh-GWS6OXq2zgtWLx2sX_b1UdjrBX0iM4qOmiSmAvqQ9JEghaJAImpfv-lPxuTZ4hP5stEOec0pjL52ZTOYjxYYSHtdYnANDyBQABD4jjFnysbhbsTOjpM9vA3lvxRO7jMo71F3LBFpPZlniJSusbYiBp1-bamr3SNCQr77O7o3mABNkfzmNAJMNMhH9WlxMkfA/3tv/CDkPcK3eTvK81pEfHlgyJw/h3/lx7WbfmDijgttOYS1QDjJCKYnYluMS5vsjBdRvakjSs)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpI1kLPEGRW4KnFarPJtxfN9U9y0YeH5CaLF3DG4soQcoy1KrGcqFZreu7Y1Ve-ZUj3NkAZMKwn6lcgqoXcwZpyNoPkyDr5Zbn5EogL9clM2-RgWFrGm1Zt8jiTFlftu7tHL7lYPuZco20ZmZIn31ryeeMkz79rAFKbCufqll32XHEX70ExBu5GW_DzAWGM6r2QT0z4BDMt_1pLPWbWVWzpEn0gnYSJUbrOOhyP_vVdzYzEEVSRv9Fn2qEDSb-Fy8TVBLrw9Qm4cHMOqNP3PoLu9dMkmOe4KxYReo59T2VczV0boHp_VYpDSeb3w7Gi0tA/3tv/CDkPcK3eTvK81pEfHlgyJw/h4/Ub_WtSynUBKT86JVa-h4qqHWlMkliytYveoIBozbD1k)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7Q-xOI-kLyL5jO9OnnCBTuK9twyuw2tokk8Ka5w96mgljoXVx1TfN2JBq2hAbFKAY9Z7rk0q7LxSax9I8fvwDnRkTlEyLrHwXYKmPtcUP8tUCi0L8qbtdB3Kbrm3Pt4-SPnuPnu5x8IjDWkL0mqKtJ1l3gHzoRxFUQubLAsX5hvUmBkDq9Y1kNuJzT6U41L5h5Yt_hvGLG_2TUkibBET80KDoaA2-T2t9MCnZF6IrFMvuhskV5Ae2JxJR1i74D--iwMyd6taO8Wo2C9X3EP3YkmDw7PFKVp7raVJhjPzOly1Q/3tv/CDkPcK3eTvK81pEfHlgyJw/h5/WHpkcxWPVXNH8Rsd3TW7N6c9eQkvMNiZ6MwQBR7ecmw) Thoughts? clean_body: | | | Peter — We just wanted to make sure you saw this message from Chris Smalls, the President of the Amazon Labor Union. Read his message below, In solidarity, Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Chris Smalls, President Amazon Labor Union via Working Families Party Date: Friday, February 17, 2023 Subject: Sign our petition: Demand that Amazon recognize the Amazon Labor Union Peter, I’m Chris Smalls, President of the Amazon Labor Union. Last year, our union made history at the JFK8 fulfillment center on Staten Island, when we became the first American Amazon Warehouse to win a union election. We organized for over a year. Amazon spent that year spending more than a million dollars trying to fight our union. They had us arrested for organizing at a bus stop that warehouse workers take to work. We weren’t breaking any law, but the cops arrested us anyway. In truth, Amazon is the one who broke the law during this organizing campaign. We filed over 400 unfair labor practice complaints with the National Labor Relations Board. They did so knowingly, because they know that by the time they’re punished or fined, the organizing campaign is over and they assume that they will have won. We spent 11 months inside, outside the building, at the bus stop, earning the trust of these workers, building relationships, creating GoFundMes for people that were fired — people that were homeless, living in shelters, unable to pay their bills. We fed people. We built community. And on Staten Island, we won. That’s the stuff that the press covered. But when the cameras moved on, we’ve still been here. But instead of accepting that we won, Amazon moved on to Phase 2 of their union-busting campaign: Stalling. Instead of coming to the bargaining table, they filed 25 bogus objections with the NLRB, seeking to throw out our ballots or decertify the union election. Amazon Labor Union has our own Phase 2: that’s where you come in. Remember: Jeff Bezos isn’t the one who packs your packages. The workers do. This is not a left or right thing. It’s not Democrats and Republicans. It’s a workers thing. Solidarity forever, Chris Smalls President Amazon Labor Union Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Donald J. Trump, me (2)
subject: RE: We have no choice…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Either we ballot harvest where we can, or you can say goodbye to America

---
| | | | | | | | Friend,
---
| Many states have BANNED ballot harvesting to keep our elections honest and fair.
---
| But in the states where ballot harvesting is allowed, WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO BEAT THE DEMOCRATS AT THEIR OWN GAME.
---
| **_Either we ballot harvest in the states where it 's legal, or you can say goodbye to our country, because the Democrats would win EVERY election._**
---
| That's why we launched our own **Trump for President Ballot Harvesting Fund** - but of course, our harvested ballots will only come from LEGAL, REGISTERED VOTERS!
---
| _**I couldn 't believe how many patriots donated to our new fund. Even the Fake News Media is talking about how big this has become! **_
---

| Peter,

One of my central missions in Congress is to strengthen public trust in our government, and to do that, I am committed to banning stock trading by members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children.

When I first introduced this legislation three years ago, I had just one co-sponsor. Now, just one month after re-introducing it, more than 50 representatives – _**Democrats and Republicans**_ – have signed on.

The support for my common sense reform is clear, and the public agrees. The more support we can build for a more transparent government, the better.

So please, [_**tell me: do you support this effort to ban members of Congress from trading individual stocks?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58991324/392899078/116995609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjI1NmI1ZTEtNTZiMS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ahZ7WLgIkdWAhtdy4fYwPoBSovWPNYYsYrQ0A4k1I0w=&emci=1956b5e1-56b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2256b5e1-56b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8470899)

clean_body: Tell me: do you support this effort to ban members of Congress from trading individual stocks? | = | Peter, One of my central missions in Congress is to strengthen public trust in our government, and to do that, I am committed to banning stock trading by members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children. When I first introduced this legislation three years ago, I had just one co-sponsor. Now, just one month after re-introducing it, more than 50 representatives – Democrats and Republicans – have signed on. The support for my common sense reform is clear, and the public agrees. The more support we can build for a more transparent government, the better. So please, | I’m proud to lead the charge towards a more trustworthy government. I have always believed representatives ought to look out for their constituents, not their financial portfolios. If you’re with me, | With appreciation, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Look, Peter — I’ve spent 18 years working for Virginians in the General Assembly.

I’m proud to have passed essential landmark legislation for the Commonwealth, _helping to protect voting rights, safeguard abortion access, expand health care, address climate change, and so much more._

And Peter, I’m far from done with these fights:

**It’s time to take my work to Congress** and get work done for the thousands of Virginians across our district.

**It’s time for Virginian voices to be heard** in Washington, and I’m ready to continue the legacy of service of those who have come before me.

**It’s time for Virginia’s first Black congresswoman, and if you’re with me,** [ I hope you will split $10 between our campaign and The Collective PAC today toward our donation goal with just 1 day until Election Day >> ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJ7ax4f-Wv-UyjDQjs75FnysIlS2bjNmW2cbUF0G94o_8HA_w5r9_-SEyHKb3xyC8N6naYRJ6yuQV45mZxsGlN9rIub9eGvTbq7IRWmY6C6nYUAq0iDL4HU2cAmlr5vO7QaQ2y41KbBV7Vmze5Suj_bejzPS6tGDWB9gguvkgc3LrA5fC0nUbOBUTzzCyMb6a2S-vTH8HiCU0SbVqkrTaBGl2dV0wHF5RGTd7Xt0Hvv-If2xVn2o6j2fZMoJEIin3IgzU3X58IlK52jHdLIe363ygd2uf_CpH-RjnvLqWNqvATZmA1vusYYLaU7KS0nxTDVryJ2wvxdXvz-jiWv8OaWg8HPwMrQSzKtcVlhP0gWdd0UgmD_kv7iTTAH92DzZnhtMPFp_yhKw0kO3V9F2nerA/3tv/IlzOq8rcQQiASVtwRaAA_Q/h4/5DuUpfZ8BF2hnk1vxFFVxARNCATIto4hGAiVtbXY9CY)

clean_body: It’s time | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, it’s hard to believe our Election Day is tomorrow. We’ve had a whirlwind of a campaign — I’ve driven hundreds of miles across VA-04 meeting voters and listening to their hopes and concerns. | | Look, Peter — I’ve spent 18 years working for Virginians in the General Assembly. I’m proud to have passed essential landmark legislation for the Commonwealth, helping to protect voting rights, safeguard abortion access, expand health care, address climate change, and so much more. And Peter, I’m far from done with these fights: It’s time to take my work to Congress and get work done for the thousands of Virginians across our district. It’s time for Virginian voices to be heard in Washington, and I’m ready to continue the legacy of service of those who have come before me. It’s time for Virginia’s first Black congresswoman, and if you’re with me, If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Jennifer McClellan and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you, Jenn McClellan The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Team Craft
subject: New Stops on the Kitchen Table Tour!
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/347a86b103a699c67c94c760ea83e7c0/41823/58114097130ba7bc/5ab6bff16f4f56fbc3d6b838967d376c/41823)
---
We hope that all of you are doing well, and having a great new year. The primary election is quickly approaching and events are starting to pick up. We are currently 85 days away from election day, and we know that many are still undecided. We just wanted to send a personal invitation on behalf of the Craft Campaign to everyone regarding seven different Kitchen Table Tour Meet and Greets happening this week. Below are the dates and times of the events along with the location, and the _Eventbrite _link to RSVP. You are never required to RSVP, but it gives us a better idea of how many folks are attending.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/347a86b103a699c67c94c760ea83e7c0/41823/58114097130ba7bc/cd62260105b20cc0c3d6b838967d376c/41823)

clean_body: | | | We hope that all of you are doing well, and having a great new year. The primary election is quickly approaching and events are starting to pick up. We are currently 85 days away from election day, and we know that many are still undecided. We just wanted to send a personal invitation on behalf of the Craft Campaign to everyone regarding seven different Kitchen Table Tour Meet and Greets happening this week. Below are the dates and times of the events along with the location, and the Eventbrite link to RSVP. You are never required to RSVP, but it gives us a better idea of how many folks are attending. Tuesday, February 21, 2023 at 5:45pm Washington Square Cafe5981 N Jefferson St, Burlington, KY 41005Free appetizers and non-alcoholic drinks Wednesday, February 22, 2023 at 9:00am Honey Depot and Coffee House435 N. | Peter,

One thing you should know about Linda is she will never stop “kicking ass for the working class.” And amid record inflation, she knows it's a tough time for working families in California and across the country.

That’s why she’s standing up to corporate greed by fighting to protect good jobs for working families. Workers across the country deserve respect in the workplace, safe working conditions, fair pay, benefits, and sick leave. _**Plain and simple.**_ And Linda will never stop fighting to make these a reality. Friend,
As we celebrate Presidents Day, it's important to reflect upon the great leaders who have shaped our country. From George Washington to Abraham Lincoln, these presidents demonstrated an unwavering commitment to our nation's values and the courage to lead us through some of our darkest moments.

Unfortunately, today, we find ourselves with a President that falls far short of those great leaders. Joe Biden lacks the integrity, vision, and patriotism that has defined our greatest presidents. He does not inspire us, nor does he embody the spirit of this great nation. A stark contrast to our four years of prosperity and safety under President Trump.

[I am fighting for the conservative values and ideals that make our country great, and I need your support to do so. clean_body: | | | | \- - - | Friend, As we celebrate Presidents Day, it's important to reflect upon the great leaders who have shaped our country. From George Washington to Abraham Lincoln, these presidents demonstrated an unwavering commitment to our nation's values and the courage to lead us through some of our darkest moments. Unfortunately, today, we find ourselves with a President that falls far short of those great leaders. Joe Biden lacks the integrity, vision, and patriotism that has defined our greatest presidents. He does not inspire us, nor does he embody the spirit of this great nation. A stark contrast to our four years of prosperity and safety under President Trump. | Together, we can send a clear message that we will not accept a government that lacks the integrity and vision of our great presidents. Thank you, | | Harriet Hageman | | | |
