Hi friend,
Since the overturning of Roe v. Wade last summer, we have witnessed the devastating impact of stolen reproductive freedom across the country.
The right to make these deeply personal health care decisions should never be impeded on, and that's why I'm so proud to stand with Virginia Senate Democrats who, earlier this month, passed a constitutional amendment that would guarantee reproductive freedom for all in our Commonwealth. This is a monumental achievement, friend, only made possible because of our substantial Democratic Majority.
But make no mistake -- Republicans will fight tooth and nail to flip seats this fall and take back the chamber or narrow our margins. We need more unwavering advocates for reproductive rights in our Capitol, and that's why I'm running to be your next State Senator.
Losing ground this fall could put Virginia on a path to becoming the next state to ban abortion rights. While our Democrats in our State Senate made history this month, Virginia House Republicans have already killed the proposed amendment, taking away the ability for voters to have the final say on whether their rights should be enshrined in our state constitution.
With so much on the line this election, we cannot afford to sit on the sidelines or elect representatives who will falter when put to the test.
If you believe we need strong champions for choice, I hope you'll donate today to support my campaign during this Primary Election. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

Let's strengthen our majority together!
Lashrecse Aird

If you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: If you logged into our ActBlue, this is what you would see
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
This is powerful.
#
$22.39.
If you logged into our ActBlue — the service we use to accept and manage donations — you would see that our average donation for the quarter is just $22.39.
We're proud of this number. It's what makes our campaign different. We don’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs and unlike many of her colleagues in Congress — Cori doesn't rely on billionaire friends to fund her work.
We’re funded by folks chipping in $5, $15, and $25 donations. Just this past week, our campaign received donations from a nurse, a retired teacher, and a college student — AKA, the very folks that Cori is fighting for everyday.
**[What do you say? Can you make a donation of $22.39 — or whatever you can afford — to support Cori today?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230220.o9uSlK&amount=5&refcode=em20230220-2209&t=1&akid=2209%2E1082990%2E0bQqvV)**
**[Donate $22.39 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/762?c0=cori-em-20230220.M8vOEn&refcode=em20230220-2209&t=2&akid=2209%2E1082990%2E0bQqvV)**
$22.39 represents the movement we’re building: Your $22.39 donations are why Cori is able to push for policies that center everyday people (not wealthy donors) in Congress.
Your $22.39 donations are why Cori is able to focus on organizing and legislating for bold solutions like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All.
**Your $22.39 donations are why we’re making historic progress pushing the needle on issues including racial justice, workers' rights, health care, and so much more._That’s powerful._ **
If we keep working like this, putting our $22.39 donations together — we’re confident we can transform our politics and bring transformative change to our communities.
But Cori can’t do this alone. We need your support as she organizes and legislates in Congress for an agenda that puts people first. [**If you can afford it, will you chip in $22.39 or anything you can to help support our movement today?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230220.o9uSlK&refcode=em20230220-2209&t=3&akid=2209%2E1082990%2E0bQqvV)
**[Donate $22.39 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/762?c0=cori-em-20230220.M8vOEn&refcode=em20230220-2209&t=4&akid=2209%2E1082990%2E0bQqvV)**
**[Donate another amount »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230220.o9uSlK&refcode=em20230220-2209&t=5&akid=2209%2E1082990%2E0bQqvV)**
Thank you for all of your support.
—Cori Bush HQ

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230220?refcode=em20230220-2209-footer&t=6&refcode2=2209_1082990_0bQqvV&akid=2209%2E1082990%2E0bQqvV) **

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lucas=20Kunce=20HQ?=
subject: National Republicans know Lucas is a threat
body:
#
Peter -- it's only February and national Republicans have already made Missouri a top target for 2024. **Let us catch you up:**
Just hours after Lucas Kunce announced his campaign to replace Josh Hawley on January 6th -- two years to the day that Hawley ran from the insurrectionists he helped incite outside the Capitol -- GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee called Lucas "unhinged" for wanting to take on a coward like Hawley.
**They 've known from the start that Lucas is a threat.** And thanks to Hawley's crashing approval ratings + crumbling in-state support base, they know we have a real opportunity to flip Missouri's U.S. Senate seat next year.
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY»](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=4bfa4e5cba&e=8095450ef8)**
That's why just a few weeks later, in a coordinated effort with DC special interests, that same group launched another weird attack -- criticizing Lucas, a man from Central Missouri, for sounding like... a man from Central Missouri.
These GOP insiders are willing to do + say whatever it takes to make Josh Hawley look strong, even if it means lying about Lucas and tearing down the grassroots movement we're building behind him. **And with so much time between now + Election Day, we need to stay prepared for any other desperate attacks they might throw our way.**
**[So please, can you chip in $10 or anything at all right now so we'll have the resources to stand up to the national Republicans propping up Josh Hawley? Your early support will play a critical role in getting Lucas' message to voters all across the state and taking this seat back for everyday working people.](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=5572b2d036&e=8095450ef8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=637a76c88d&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $25](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=3ca700922e&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $30](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=3a00c42849&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $50](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=9c81dce07b&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $100](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=de6c19c8bf&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $250](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=8bf54cdb2a&e=8095450ef8) [Give another amount](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=a5eed234b7&e=8095450ef8)
---
Thanks for being part of this,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=a383aec8cb&e=8095450ef8)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=10a32a162c&e=8095450ef8&c=bf03498350). Mail us: PO BOX 1240, Independence, MO 64050.

That's why just a few weeks later, in a coordinated effort with DC special interests, that same group launched another weird attack -- criticizing Lucas, a man from Central Missouri, for sounding like... a man from Central Missouri. These GOP insiders are willing to do + say whatever it takes to make Josh Hawley look strong, even if it means lying about Lucas and tearing down the grassroots movement we're building behind him. And with so much time between now + Election Day, we need to stay prepared for any other desperate attacks they might throw our way. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for being part of this, Team Lucas Kunce

subject: I just returned from our Southern Border
body:
Our enemies are watching...! | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=17ad03a5fc&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=d14a0bf6a3&e=4955722b3e)
---
| Peter,

I just returned home from a trip to the southern border with Speaker McCarthy and a few of my Congressional freshmen colleagues. I’ve now visited the border TWICE as much as President Biden has!

The crisis at our border is getting worse every day.... Since this administration took office, they have made it clear that their priority isn’t American strength but weakness.

**There is so much work to be done... And I am focused on problem solving! **
---
| [Help Jen secure our borders and protect our families >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=b425e609d9&e=4955722b3e "Help Jen secure our borders and protect our families >>>")
---
| The Biden Administration is putting the safety and security of Americans in danger. The number of illegal immigrants is at a record breaking high... Fentanyl comes across our border daily and is the number one killer for people aged 18-45 years old... Drug cartels are running the show and making our communities less safe.

**National Security is not a Republican or Democrat issue; it’s an American issue.** The US Customs and Border Patrol agents have not been given the resources they need to protect our borders. We must provide them with the resources, personnel, and technology they need to keep us safe. We must act now to secure our border and protect our families and communities.

_[Can you contribute today to hold the Biden Administration accountable to secure our borders and keep our families safe?](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=5fd6606be4&e=4955722b3e)_

With Gratitude,
Jen Kiggans

body:

Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00fe04e48a4145ab81e0c79f3b4b3fbc&_e=oH3jwZ_1T-WMYqUvOXNc7uhkhAi2gOttFJ5IoVHS9n42mPMPW3zF2ChOWezhynMCBZliF1i-RkZZtUPDi42xWpgi56fPVM7YwI5XiHWeMGkkd0naPwBWiUMq6uMDtEYXtaAcVPNFlUw1YZbYvXkucqFs1lSNKLq5B2IpHIZgZJGy-4qResNiuTgQcWKI82V9Vseb9H3ekL5F9AeHNsg8rIbFEEgUCD9dJlufm1LwxfKyWLnF6q4ckDdKqwd8KgUmXKUq9TVNEwbKuydY-p3tKg-LRdyjixjDiHt_HAxWEPnhU1hsv9-fPsWVr7Zso2IA) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00fe04e48a4145ab81e0c79f3b4b3fbc&_e=oH3jwZ_1T-WMYqUvOXNc7uhkhAi2gOttFJ5IoVHS9n42mPMPW3zF2ChOWezhynMCBZliF1i-RkZZtUPDi42xWpgi56fPVM7YwI5XiHWeMGkkd0naPwBWiUMq6uMDtEYXtaAcVPNFlUw1YZbYvXkucqFs1lSNKLq5B2IpHIZgZJFD7KJlbqRlL_tKaGhe0lLYrScImxh8RdhtX34CGkhNvftlAeZ0rP-UGmBPuNtmX6NzppI4gRZ8WvU4RNZcSB9ciBWixNfZ8JkRuyT1kmyvNHZMxRE9eOZ5Rq8xmIxupLAezR4oENYrw_A1GFj7kzgB)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

Larry Klayman

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Will you take 2 minutes for Pramila’s survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, Team Jayapal here!
Every day, Pramila is working hard in Congress to make sure our people-powered movement continues to win the transformative policies we need. Now as Chair of the largest Progressive Caucus in history, Pramila wants to know what you care about most.
So Peter, we wanted to check in with you: **[Will you take 2 minutes to take our survey and quickly share your perspective with Pramila?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-congressional-priorities-survey/?source=em20230220&t=1&akid=2194%2E420207%2EjbvXiq)
**Your answers will help us understand what matters to Pramila’s most engaged supporters and inform her priorities for 2023.**
**[Take the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-congressional-priorities-survey/?source=em20230220&t=2&akid=2194%2E420207%2EjbvXiq)**
With the start of the newest Congressional session, Republicans have proved that they are in chaos. While they have brought extreme, out-of-touch legislation to the floor, Pramila and her Democratic colleagues have focused on pushing back and moving the needle on pressing issues.
With Pramila at the helm of the Progressive Caucus, our progressive coalition will continue to fight for policies that will put working people first.
Pramila is determined to keep passing people-first policies in this Congress, GOP control or not. But first, she wants to hear which issues matter most to you at the start of this term.
**[Will you take our post-election priorities survey today so we can share with Pramila?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-congressional-priorities-survey/?source=em20230220&t=3&akid=2194%2E420207%2EjbvXiq)**
Thank you for taking the time to share with us today,
— Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230220-2194-footer&t=4&refcode2=2194_420207_jbvXiq&akid=2194%2E420207%2EjbvXiq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

**My name is Jennifer McClellan and I’m running to represent Virginia’s Fourth District in a special election that is just 1 day away.

I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here, friend — because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.
**
My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district — but friend, our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive.
[**We need to raise $3,726 to hit today’s fundraising target, and I’d be really grateful if you could split a $10 donation between our special election campaign and Raul Ruiz? name: Victor Riches
subject: "School employee secretly encouraged my daughter to change her gender and hide it from me."
body:
Last December, Maine mom Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter's room when she found a chest binder

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc1d21e081d343418bb146fa096b14bd&_e=0Z7FOPW4WrYJHvxzLqxGtNrcexYYA-ucsBxrA6kpEsDiPQ1fyY0hrWEvQdpPGm7I8yzmBqrriDRfjtEX_1SUUDfokcm8HcCQJRstjhOvD_a9YT70SgNpaMLiH7YwQwbF-0N0tUiagHdHHScK5uOJvItc8RC1kQr9q2VtZxSRaKPbKMLR22WxUv4LX5zPPjz7F8Dj11IH23kVr2ms2reSN4N6opWJHp8OKCBfVKfKJMheCe_-HV6Jsf9H-AjInmYbJsmJ8BkBFQZuLWMfEdsA9BQO29K_SavXKK0WKmyVwAY%3D)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc1d21e081d343418bb146fa096b14bd&_e=0Z7FOPW4WrYJHvxzLqxGtNrcexYYA-ucsBxrA6kpEsDiPQ1fyY0hrWEvQdpPGm7I8yzmBqrriDRfjtEX_1SUUDfokcm8HcCQJRstjhOvD_a9YT70SgNpaMLiH7YwQwbF-0N0tUiagHdHHScK5uOJvP_ueF_M6_2i2S-sPPDTTVzoz_64HfTj2RIjmE9gGj8TQsJZmOiHQB4zV0DEsM4qoUAQ0s1hyz08krT7y0ym1LqCybbQbc5Sht-5v1zMLTCwi2v0ETP_7KoR0_NYvJubwT5j5pvKH2apAovh4GT8aWk%3D)

Friend,

Last December, Maine mom Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter's room when she found a chest binder -- an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Amber was alarmed and immediately began to investigate. She was shocked to discover that a school social worker, who had been seeing Amber's daughter since October, gave the child the chest binder and secretly advised her about gender transitioning.

**The social worker told Amber 's daughter the school wouldn't inform her parents about any of it and that she shouldn't do so either.**

**This was all in violation of the Constitution and Amber 's parental rights. **

Now the Goldwater Institute is stepping in to hold the school accountable.

My name is Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's leading liberty organization. We provide pro-bono legal support for parents like Amber Lavigne.

I've set a goal to connect with 500 new donors to fund our American Freedom Network, which provides pro-bono legal support to protect parental rights and stop schools from indoctrinating children.

[_**Friend, will you help us protect the rights of parents by sending a gift of $10, $35, $100, or any amount today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc1d21e081d343418bb146fa096b14bd&_e=0Z7FOPW4WrYJHvxzLqxGtNrcexYYA-ucsBxrA6kpEsDiPQ1fyY0hrWEvQdpPGm7I8yzmBqrriDRfjtEX_1SUUDfokcm8HcCQJRstjhOvD_a9YT70SgNpaMLiH7YwQwbF-0N0tUiagHdHHScK5uOJvMXHdHaz4M5fLDTveP7zVhhXcyNr48N4n_oqlqiO8w0fKR8f91HGvBQH-VCEq1B4m91cIjZnw6LSlHugnBTCOvrOf8fdW186_pPNwGDJDLbwkdKdEQG77WUZGaahehxW4G3Dj-fF2FejbYV9SHjZw4U%3D)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc1d21e081d343418bb146fa096b14bd&_e=0Z7FOPW4WrYJHvxzLqxGtNrcexYYA-ucsBxrA6kpEsDiPQ1fyY0hrWEvQdpPGm7I8yzmBqrriDRfjtEX_1SUUDfokcm8HcCQJRstjhOvD_a9YT70SgNpaMLiH7YwQwbF-0N0tUiagHdHHScK5uOJvCSN5HpMo0mA9I50OTCl_C8ZGaSk_On4jGMDWZrWE7_DnkCLcSqy5rooWkqvMPqSGm9bou9q1fs0XQZISNQDmsnxJQdY0R675JMe1161SHv4OCZWCIXaUaOlRVJguum_Xl8CZfdfJV9SOL0XywPT0jk%3D)

Amber contacted school officials, only to have the administrators defend the counselor's actions. She also found out that school personnel had already been referring to Amber's daughter with a different name and different pronouns.

_**" This is unacceptable: a school employee secretly encouraged my daughter to change her gender and hide it from me. The school never stopped trying to keep me in the dark at every turn, repeatedly stonewalling me when I tried to find out what was going on. My parental rights aren't up for debate: I deserve to know what's happening to my child in school."**_
-- Amber Lavigne

Now, we're demanding the school board investigate the counselor's actions and forcing them to accept parental rights as defined by law. The school's actions toward Amber and her daughter aren't just wrong -- _they 're unconstitutional_.

Parents have a fundamental right to control and direct their children's education, upbringing, and healthcare decisions. The Goldwater Institute is leading the effort to protect parental rights in courts and force schools to stop this radical trend in gender ideology.

[_**You can help the Goldwater Institute support the rights of parents today with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or even $100. Please help me recruit 500 new donors to the Goldwater Institute this month. Select any amount below to rush your support.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc1d21e081d343418bb146fa096b14bd&_e=0Z7FOPW4WrYJHvxzLqxGtNrcexYYA-ucsBxrA6kpEsDiPQ1fyY0hrWEvQdpPGm7I8yzmBqrriDRfjtEX_1SUUDfokcm8HcCQJRstjhOvD_a9YT70SgNpaMLiH7YwQwbF-0N0tUiagHdHHScK5uOJvFED3oGLKYBN0J09-C5EUMhj8XkZXfkdIrwZH5JGf8r3cJFhifcmte0DPCWGI2Ww5Gu9YyegMxSU5rTdJ7edUYx2YmbfcrUCU8wPbODzwFfqg-tDziaE0S1dZyhL-OPWMGjoIqCp5BB8FgyO0XheRkQ%3D)

clean_body: Last December, Maine mom Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter's room when she found a chest binder Friend, Last December, Maine mom Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter's room when she found a chest binder -- an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Amber was alarmed and immediately began to investigate. She was shocked to discover that a school social worker, who had been seeing Amber's daughter since October, gave the child the chest binder and secretly advised her about gender transitioning. The social worker told Amber 's daughter the school wouldn't inform her parents about any of it and that she shouldn't do so either. This was all in violation of the Constitution and Amber 's parental rights. Now the Goldwater Institute is stepping in to hold the school accountable. My name is Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's leading liberty organization. We provide pro-bono legal support for parents like Amber Lavigne. I've set a goal to connect with 500 new donors to fund our American Freedom Network, which provides pro-bono legal support to protect parental rights and stop schools from indoctrinating children. Amber contacted school officials, only to have the administrators defend the counselor's actions. She also found out that school personnel had already been referring to Amber's daughter with a different name and different pronouns. " This is unacceptable: a school employee secretly encouraged my daughter to change her gender and hide it from me. The school never stopped trying to keep me in the dark at every turn, repeatedly stonewalling me when I tried to find out what was going on. My parental rights aren't up for debate: I deserve to know what's happening to my child in school." -- Amber Lavigne Now, we're demanding the school board investigate the counselor's actions and forcing them to accept parental rights as defined by law. The school's actions toward Amber and her daughter aren't just wrong -- they 're unconstitutional. Parents have a fundamental right to control and direct their children's education, upbringing, and healthcare decisions. The Goldwater Institute is leading the effort to protect parental rights in courts and force schools to stop this radical trend in gender ideology. No other organization has done more to defend parental rights than the Goldwater Institute: We helped concerned parents get the answers they deserved after school districts charged them thousands of dollars just to find out what was being taught in their kids' schools. As schools try to ramp up woke indoctrination like CRT and gender ideology, the rights of parents are more important than ever. Thank you, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. **admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**

#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**

---
|

### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63f437425593cf657d72a5fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D63f43707a0e77c64be286f9a%26ss_email_id%3D63f437425593cf657d72a5fb%26ss_campaign_name%3DPalmer%2BTrain%2BDepot%2BTomorrow%2B2%252F21%2BSign%2BThe%2BPetition%2BTo%2BRepeal%2BRank%2BChoice%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-02-21T03%253A15%253A28Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63f43707a0e77c64be286f9a&l=en-US&s=c51FQyXP8djPgnM9W5WnmQ5Mxow%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. ### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
|
---
**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)
---
---

name: Jon Tester
subject: Get some luck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58995745/392913215/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJiMDRkNS02ZGIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHR4F5zcBSDBvnGxtO_bmIE138cPbA9V0tt8tAG-5jg=&emci=51525c26-2ab1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9abb04d5-6db1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, Peter, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.

**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and proud of it.**

The truth is, I love this work. Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it also keeps me grounded, and it gives me perspective on the issues we face every day.

When I think about climate change, I’m thinking of folks on farms like mine, struggling with catastrophic droughts like the one we dealt with in 2021. When I think about reforming the USPS, I’m thinking of the people in rural communities across Montana who just want their mail delivered on time. And when I think about infrastructure, I’m thinking of airports like the ones I fly through every week, and the urgent upgrades we need to make to meet folks’ needs.

**These aren’t abstract issues. They’re very real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. I spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.**

[**_So I’m asking: Can you split a few dollars between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to support this work? I’ll leave you with one last truth about farming: some years you do everything right, but things out of your control go wrong and you’re stuck with a bad harvest. Other years, you get some luck and it goes well.

That means it’s important to be prepared for any outcome, and to have a support system by your side when things get difficult. The same is true in Washington — and that’s why I’m so grateful to folks like you for even opening this message in the first place.

I appreciate your support, and anything you’re able to pitch in. Thanks for your help, and I hope I’m making you proud.

Jon

clean_body: | | | I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, Peter, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts. I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and proud of it. The truth is, I love this work. Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it also keeps me grounded, and it gives me perspective on the issues we face every day. When I think about climate change, I’m thinking of folks on farms like mine, struggling with catastrophic droughts like the one we dealt with in 2021. When I think about reforming the USPS, I’m thinking of the people in rural communities across Montana who just want their mail delivered on time. And when I think about infrastructure, I’m thinking of airports like the ones I fly through every week, and the urgent upgrades we need to make to meet folks’ needs. These aren’t abstract issues. They’re very real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. I spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = I’ll leave you with one last truth about farming: some years you do everything right, but things out of your control go wrong and you’re stuck with a bad harvest. Other years, you get some luck and it goes well. That means it’s important to be prepared for any outcome, and to have a support system by your side when things get difficult. The same is true in Washington — and that’s why I’m so grateful to folks like you for even opening this message in the first place. I appreciate your support, and anything you’re able to pitch in. Thanks for your help, and I hope I’m making you proud. Jon | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. subject: ALERT: Dist. 92 Superintendent Harasses and Intimidates Mother, Physically Blocks Her from Recording Meeting
body:
While student test scores continue to drop and the cost per pupil skyrockets, Tim Arnold harasses and intimidates mother at public meeting.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/812180f85e2a/alert-dist-92-superintendent-harasses-and-intimidates-mother-physically-blocks-her-from-recording-meeting?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dist. 92 Superintendent Tim Arnold Harasses and Intimidates Mother, Physically Blocks Her from Recording Public Meeting, as Student Test Scores Continue to Drop (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/dist-92-superintendent-tim-arnold-harasses-and-intimidates-mother-physically-blocks-her-from-recording-public-meeting-as-student-test-scores-continue-to-drop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During a recent public meeting with parents to discuss their children’s school curriculum, District 92 school superintendent Tim Arnold expresses frustration that a mother was recording his remarks on her cell phone by blocking her camera, in an unprecedented show of disrespect to a taxpaying citizen who helps fund his over $204,000 annual salary.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/dist-92-superintendent-tim-arnold-harasses-and-intimidates-mother-physically-blocks-her-from-recording-public-meeting-as-student-test-scores-continue-to-drop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Over 100 children and parents with Informed Parents of California (IPOC) protest in Costa Mesa on Friday, May 17 against the state’s approval of a comprehensive sex education curriculum that includes discussions of sexual orientation and gender identity. (Photo by Michael Fernandez, Contributing Photographer)

The act, which was captured on video and posted on her husband Jay Roti’s Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/100040342667668/posts/pfbid02hXJdLHovGNAf27LV3CumBvURkwvRbt5o92QKzjeraH3ikYbFESo8CBt58S6mFWugl/?mibextid=cr9u03&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , is yet another example of the blatant disregard that school officials have for parents who want nothing but what’s best for their children.

In his post, Roti states,

“Unfortunately I could not be there, so my wife went there by herself to record the meeting for me.”
https://www.facebook.com/100040342667668/posts/pfbid02hXJdLHovGNAf27LV3CumBvURkwvRbt5o92QKzjeraH3ikYbFESo8CBt58S6mFWugl/?mibextid=cr9u03&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The public meeting, which was hosted by Arnold, and attended by over 125 parents, was to discuss the district’s adoption of the highly controversial sexual education curriculum known as the National Sexuality Education Standards (https://advocatesforyouth.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/josh-fose-standards-web.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , which allows teachers to teach children about gender identity, sexual orientation, hormone blockers and gender expression.

The curriculum has angered parents in Illinois and across the country – and that anger is justified.

More than
500 school districts (https://freebeacon.com/campus/illinois-public-schools-opt-out-of-left-wing-sex-ed-standards/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in Illinois have exercised their ability to “opt-out,” declining to teach these outrageous sex education standards to children in their classrooms.

However, District 92 remains the only district within a twenty-mile radius that will teach this curriculum to students – triggering widespread criticism of Arnold, who continues to defend his decision.

As superintendent, Arnold has had a hard time hiding his far-left left leanings and biases.

In an August 26, 2021
letter (https://www.d92.org/cms/lib/IL50000614/Centricity/Domain/62/2021%2008%2026%20Staff%20Letter%20for%20Vaccinations%20and%20Testing.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to staff, Arnold attacks the unvaccinated, writing,

“In the Governor’s speech, he stated that we are in a ‘pandemic of the unvaccinated’ and the data certainly supports that observation. We say that we want no masks in schools (and who does?), but without being “all in” for the most effective weapon we have against COVID-19, an FDA approved vaccination, I see a future with increasing sickness and hospitalizations, not to mention increased restrictions and continued mask mandates.”

Arnold then challenges his team,

“The way out of this mess is to vaccinate up and stop the transmission of the more serious delta variant as soon as possible.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/dist-92-superintendent-tim-arnold-harasses-and-intimidates-mother-physically-blocks-her-from-recording-public-meeting-as-student-test-scores-continue-to-drop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A letter written by Dist. 92 Superintendent Tim Arnold urging staff to get the COVID-19 vaccine and to wear a mask.

Since Arnold took over as superintendent in 2019, the cost per pupil has increased by 33 percent.

In 2019, it was $15,345 per pupil.

In 2022, $20,461.

And test scores continue to drop under Arnold.

According to the
Illinois Report Card (https://www.illinoisreportcard.com/District.aspx?source=trends&Districtid=56099092002&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , only 23 percent of eighth grade students are passing Algebra. In 2019 – Arnold’s first year, 36 percent of students were passing Algebra.

https://youtu.be/a26XdYDQBTQ?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas speaks out against Wokeism in America, on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM 560 The Answer (Feb. 19, 2023).

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0899875a75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_20_07_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0899875a75-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

| | Folks, As we celebrate Presidents' Day, I’m reminded of moments in the past couple of years that tested the strength of our democracy. But, the same values our country was founded on have also guided us through recent moments of turmoil and division. Specifically, I think of the timeless examples set by George Washington and Abraham Lincoln. These two leaders, both in different eras, faced unique hardships that shaped our country and the democratic principles we cherish. Washington led with an unmatched sense of integrity, demonstrating that we should set high standards when choosing who to lead our country. He warned that partisanship could undermine our democratic institutions, encouraging us to work together to address the most pressing issues our country faces. Lincoln guided our country through its most intense period of division and demonstrated that democracy, when used as a tool for progress, can change the course of history for the better. His leadership reminds us that we must continue to be voices for change and equality, justice, and equity. As we look back at the example set by strong leaders, I’m grateful for President Biden’s leadership in the first two years of his presidency. I’m proud to have joined forces with him to restore faith in our democratic institutions and strengthen our democracy through challenging times. In a moment when our country needed a leader to take on the tough battles of protecting our rights and securing our democracy, President Biden stepped up. The best way we can honor the example set by these presidents is by resolving to work with one another to find common ground and empower Americans to reach higher heights. As your Congresswoman, I’m committed to doing exactly that. Our top priority for the 2024 election cycle is to help Democrats win back the House. And the best offense is a good defense. That’s why the special election tomorrow in Virginia’s 4th congressional district is so important.

Democrat Jennifer McClellan is counting on our help to keep this seat blue. [Will you split a donation between Jennifer McClellan and Democrats Serve right away?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58996674/392915711/-995214263?amount=10&source=DS_EM_FR_LO_230220_1_1&refcode2=90b7a329-73b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=sSMMg+gngVhlNbuzsJkzOu8HCC1kEQlX97wkPkNg1iXjHKvYIN/dB48mWHlKd8RKuKfA2dU7maWo9SnduEJJFPdhFGOCL6zxFg+7zWAR+dlF9iFliqW13DP7zc/WZdMrt2EDxpLfAnS8Pxt1AcdsIDpNZB1Jt8g2x+IDYkM9+/E=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwYjdhMzI5LTczYjEtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AzOR3wX-GO9QkbaCZjy98w0rUxrXeKHQUYVjDSv9bH4=)

This is the first election of the 2024 cycle and it’s a critical test for Democrats. This race will set the tone for the next two years, so we can’t afford to fall short.

Jennifer McClellan is a champion for working families – and if she wins, she’ll be the first Black woman ever elected to Congress from Virginia. She’ll be a fighter for our frontline public service pros and she’ll help us build a strong majority with leaders who are dedicated to serving their communities.

**_But first, she needs our help._**

[Voters in VA-04 will head to the polls tomorrow, so there’s no time to waste. Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

clean_body: | = Peter, Our top priority for the 2024 election cycle is to help Democrats win back the House. And the best offense is a good defense. That’s why the special election tomorrow in Virginia’s 4th congressional district is so important. Democrat Jennifer McClellan is counting on our help to keep this seat blue. = This is the first election of the 2024 cycle and it’s a critical test for Democrats. This race will set the tone for the next two years, so we can’t afford to fall short. Jennifer McClellan is a champion for working families – and if she wins, she’ll be the first Black woman ever elected to Congress from Virginia. She’ll be a fighter for our frontline public service pros and she’ll help us build a strong majority with leaders who are dedicated to serving their communities. But first, she needs our help. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Democrats Serve and Jennifer McClellan will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for helping out! – Democrats Serve | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe.org. name: Glenn Grothman
subject: I'm Voting for Jennifer Dorow
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=acbb5b4a391e45609992f38c0f81f656&_e=sxlyt8Ii-sFeV9dthvZC0n6xpBc_FEL5Kzroa2kdBFaAkhJnepxOrYDAiejo8U2SHFDDxmeIfLWKCo0C3IJrhX2vvMCX_-7evxBVfmjHEKkJxe80GpwVoEQgANIBDepZ7u1FNFWTrafC1PvdnGgiSugFBylptZhJ223n_bYB2VYSb8Ea21fCTjAAPXcm7s22dfk7SMjINU2hm3W1wk47_uGmVWMU3hKYHhVE2UZ4cvukWZselvpR1-jcJi4ro2Jh)
---
|
---
Friend,

Over the last several weeks, many people have approached me asking me how I’m going to vote in the Wisconsin State Supreme Court primary on February 21st. **We know this is a vitally important primary because Janet Protasiewicz has, in my opinion, unethically announced she will get rid of photo ID for voting, redistrict Wisconsin’s legislative districts, and undo Scott Walker’s legislation which made it easier to fire a bad public employee - including bad school teachers.** I have worked too hard over the course of my career to see these important laws undone by an ultra liberal Milwaukee judge.

I’ve had discussions with both Jennifer Dorow and Daniel Kelly and both would make fine justices and would not engage in the reckless behavior of Janet Protasiewicz. I have heard both of these candidates speak at four events in the past month. Daniel Kelly has stated that he will not endorse Jennifer Dorow if she wins the primary election. Jennifer Dorow has made it very clear that if she loses the primary, she will endorse Daniel Kelly. I find her answer to this question to be a much more mature approach, and quite frankly, shows she has a greater understanding of what is at stake in this election. I am also concerned that there has been at least two million dollars worth of ads run against Dorow in the last two weeks by outside groups that normally back Democrats.

This has become what I see as a national trend — Democrat-supporting groups getting involved in conservative primaries trying to take out the stronger candidates. The Democrats must view Jennifer Dorow as the stronger candidate. For these reasons, I will be voting for Jennifer Dorow for Wisconsin State Supreme Court. I intend to be very active in support for either Judge Dorow or former Justice Kelly beginning when the primary winner is decided.

**Please join me in voting for Jennifer Dorow tomorrow.**

Sincerely,
**Glenn Grothman**
---
|
---
| | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman

clean_body: | | | | Friend, Over the last several weeks, many people have approached me asking me how I’m going to vote in the Wisconsin State Supreme Court primary on February 21st. We know this is a vitally important primary because Janet Protasiewicz has, in my opinion, unethically announced she will get rid of photo ID for voting, redistrict Wisconsin’s legislative districts, and undo Scott Walker’s legislation which made it easier to fire a bad public employee - including bad school teachers. I have worked too hard over the course of my career to see these important laws undone by an ultra liberal Milwaukee judge. I’ve had discussions with both Jennifer Dorow and Daniel Kelly and both would make fine justices and would not engage in the reckless behavior of Janet Protasiewicz. I have heard both of these candidates speak at four events in the past month. Daniel Kelly has stated that he will not endorse Jennifer Dorow if she wins the primary election. Jennifer Dorow has made it very clear that if she loses the primary, she will endorse Daniel Kelly. I find her answer to this question to be a much more mature approach, and quite frankly, shows she has a greater understanding of what is at stake in this election. I am also concerned that there has been at least two million dollars worth of ads run against Dorow in the last two weeks by outside groups that normally back Democrats. This has become what I see as a national trend — Democrat-supporting groups getting involved in conservative primaries trying to take out the stronger candidates. The Democrats must view Jennifer Dorow as the stronger candidate. For these reasons, I will be voting for Jennifer Dorow for Wisconsin State Supreme Court. I intend to be very active in support for either Judge Dorow or former Justice Kelly beginning when the primary winner is decided. Please join me in voting for Jennifer Dorow tomorrow. Sincerely, Glenn Grothman | | | Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman | |

| | | Peter,

I’m used to watching that kind of behavior in the kindergarten ball pit, but I never thought I’d see it in a Senate race.
Peter, while my Liberal opponent has been calling me names and wagging his finger at me, I’ve been fighting for conservative solutions for the people of Missouri against big tech and the liberal agenda that wants to silence us.

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Trumps Visit to Ohio Spurs White House Into Action
body:
That is just shocking! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy President's Day!**
## **Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-j/) **Mayorkas is Incompetent** Department of Homeland Security (DHS) **[Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas refused to define what makes a secure border](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-t/) **in an interview on Friday. **Top Dem Encourages Border Visit** House Democrat Leader **[Hakeem Jeffries urges his colleagues to take a"field trip" down to the southern border](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-i/) **to see firsthand the destruction President Joe Biden's open border policies have created. **Jimmy Carter in Hospice Care** Former President Jimmy Carter has **["decided to spend his remaining time at home" in hospice care after a series of short hospital stays](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-d/)**, the 98-year-old former president's family said in a statement on Saturday. **Trump to Visit Ohio** After the **[announcement by President Trump of his intent to visit East Palestine](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-h/)** , followed moments later by a reversal announcement from FEMA stating they will now offer support to East Palestine. **Shocking!!** A California study of repeat criminal offenders **[found that individuals released on"Zero Bail" were more likely to commit another crime](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-k/)** than people who posted bail. **Called Off the Search** U.S. officials**c[alled off the search for two unidentified objects](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-u/) t**hat were shot down off the coast of Alaska and Lake Huron last week.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-o/)!**
* **[Before and After](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* He **[nailed it](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-m/)**.
* Just **[doing what they need](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-c/) **to do.
* [Which one](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-q/) are you?

**Join us tonight at 6 PM MT for the[ CaucusRoom Council Meeting](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-a/).** [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-z/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkjklt-trhiujldw-e/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
